meanings.meaning_en: the size or level of something, or the amount that something is happening
meanings.example: A structural survey revealed the full scale of the damage.
meanings.example_cn: 结构检验揭示了实际受损程度。

meanings.meaning_en: to climb to the top of something that is high and difficult to climb
meanings.example: I was shocked by the sheer scale (= very big scale ) of the destruction.
meanings.example_cn: 破坏程度之大让我大为震惊。

meanings.meaning_en: when a company, business etc becomes larger by opening new shops, factories etc
meanings.example: The industry underwent a period of rapid expansion.
meanings.example_cn: 该产业经历了一轮快速扩张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 操纵；操作；巧妙地处理；篡改
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone think and behave exactly as you want them to, by skilfully deceiving or influencing them
meanings.example: He was one of those men who manipulated people.
meanings.example_cn: 他是那种要摆布别人的人。

meanings.meaning_en: things that are done to keep a person, building, or country safe from danger or crime
meanings.example: The trial was held under tight security .
meanings.example_cn: 这场审讯是在戒备森严的情况下进行的。

meanings.example: lax security at airline check-in desks
meanings.example_cn: 登机手续柜台松懈的安全措施

meanings.meaning_en: an illness which affects a person, animal, or plant
meanings.example: His father died of heart disease.
meanings.example_cn: 他父亲死于心脏病。

meanings.example: She contracted the disease while she was abroad on holiday.
meanings.example_cn: 她在国外度假时染上了这种疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: uneconomical
meanings.example: the closure of uneconomic industries
meanings.example_cn: 效益不好的企业的关闭

meanings.meaning_en: the use of money to get a profit or to make a business activity successful, or the money that is used
meanings.example: We plan to buy some property as an investment.
meanings.example_cn: 我们打算买些房地产作为投资。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when someone or something was most popular, successful, or powerful
meanings.example: In its heyday, the studio's boast was that it had more stars than there are in heaven.
meanings.example_cn: 该制片厂吹嘘，它在鼎盛时期拥有的明星比天上的星星还多。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good
meanings.example: an old car in super condition
meanings.example_cn: 一辆状况极好的旧车

meanings.meaning_cn: 特级品，特大号；临时雇员
meanings.example: That sounds super.
meanings.example_cn: 那听起来棒极了。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of times something happens, or the number of examples of something within a certain period
meanings.example: Immediately his heart rate (= the number of beats per minute ) increased.
meanings.example_cn: 他的心率立即加快了。

meanings.meaning_en: if you rate someone or something, you think they are very good
to share things among a group of people, especially in a planned way
meanings.example: a man distributing leaflets to passers-by
meanings.example_cn: 一个向路人派发传单的男子

meanings.meaning_en: rich and successful
meanings.example: a prosperous landowner
meanings.example_cn: 富裕的土地拥有者

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a legal agreement, practice etc
meanings.example: Both governments voted to abrogate the treaty.
meanings.example_cn: 两国政府均投票通过废除这项条约。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分配；分配物；养家费；命运
meanings.meaning_en: an amount or share of something such as money or time that is given to someone or something, or the process of doing this
meanings.example: The budget allotment for each county is below what is needed.
meanings.example_cn: 分配给每个县的预算低于所需。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在下面，在较低处；在本页下面
meanings.meaning_en: in a lower place or position, or on a lower level
meanings.example: an animal that lives below ground
meanings.example_cn: 生活在地下的动物

meanings.example: Water was dripping onto the floor below.
meanings.example_cn: 水滴到下面的地板上。

meanings.example: I could hear voices in the courtyard below my window.
meanings.example_cn: 我能听到院子里有人在我的窗下说话。

meanings.example: The judge, said Ségolène Royal, the former Socialist presidential candidate, would never have agreed to the annulment had a case about false virginity been brought by a woman.
meanings.example_cn: 法官表示，假如关于谎称童贞的诉讼是由女方提出，社会党前任总统候选人贺雅尔(Ségolène Royal)一定不会同意取消婚姻关系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经销商；批发商；[电] 分配器；分配者；散布者；[电] 配电盘
meanings.meaning_en: a company or person that supplies shops and companies with goods
meanings.example: ...Spain's largest distributor of petroleum products.
meanings.example_cn: …西班牙最大的石油产品经销商。

meanings.example: So as much possible, you should stock up on your non-perishables NOW.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，你现在就应该尽可能的储存一些不易腐烂的食品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开发；进步；使成长；使显影
meanings.meaning_en: to grow or change into something bigger, stronger, or more advanced, or to make someone or something do this
meanings.example: Knowledge in the field of genetics has been developing very rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 遗传学领域的知识发展非常迅速。

meanings.meaning_en: unhappy because you are alone or do not have anyone to talk to
meanings.example: a lonely old man
meanings.example_cn: 一个孤单的老人

meanings.example: Don’t you get lonely being on your own all day?
meanings.example_cn: 你整天独自一人不感到寂寞吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 相关的；切题的；中肯的；有重大关系的；有意义的，目的明确的
meanings.meaning_en: directly relating to the subject or problem being discussed or considered
meanings.example: Relevant documents were presented in court.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭上出示了相关的文件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要的；重要的；主修的；较多的
meanings.meaning_en: having very serious or worrying results
meanings.example: There is a major problem with parking in London.
meanings.example_cn: 在伦敦，停车是个很大的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: [人类] 成年人；主修科目；陆军少校
meanings.meaning_en: an officer of middle rank in the British or US army or  marine s  ,or in the US air force
meanings.example: The loss of their goalkeeper through injury was a major setback for the team.
meanings.example_cn: 守门员因伤缺阵使该队的实力大打折扣。

meanings.example: He underwent major heart surgery recently.
meanings.example_cn: 他最近做了心脏大手术。

meanings.meaning_en: information or a story that is passed from one person to another and which may or may not be true
meanings.example: His name has come up in the rumour mill as a possible director for the project.
meanings.example_cn: 有谣传说他可能出任这个项目的主管。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中国篮球协会（China Basketball Association）；成本效益分析（Cost-Benefit Analysis）

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or do to suggest something to someone, without telling them directly
meanings.example: There have been hints that he may take up coaching.
meanings.example_cn: 他暗示过可能会出任教练。

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest something in an indirect way, but so that someone can guess your meaning
meanings.example: ‘Look, I can’t tell you.’ ‘Oh, come on, give me a hint .’
meanings.example_cn: “听着，我不能告诉你。”“得了，给我一点暗示吧。”

meanings.meaning_en: a situation that causes difficulties
meanings.example: She was older than me, but that wasn’t really a problem.
meanings.example_cn: 她比我年长，不过那不算什么问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who has been chosen to speak officially for a group, organization, or government
meanings.example: a White House spokesman
meanings.example_cn: 白宫发言人

meanings.meaning_cn: 仪器；工具；乐器；手段；器械
meanings.meaning_en: a small tool used in work such as science or medicine
meanings.example: surgical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 外科(手术)器械

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone if they would like to have something, or to hold something out to them so that they can take it
meanings.example: A number of groups offer their services free of charge.
meanings.example_cn: 一些团体免费提供服务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提议；出价；意图；录取通知书
meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that you are willing to do something for someone or give them something
the way in which you see the information from a computer program on a screen, or how you type information into the program
meanings.example: ...the development of better user interfaces.
meanings.example_cn: …更好用户界面的开发。

meanings.meaning_cn: （使通过界面或接口）接合，连接；[计算机]使联系
meanings.meaning_en: if you interface two parts of a computer system, or if they interface, you connect them
the level of confidence and positive feelings that people have, especially people who work together, who belong to the same team etc
meanings.example: A win is always good for morale.
meanings.example_cn: 胜利总是可以鼓舞士气。

meanings.meaning_en: things such as films, television, performances etc that are intended to amuse or interest people
meanings.example: The town provides a wide choice of entertainment.
meanings.example_cn: 该镇提供各式各样的娱乐活动。

meanings.meaning_en: very great comfort and pleasure, such as you get from expensive food, beautiful houses, cars etc
meanings.example: He was leading a life of luxury in Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他在澳大利亚过着豪华舒适的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: A luxury item is something expensive which is not necessary but which gives you pleasure
meanings.example: The dress is lambswool – pure luxury.
meanings.example_cn: 礼服是用羔羊毛制作的——绝对奢华。

meanings.meaning_cn: 安排，计划；编制目录；将……列入计划表
meanings.meaning_en: to plan that something will happen at a particular time
meanings.example: We will not cancel your holiday less than eight weeks before the scheduled departure date .
meanings.example_cn: 离预定出发日期少于八周，度假行程将不能取消。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan of what someone is going to do and when they are going to do it

meanings.meaning_cn: 焦虑的；担忧的；渴望的；急切的
meanings.meaning_en: worried about something
meanings.example: She gave me an anxious look.
meanings.example_cn: 她焦急地看了我一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: to deal with a problem or improve a bad situation
meanings.example: To remedy the situation, the water must be chemically treated.
meanings.example_cn: 为了改善这种情况，水必须进行化学处理。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of dealing with a problem or making a bad situation better
a product that is bought and sold
meanings.example: agricultural commodities
meanings.example_cn: 农业商品

meanings.example: If I now scroll down to the actual implementation, now does this work or not work?
meanings.example_cn: 如果现在我向下滚动到实际的执行中，这个是可用的还是不可用的呢？

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare and use land for growing crops and plants
meanings.example: The land was too rocky to cultivate.
meanings.example_cn: 这块地石头太多，无法耕作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 温柔的；柔软的；脆弱的；幼稚的；难对付的
meanings.meaning_en: tender food is easy to cut and eat, especially because it has been well cooked
meanings.example: Continue cooking until the meat is tender.
meanings.example_cn: 把肉一直烧到松软为止。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提供，偿还；使…变嫩；使…变柔软

meanings.meaning_en: about or related to science, or using its methods
meanings.example: We believe in investing in scientific research.
meanings.example_cn: 我们相信科学研究的投资价值。

meanings.meaning_en: numbers that relate to something that has actually happened, rather than what was expected to happen
meanings.example: Mobile phone operators had expected monthly usage of up to 250 minutes. Actuals are very different, at 100 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 移动电话运营商原本预期每月用量可达250分钟，但实际数据大相径庭，只有100分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: to become known about or used by more and more people
meanings.example: News of the explosion spread swiftly.
meanings.example_cn: 发生爆炸的消息迅速传播开来。

meanings.meaning_en: when something affects or is known about by more people or involves a larger area
meanings.example: The news spread like wildfire
meanings.example_cn: 消息如野火般迅速传开。

meanings.example: Word spread quickly that she was leaving.
meanings.example_cn: 她要离开的消息迅速传开。

meanings.meaning_cn: 原告；[贸易] 索赔人；提出要求者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who claims something, especially money, from the government, a court etc because they think they have a right to it
meanings.example: benefit claimants
meanings.example_cn: 救济金申请人

meanings.meaning_cn: 使人尴尬的；令人为难的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel ashamed, nervous, or uncomfortable
meanings.example: She asked a lot of embarrassing questions.
meanings.example_cn: 她问了许多令人尴尬的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a change, discovery, or  invention  that brings progress
meanings.example: a major advance
meanings.example_cn: 一项重大进展

meanings.meaning_cn: 提出；预付；使……前进；将……提前
meanings.meaning_en: to move towards someone or something, especially in a slow and determined way – used especially to talk about soldiers
meanings.example: the advances made in the understanding of mental handicap
meanings.example_cn: 在了解智障方面取得的进步

meanings.meaning_en: Advance booking, notice, or warning is done or given before an event happens
meanings.example: They don't normally give any advance notice about which building they're going to inspect.
meanings.example_cn: 他们对要视察哪座大楼通常不作事先通知。

meanings.meaning_cn: [劳经] 加班时间；延长时间；加时赛
meanings.meaning_en: time that you spend working in your job in addition to your normal working hours
meanings.example: six hours’ overtime
meanings.example_cn: 六小时的加班

meanings.example: They’re working overtime to get the job finished.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正在加班赶工。

meanings.example: He’s been doing a lot of overtime recently.
meanings.example_cn: 他近来加班很多。

meanings.example: Many employees work countless hours of unpaid overtime.
meanings.example_cn: 许多员工无偿加班无数个小时。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的；头晕的；虚弱的；[医] 衰弱的
meanings.meaning_en: difficult to see, hear, smell etc
meanings.example: She gave a faint smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她淡淡一笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 昏倒；变得微弱；变得没气力
meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly become unconscious for a short time
meanings.example: a very faint noise
meanings.example_cn: 很微弱的声响

meanings.meaning_en: an act of becoming unconscious
meanings.example: the faint light of dawn
meanings.example_cn: 微弱的晨光

meanings.meaning_cn: 补充，再装满；把…装满；给…添加燃料
meanings.meaning_en: to put new supplies into something, or to fill something again
meanings.example: More vaccines are needed to replenish our stocks.
meanings.example_cn: 还需要更多的疫苗来补充我们的储备。

meanings.meaning_en: a special way of doing something
meanings.example: He’s a great player, with brilliant technique.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个伟大的球员，球技十分精湛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 连续；继位；继承权；[生态] 演替
meanings.meaning_en: happening one after the other without anything diffe-rent happening in between
meanings.example: She won the championship four times in succession.
meanings.example_cn: 她连续四次夺得冠军。

meanings.meaning_cn: 笨拙地抛下；扑通放下；拍（翅）
meanings.meaning_en: to hang or fall loosely, in an uncontrolled way
meanings.example: His head flopped back pathetically.
meanings.example_cn: 他脑袋向后仰着，一副可怜相。

meanings.meaning_en: a film, play, product etc that is not successful
an amount of money that you are given regularly or for a special purpose
meanings.example: Sales staff get a generous mileage allowance or a company car.
meanings.example_cn: 销售人员有优厚的里程补贴或者公司提供的专用汽车。

meanings.example: If you are entitled to sickness allowance, you must claim it from your employer.
meanings.example_cn: 你如果有资格领取疾病津贴，必须向雇主申请索要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 出现；显得；似乎；出庭；登场
meanings.meaning_en: used to say how something seems, especially from what you know about it or from what you can see
meanings.example: Police have found what appear to be human remains.
meanings.example_cn: 警方发现了疑似人体遗骸的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: a place, often in a hospital, where medical treatment is given to people who do not need to stay in the hospital
meanings.example: an appointment at an outpatient clinic
meanings.example_cn: 门诊预约

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done to cure someone who is injured or ill
meanings.example: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 就在最近，凯拉一直对我不理不睬。

meanings.meaning_en: to fail to understand someone or something correctly
meanings.example: Rachel, you must have misunderstood her! Ellie would never say something like that.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔，你一定是误会她了！埃莉绝不会说那样的话。

meanings.meaning_en: to guess about the possible causes or effects of something, without knowing all the facts or details
meanings.example: She refused to speculate.
meanings.example_cn: 她拒绝猜测。

meanings.meaning_cn: 维持；继续；维修；主张；供养
meanings.meaning_en: to make something continue in the same way or at the same standard as before
meanings.example: Careers Officers maintain contact with young people when they have left school.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻人离开学校以后，职业指导员和他们保持联系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲动的；受感情驱使的；任性的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is impulsive does things without considering the possible dangers or problems first
meanings.example: Rosa was impulsive and sometimes regretted things she’d done.
meanings.example_cn: 罗莎性情鲁莽，有时会为做过的事感到后悔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流动，涌流；川流不息；飘扬
meanings.meaning_en: when a liquid, gas, or electricity flows, it moves in a steady continuous stream
meanings.example: Money has been flowing into the country from Western aid agencies.
meanings.example_cn: 资金源源不断地从西方援助机构流入该国。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth steady movement of liquid, gas, or electricity
the process of making or growing things to be sold, especially in large quantities
meanings.example: the new Shakespeare production at the Arts Theatre
meanings.example_cn: 艺术剧院新排演的莎士比亚戏剧

meanings.meaning_en: a measure of how hot or cold a place or thing is
meanings.example: The temperature of the water was just right for swimming.
meanings.example_cn: 这水温游泳正好。

meanings.meaning_en: advice, criticism etc about how successful or useful something is
meanings.example: How can I provide feedback without making someone angry?
meanings.example_cn: 我怎样才能提出反馈意见又不会得罪人呢？

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a statement that makes your main statement seem surprising or unlikely
meanings.example: Although in poor health, she continued to carry out her duties.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管身体不好，她仍继续执行任务。

meanings.meaning_en: to close a business or company and sell the things that belong to it, in order to pay its debts
meanings.example: The stock was sold to liquidate the loan.
meanings.example_cn: 股票被卖出以偿还贷款。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately put or keep something or someone in a place where they cannot easily be seen or found
meanings.example: She keeps a bottle of gin hidden behind a stack of books.
meanings.example_cn: 她在一堆书的后面藏了一瓶杜松子酒。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal’s skin, especially when it has been removed to be used for leather
a professional judgment about how much something is worth
meanings.example: The property has a valuation of $1.6 billion.
meanings.example_cn: 那处房地产估价为16亿美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: 综合的；广泛的；有理解力的
meanings.meaning_en: motor insurance that pays for damage whether it is caused by you or someone else
meanings.example: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products.
meanings.example_cn: 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 综合学校；专业综合测验
呼吁，恳求；上诉；诉诸，求助；有吸引力，迎合爱好；（体育比赛中）诉诸裁判
meanings.meaning_en: to make a serious public request for help, money, information etc
meanings.example: She is not happy with the decision and plans to appeal.
meanings.example_cn: 她不服判决，打算上诉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 呼吁，请求；吸引力，感染力；上诉；诉诸裁判
meanings.meaning_en: an urgent request for something important

meanings.example: He pulled out to overtake the van.
meanings.example_cn: 他把车驶出所在车道想超过那辆小货车。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of sheets of paper fastened together, used for writing notes
meanings.example: Write in your journal, write on you blog, write on your notepad.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以在日记本上、博客上或记事本上写。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave in a dishonest way in order to win or to get an advantage, especially in a competition, game, or examination
meanings.example: He had cheated in the test by using a calculator.
meanings.example_cn: 他在考试时作弊，用了计算器。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is dishonest and cheats
meanings.example: Don’t look at my cards - that’s cheating .
meanings.example_cn: 别看我的牌，那是作弊。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is relatively small, easy etc is fairly small, easy etc compared to other things
meanings.example: The system is relatively easy to use.
meanings.example_cn: 这个系统使用起来相对容易。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提议，建议；启发；使人想起；显示；暗示
meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone your ideas about what they should do, where they should go etc
meanings.example: The zoo asked its visitors to suggest a name for the new baby panda.
meanings.example_cn: 动物园请游客提建议，给刚出生的大熊猫起一个名字。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something for the wrong purpose, or in the wrong way, often with harmful results
meanings.example: Even harmless drugs can be misused.
meanings.example_cn: 即使是无毒副作用的药物也有使用不当的时候。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of something in the wrong way or for the wrong purpose
meanings.example: The term ‘schizophrenia’ is often misused.
meanings.example_cn: “精神分裂症”这个术语经常被误用。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of related parts that work together as a whole for a particular purpose
meanings.example: an alarm system
meanings.example_cn: 警报系统

meanings.meaning_cn: [管理] 积压的工作；积压待办的事务；大木材
meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of work that you need to complete, especially work that should already have been completed
meanings.example: It’s going to take us months to clear the backlog .
meanings.example_cn: 我们得花好几个月才能处理完积压未办的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do because you think it is enjoyable or interesting
meanings.example: Reading was her favourite pastime.
meanings.example_cn: 阅读是她最喜爱的消遣方式。

meanings.meaning_en: the lowest part of something
meanings.example: The drugs had been hidden in a suitcase with a false bottom.
meanings.example_cn: 毒品藏在一个带假底板的行李箱里。

meanings.meaning_en: in the lowest place or position

meanings.meaning_cn: 装底；测量深浅；查明真相

meanings.meaning_en: to publicly support a particular way of doing something
meanings.example: Extremists were openly advocating violence.
meanings.example_cn: 极端主义者公开鼓吹使用暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who publicly supports someone or something

meanings.meaning_cn: 便宜的；小气的；不值钱的
meanings.meaning_en: not at all expensive, or lower in price than you expected
meanings.example: cheap rail fares
meanings.example_cn: 便宜的火车票

meanings.meaning_en: at a low price
meanings.example: the cheapest TV on the market
meanings.example_cn: 市场上最便宜的电视机

meanings.meaning_cn: 指定；详细说明；列举；把…列入说明书
meanings.meaning_en: to state something in an exact and detailed way
meanings.example: Payments will be made for a specified number of months.
meanings.example_cn: 款项将在规定的几个月内支付。

meanings.meaning_en: a date or time by which you have to do or complete something
meanings.example: I’m always working under pressure to meet deadlines (= finish something on time ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我总是在赶工期的压力下工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, system etc, especially one that has existed for a long time
meanings.example: Slavery was abolished in the US in the 19th century.
meanings.example_cn: 美国于19世纪废除了奴隶制。

meanings.meaning_en: to respect and like someone because they have done something that you think is good
meanings.example: I really admire the way she brings up those kids all on her own.
meanings.example_cn: 我十分佩服她独力把那些孩子抚养大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 表现；（机器等）运转；举止端正；（事物）起某种作用
meanings.meaning_en: to do things that are good, bad, sensible etc
meanings.example: She behaved in a very responsible way .
meanings.example_cn: 她表现得很有责任心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 官僚主义；官僚机构；官僚政治
meanings.meaning_en: a complicated official system that is annoying or confusing because it has a lot of rules, processes etc
meanings.example: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy
meanings.example_cn: 消除不必要的官僚体制

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
meanings.example_cn: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

meanings.meaning_en: a competition in which players compete against each other in a series of games until there is one winner
meanings.example: I feel I can win this tournament.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得我能打赢这次锦标赛。

meanings.meaning_en: to push something firmly against a surface
meanings.example: Manville kept his back pressed flat against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 曼维尔后背紧紧地贴在墙上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 压；按；新闻；出版社；[印刷] 印刷机
meanings.meaning_en: to be criticized in the newspapers or on radio or television
meanings.example: She pressed the gas pedal and the car leapt forwards.
meanings.example_cn: 她踩下油门，汽车向前冲了出去。

meanings.meaning_en: a group or class of people, things etc that have similar qualities or features
meanings.example: Most of the victims developed psychological problems of one sort or another (= of various different types ) .
meanings.example_cn: 大多数受害者都出现了这样那样的心理问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or arrange them in groups according to size, type etc
meanings.example: They do burgers, pizzas, that sort of thing .
meanings.example_cn: 他们供应汉堡包、比萨饼什么的。

meanings.meaning_en: to draw attention (to); refer (to)
meanings.example: Advertising slots in soaps are expensive to purchase, but guarantee large numbers of viewers seeing the advert.
meanings.example_cn: 在肥皂剧中插播广告的费用非常昂贵，但能保证大批观众看到广告。

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement

meanings.meaning_cn: 最小值；最低限度；最小化；最小量
meanings.meaning_en: the smallest amount of something or number of things that is possible or necessary
meanings.example: At a minimum, we must recruit two new teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最起码应该招两名新教师。

meanings.meaning_en: the minimum number, degree, or amount of something is the smallest or least that is possible, allowed, or needed
a long narrow passage on a train or between rooms in a building, with doors leading off it
meanings.example: Go down here and the bathroom’s at the end of the corridor.
meanings.example_cn: 沿着这儿走，浴室就在走廊的尽头。

meanings.meaning_cn: 建议；劝告，忠告；通知；警告
meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone what you think they should do, especially when you know more than they do about something
meanings.example: She needed someone to advise her.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要有个人给她出主意。

meanings.meaning_en: an owner of a business
meanings.example: ...the proprietor of a local restaurant.
meanings.example_cn: …一家当地餐馆的业主。

meanings.meaning_en: costing a lot of money
meanings.example: the most expensive restaurant in town
meanings.example_cn: 城里最贵的餐馆

meanings.meaning_en: to organize or be in charge of an activity, business, organization, or country
meanings.example: For a while, she ran a restaurant in Boston.
meanings.example_cn: 有一段时间她在波士顿开餐馆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奔跑；赛跑；趋向；奔跑的路程
meanings.meaning_en: to be very busy and continuously rushing about
meanings.example: Many people don’t care who runs the country.
meanings.example_cn: 很多人不在乎由谁统治国家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 洗衣店，洗衣房；要洗的衣服；洗熨；洗好的衣服
meanings.meaning_en: clothes, sheets etc that need to be washed or have just been washed
meanings.example: She did the laundry (= washed the clothes etc ) and hung it out to dry.
meanings.example_cn: 她洗了衣服，然后挂出去晾干。

meanings.meaning_en: a common hard metal that is used to make steel, is  magnetic  , and is found in very small quantities in food and blood. It is a chemical  element  : symbol Fe
meanings.example: the iron and steel industry
meanings.example_cn: 钢铁工业

meanings.meaning_en: to make clothes smooth using an iron
meanings.example: a driveway with large iron gates
meanings.example_cn: 安装了大铁门的私家车道

meanings.meaning_en: You can use iron to describe the character or behaviour of someone who is very firm in their decisions and actions, or who can control their feelings well
meanings.example: the absorption of iron from food
meanings.example_cn: 对食物中铁的吸收

meanings.meaning_en: complete or total
meanings.example: I have absolute confidence in her.
meanings.example_cn: 我对她充满信心。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is considered to be true or right in all situations
meanings.example: We don’t know with absolute certainty that the project will succeed.
meanings.example_cn: 我们没有绝对的把握这个项目一定会成功。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打，打击；罢工；敲，敲击；抓；打动；穿透
meanings.meaning_en: to hit or fall against the surface of something
meanings.example: She fell heavily, striking her head against the side of the boat.
meanings.example_cn: 她重重地摔倒，头撞在船舷上。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a group of workers deliberately stop working because of a disagreement about pay, working conditions etc
meanings.example: A snowball struck him on the back of the head.
meanings.example_cn: 一个雪球打中他的后脑勺。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冒险；冒险精神；投机活动
meanings.meaning_en: willingness to try new things, take risks etc
meanings.example: Come on – where’s your sense of adventure?
meanings.example_cn: 来吧——你的冒险精神哪里去了？

meanings.meaning_cn: 重大的；有效的；有意义的；值得注意的；意味深长的
meanings.meaning_en: having an important effect or influence, especially on what will happen in the future
meanings.example: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
meanings.example_cn: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

meanings.example: Please inform us if there are any significant changes in your plans.
meanings.example_cn: 你们的计划如有重大变动，请通知我们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生存能力，发育能力；可行性

meanings.meaning_en: an autonomous place or organization is free to govern or control itself
meanings.example: They proudly declared themselves part of a new autonomous province.
meanings.example_cn: 他们自豪地宣布自己是新自治省的一部分。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose a person or thing, for example because they are the best or most suitable
meanings.example: Students have to pick three courses from a list of 15.
meanings.example_cn: 学生必须从15门课中选修3门。

meanings.meaning_en: if you can have your pick or take your pick of different things, you can choose which one you want
meanings.example: I don’t know which colour to pick.
meanings.example_cn: 我不知道要选哪个颜色。

meanings.example: He is not doing this to annoy you.
meanings.example_cn: 他做这件事并非是要惹你烦恼。

meanings.example: I am convinced that some people complain just to annoy me, for something to do, or they simply enjoy complaining.
meanings.example_cn: 我以为身边的人抱怨是为了令我烦恼、是为了解决某些事、又或者他们就是喜欢抱怨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 详细审查；监视；细看；选票复查
meanings.example: Their activities have come under police scrutiny .
meanings.example_cn: 他们的活动受到警方的严密监视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可疑的；暧昧的；无把握的；半信半疑的
meanings.meaning_en: probably not honest, true, right etc
meanings.example: The firm was accused of dubious accounting practices.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司被指控有不诚实的会计行为。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something, especially the correct or usual way
meanings.example: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

meanings.meaning_cn: 敏感的；感觉的；[仪] 灵敏的；感光的；易受伤害的；易受影响的
meanings.meaning_en: easily upset or offended by events or things that people say
meanings.example: a very sensitive child
meanings.example_cn: 一个很敏感的小孩

meanings.meaning_cn: 敏感的人；有灵异能力的人

meanings.meaning_en: a place in a factory, school etc where meals are provided, usually quite cheaply
meanings.example: Rennie had eaten his supper in the canteen.
meanings.example_cn: 伦尼已在食堂吃过晚饭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特权；公民权；经销权；管辖权
meanings.meaning_en: permission given by a company to someone who wants to sell its goods or services
meanings.example: a franchise holder
meanings.example_cn: 特许经营权持有人

meanings.meaning_cn: 给…以特许（或特权）；赋予公民权
meanings.meaning_en: to give or sell a franchise to someone
meanings.example: a franchise agreement
meanings.example_cn: 特许经营协议

meanings.meaning_en: a strong belief in the honesty, goodness etc of someone or something
meanings.example: At first there was a lack of trust between them.
meanings.example_cn: 起初，他们之间缺乏信任。

meanings.meaning_en: to believe that someone is honest or will not do anything bad or wrong
meanings.example: an agreement made on the basis of mutual trust
meanings.example_cn: 在相互信任的基础上达成的一项协议

meanings.meaning_en: a decision that an event that was planned will not happen
meanings.example: Rail passengers are fed up with cancellations and delays.
meanings.example_cn: 火车乘客厌烦取消班次和误点的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有责任的，有义务的；应受罚的；有…倾向的；易…的
meanings.meaning_en: legally responsible for the cost of something
meanings.example: She will grow into a woman particularly liable to depression.
meanings.example_cn: 她将变成一个特别易于消沉的女人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 卡特尔；企业联合；垄断联盟；俘虏交换条约
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or companies who agree to sell something at a particular price in order to prevent competition and increase profits
meanings.example: an illegal drug cartel
meanings.example_cn: 非法贩毒集团

meanings.meaning_en: a place where criminals are kept as part of their punishment, or where people who have been charged with a crime are kept before they are judged in a law court
meanings.example: He’s been in jail for three months already.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经入狱三个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone in jail
to agree unwillingly that something is true or that someone else is right
meanings.example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.
meanings.example_cn: “行了，也许我是有点害怕。”珍妮承认道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中间的，中等的；半生熟的
meanings.meaning_en: of middle size, level, or amount
meanings.example: What size shirt does he wear – small, medium or large?
meanings.example_cn: 他穿多大尺码的衬衫——小号、中号还是大号？

meanings.meaning_en: a way of communicating information and news to people, such as newspapers, television etc
meanings.example: hair of medium length
meanings.example_cn: 中等长短的头发

meanings.meaning_cn: [计] 打印机；印刷工；印花工
meanings.meaning_en: a machine which is connected to a computer and can make a printed record of computer information
meanings.example: a laser printer
meanings.example_cn: 激光打印机

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of work that is given to someone as part of their job
meanings.example: a history assignment
meanings.example_cn: 历史作业

meanings.meaning_cn: 保持；依然；留下；剩余；逗留；残存
meanings.meaning_en: to continue to be in the same state or condition
meanings.example: Please remain seated until all the lights are on.
meanings.example_cn: 请留在座位上，直到灯全都亮起。

meanings.meaning_en: Theremainsof something are the parts of it that are left after most of it has been taken away or destroyed
meanings.example: We remained friends.
meanings.example_cn: 我们依然是朋友。

meanings.example: This happened to a page I admin for a theater group.
meanings.example_cn: 这是发生在一个我所管理的戏剧组的页面上的事。

meanings.meaning_en: information that is clearly arranged in the form of a simple picture, set of figures,  graph  etc, or a piece of paper with this information on it
meanings.example: a chart showing last year’s sales
meanings.example_cn: 显示去年销售情况的一份图表

meanings.meaning_cn: 绘制…的图表；在海图上标出；详细计划；记录；记述；跟踪（进展或发展
meanings.meaning_en: to record information about a situation or set of events over a period of time, in order to see how it changes or develops
meanings.example: a weather chart
meanings.example_cn: 天气图

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem or difficult situation arises, it begins to happen
meanings.example: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
meanings.example_cn: 外交部出现了危机。

meanings.example: More problems like those at the nuclear power plant are certain to arise.
meanings.example_cn: 核电厂肯定还会出现那样的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of getting better at doing something, or getting closer to finishing or achieving something
meanings.example: We made good progress despite the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下雪，我们的行程还是很顺利。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve, develop, or achieve things so that you are then at a more advanced stage

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧急情况；突发事件；非常时刻
meanings.meaning_en: an unexpected and dangerous situation that must be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.
meanings.example_cn: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

meanings.meaning_en: An emergency action is one that is done or arranged quickly and not in the normal way, because an emergency has occurred
meanings.example: (= In case of emergency ), press the alarm button.
meanings.example_cn: 遇到紧急情况，请按报警按钮。

meanings.meaning_en: suggested or understood without being stated directly
meanings.example: ...an implicit warning to the Moroccans not to continue or repeat the military actions they began a week ago.
meanings.example_cn: …叫摩洛哥人不要继续或重复一周前开始的军事行动的含蓄警告。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something, especially something difficult or useful
meanings.example: Surgeons performed an emergency operation.
meanings.example_cn: 外科医生做了一个急诊手术。

meanings.meaning_en: to give information about something to the public, so that they know about it
meanings.example: television’s failure to publicize the unemployment issue
meanings.example_cn: 电视未能报道失业问题

meanings.meaning_en: Procurement is the act of obtaining something such as supplies for an army or other organization
meanings.example: Russia was cutting procurement of new weapons "by about 80 percent," he said.
meanings.example_cn: 他说俄罗斯正“以大约百分之八十的幅度”削减新武器的补给。

meanings.meaning_cn: 寄托，委托；保释；寄托买卖
好奇的，有求知欲的；古怪的；爱挑剔的
meanings.meaning_en: wanting to know about something
meanings.example: Puppies are naturally curious.
meanings.example_cn: 小狗天生好奇。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of plastic or paper containing information about a person or showing, for example, that they belong to a particular organization, club etc
meanings.example: Employees must show their identity cards at the gate.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员在大门口必须出示自己的身份卡。

meanings.example: I haven’t got my membership card yet.
meanings.example_cn: 我还没拿到会员卡。

meanings.meaning_en: natural ability or skill, especially in learning
meanings.example: He drifted into publishing and discovered an aptitude for working with accounts.
meanings.example_cn: 他偶入出版界，发现自己具有管账的天资。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something very firmly, especially because you think you have a right to do this
meanings.example: Angry demonstrators demanded the resignation of two senior officials.
meanings.example_cn: 愤怒的示威者要求两名高级官员辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: the need or desire that people have for particular goods and services
meanings.example: ‘Where are you going?’ she demanded angrily.
meanings.example_cn: “你要去哪里？” 她气愤地质问道。

meanings.meaning_en: an atom which has been given a positive or negative force by adding or taking away an  electron
meanings.example: These vibrations turn the ion into a sort of superfast metronome.
meanings.example_cn: 铝离子因为这些振动成为一种超高速节拍器。

meanings.meaning_cn: （纳税品等的）申报；宣布；公告；申诉书
meanings.meaning_en: an important official statement about a particular situation or plan, or the act of making this statement
meanings.example: a ceasefire declaration
meanings.example_cn: 停火声明

meanings.meaning_en: If a company outsources work or things, it pays workers from outside the company and often outside the country to do the work or supply the things
meanings.example: ...companies that outsource IT functions.
meanings.example_cn: …将信息技术方面的工作外包的公司。

meanings.meaning_cn: 节约，吝惜；饶恕；分出，分让
meanings.meaning_en: If you spare time or another resource for a particular purpose, you make it available for that purpose
meanings.example: She said that she could only spare 35 minutes for our meeting.
meanings.example_cn: 她说她只能抽出35分钟给我们的会议。

meanings.meaning_en: not being used or not needed at the present time
an additional thing, for example a key, that you keep so that it is available

meanings.meaning_cn: 农业；农耕；农业生产；农艺，农学
meanings.meaning_en: the practice or science of farming
meanings.example: More than 75% of the land is used for agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 75%以上的土地用于农耕。

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity of goods that are sent somewhere, especially in order to be sold
disagreement, angry feelings, or unfriendliness between people
meanings.example: Putting oil on both surfaces reduces friction.
meanings.example_cn: 两面都上油可减小摩擦力。

meanings.meaning_en: to work together with a person or group in order to achieve something, especially in science or art
meanings.example: Much later he collaborated with his son Michael on the English translation of a text on food production.
meanings.example_cn: 后来他和儿子迈克尔合作，把一个有关食品生产的文本翻译成英语。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取出；抽出；拔出；抽出物；出身
meanings.meaning_en: the process of removing or obtaining something from something else
if something varies, it changes depending on the situation
meanings.example: Quentin’s mood seems to vary according to the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 昆廷的情绪似乎随天气而变化。

meanings.example: ‘What do you wear when you go out?’ ‘Well, it varies.’
meanings.example_cn: “你出门的时候通常穿什么衣服？”“噢，得看情况。"

meanings.meaning_en: not made properly, or not working properly
meanings.example: The disease is caused by a defective gene.
meanings.example_cn: 这种疾病是由缺陷基因引起的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有缺陷的人；不完全变化词
meanings.example: defective products
meanings.example_cn: 残次品

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is visiting a place for pleasure on holiday
meanings.example: Cambridge is always full of tourists in the summer.
meanings.example_cn: 剑桥在夏季总是挤满了游客。

meanings.example: The Statue of Liberty is a major tourist attraction .
meanings.example_cn: 自由女神像是主要的旅游景点。

meanings.example: What effect will this have on the local tourist industry ?
meanings.example_cn: 这对当地的旅游业会有什么影响？

meanings.meaning_en: a system of tracks along which trains run, or a system of trains
meanings.example: a railway company
meanings.example_cn: 铁路公司

meanings.meaning_en: the inner surface of the top part of a room
meanings.example: rooms with high ceilings
meanings.example_cn: 天花板很高的房间

meanings.meaning_en: to move your hand, or something such as a cloth, backwards and forwards over a surface while pressing firmly
meanings.example: You’ll have to rub harder if you want to get it clean.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你想把它弄干净，就得更使劲地擦。

meanings.meaning_en: A massage can be referred to as a rub
meanings.example: I hurriedly rubbed myself dry.
meanings.example_cn: 我赶紧把自己擦干。

meanings.meaning_en: money in the form of coins or notes rather than cheques,  credit card s  etc
meanings.example: Cash was taken during a burglary of the apartment.
meanings.example_cn: 在一次公寓盗窃案中现金被盗。

meanings.meaning_en: If you cash a cheque, you exchange it at a bank for the amount of money that it is worth
meanings.example: There are similar charges if you want to cash a cheque or withdraw money at a branch other than your own.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你在其他银行兑现支票或支取现金，将会产生差不多的手续费。
