meanings.meaning_en: likely to exist, happen, or be true
meanings.example: The probable cause of the fire was faulty wiring.
meanings.example_cn: 起火的原因很可能是电路故障。

meanings.meaning_cn: 很可能的事；大有希望的候选者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is likely to be chosen for a team, to win a race etc
meanings.example: Success is highly probable .
meanings.example_cn: 成功的希望相当大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 视觉的，视力的；栩栩如生的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to seeing
meanings.example: Artists translate their ideas into visual images.
meanings.example_cn: 画家把自己的思想转换成视觉画面。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that you were not doing before, and continue doing it
meanings.example: There’s so much to do. I don’t know where to start.
meanings.example_cn: 有那么多的事情要做，我都不知道从哪里开始。

meanings.meaning_en: the first part of an activity or event, or the point at which it begins to develop
meanings.example: Have you started your homework?
meanings.example_cn: 你开始做家庭作业了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: teaching or relating to the skills you need to do a particular job
meanings.example: vocational qualifications
meanings.example_cn: 职业资格

meanings.meaning_en: a note at the bottom of the page in a book, which gives more information about something
meanings.example: As a footnote, I should add that there was one point on which his bravado was more than justified.
meanings.example_cn: 作为补充说明，我应该再加一点，他表现得过于逞强。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给…作脚注；在脚注里评议

meanings.meaning_en: something that is given to someone who is successful in a competition, race, game of chance etc
meanings.example: In this month’s competition you could win a prize worth £3,000.
meanings.example_cn: 在本月的竞赛中您可以赢得价值3,000英镑的奖品。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is very important or valuable
meanings.example: The first prize has gone to Dr John Gentle.
meanings.example_cn: 获得一等奖的是约翰·金特尔博士。

meanings.meaning_en: good enough to win a prize or having won a prize
meanings.example: The prizes are awarded (= given ) every year to students who have shown original thinking in their work.
meanings.example_cn: 这些奖项每年颁发给在学习中表现出创造性思维的学生。

meanings.meaning_en: when a factory, school, hospital etc has to close permanently
meanings.example: Several military bases are threatened with closure .
meanings.example_cn: 几处军事基地面临关闭。

meanings.meaning_en: something you decide after considering all the information you have
meanings.example: These are the report’s main conclusions.
meanings.example_cn: 这些就是这篇报告的主要结论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 严格的；绝对的；精确的；详细的
meanings.meaning_en: expecting people to obey rules or to do what you say
meanings.example: a strict teacher
meanings.example_cn: 严格的老师

meanings.meaning_cn: 击倒的；可拆卸的；廉价的
meanings.meaning_en: A knockdown price is much lower than it would be normally
meanings.example: ...the chance to buy it now at a knockdown price.
meanings.example_cn: ...现在以低价购买它的机会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把人打倒的一击；可拆卸的东西；降价
meanings.meaning_en: when a boxer falls down when he is hit
a person, bank, or company that you owe money to
meanings.example: The company said it would pay in full all its creditors except Credit Suisse.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司说将全额付款给除瑞士信贷以外的所有债权人。

meanings.meaning_en: the beliefs, way of life, art, and customs that are shared and accepted by people in a particular society
meanings.example: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

meanings.meaning_en: to grow  bacteria  or cells for medical or scientific use
meanings.example: In our culture, it is rude to ask someone how much they earn.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们的文化里，问别人收入多少是不礼貌的。

meanings.meaning_en: a computer system that allows millions of computer users around the world to exchange information
meanings.example: Do you have access to the Internet?
meanings.example_cn: 你上得了网吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the limits within which amounts, quantities, ages etc vary
meanings.example: a temperature range of 72-85˚
meanings.example_cn: 72 度到85度之间的温度范围

meanings.meaning_cn: （在内）变动；平行，列为一行；延伸；漫游；射程达到
meanings.meaning_en: to move around in an area without aiming for a particular place
meanings.example: Even the cheapest property was out of our price range (= too expensive for us ) .
meanings.example_cn: 即使是最便宜的房子也超出了我们能承受的价格范围。

meanings.meaning_cn: 向后的；反向的；发展迟缓的
meanings.meaning_en: looking or facing in the direction that is behind you
meanings.example: She went without a backward glance.
meanings.example_cn: 她头也不回地走了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you move or look backward, you move or look in the direction that your back is facing
meanings.example: The diver flipped over backward into the water.
meanings.example_cn: 跳水运动员向后翻转跳入水中。

meanings.meaning_en: the meeting together of a group of people for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Police have imposed conditions on public assemblies.
meanings.example_cn: 警方给公共集会设置了条件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 复杂，复杂性；复杂错综的事物
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being complicated
meanings.example: a design of great complexity
meanings.example_cn: 一项非常复杂的设计

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin mark on a piece of paper, the ground, or another surface
meanings.example: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排成一行；划线于；以线条标示；使…起皱纹
meanings.meaning_en: to form rows along the sides of something
meanings.example: Sign your name on the dotted line (= line made up of a series of dots ).
meanings.example_cn: 在虚线上签名。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone to do a particular job, or to be a representative of a group, organization etc
meanings.example: Officials have now been delegated to start work on a draft settlement.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们现已被委派开始准备一份拟定协议。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been elected or chosen to speak, vote, or take decisions for a group
something you do in order to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant from happening
meanings.example: Fire precautions were neglected.
meanings.example_cn: 防火措施被忽视了。

meanings.example: Vets took precautions to prevent the spread of the disease.
meanings.example_cn: 兽医们为防止疾病蔓延采取了预防措施。

meanings.meaning_en: the opinions and feelings that you usually have about something, especially when this is shown in your behaviour
meanings.example: As soon as they found out I was a doctor, their whole attitude changed.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一听说我是医生，态度就完全改变了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉默的；有保留的；谨慎的
meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is reticent does not tell people about things
meanings.example: She is so reticent about her achievements.
meanings.example_cn: 她对于自己的成就如此缄默。

meanings.meaning_en: the conditions that affect a situation, action, event etc
meanings.example: The Soviet Union had been forced by circumstances to sign a pact with Nazi Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 苏联为形势所迫同纳粹德国签订了一项条约。

meanings.meaning_en: a genuine feeling, desire etc is one that you really feel, not one you pretend to feel
meanings.example: ‘Did he really?’ Her surprise seemed genuine.
meanings.example_cn: “他真的这样？”她好像是真的惊讶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回复；重提；返祖遗传；归还
meanings.meaning_en: When people or things revert to a previous state, system, or type of behaviour, they go back to it
meanings.example: Jackson said her boss became increasingly depressed and reverted to smoking heavily.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊说她的老板变得越来越抑郁，又重新大量吸烟了。

meanings.example: Also, keep a separate toiletry case just for traveling that includes travel-sized bottles, and make sure it’s easily accessible when going through airport security.
meanings.example_cn: 同时也准备一些旅行专用化妆品比如便携式的瓶子。 但是要确保能顺利通过机场安检。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of several things of the same type that are put on top of each other
meanings.example: He balanced the plate on the top of a pile of books.
meanings.example_cn: 他把盘子在一摞书上放稳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 矿，矿藏；矿山，矿井；地雷，水雷
meanings.example: They learnt how to lay mines (= put them in place ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们学习了如何布雷。

meanings.meaning_en: to dig large holes in the ground in order to remove coal, gold etc
used by the person speaking or writing to refer to something that belongs to or is connected with himself or herself
an area of a town or the countryside, especially one with particular features
meanings.example: a postal district
meanings.example_cn: 邮政区

meanings.meaning_en: without a job
meanings.example: an unemployed actor
meanings.example_cn: 没戏演的演员

meanings.meaning_cn: 决定；溶解；使…分解；决心要做…
meanings.meaning_en: to find a satisfactory way of dealing with a problem or difficulty
meanings.example: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尼特急需钱来解决他的经济问题。

meanings.meaning_en: strong determination to succeed in doing something
the process of watching something or someone carefully for a period of time
meanings.example: He spent two nights under close observation in hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他在医院接受了两个晚上的严密观察。

meanings.meaning_cn: 猛砍；鞭打；严厉批评；大幅度裁减或削减
meanings.meaning_en: to cut or try to cut something violently with a knife, sword etc
meanings.example: Someone had slashed the tires.
meanings.example_cn: 有人把轮胎割破了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 削减；斜线；猛砍；砍痕；沼泽低地
meanings.meaning_en: a quick movement that you make with a knife, sword etc in order to cut someone or something
one of a set of numbers which give the exact position of a point on a map, computer screen etc
meanings.example: Matching bag and accessories provide a complete ensemble of colour coordinates.
meanings.example_cn: 颜色协调的包和饰品使全套服装的颜色搭配齐全了。

meanings.meaning_en: equal in importance or rank in a sentence
to organize an activity so that the people involved in it work well together and achieve a good result

meanings.meaning_cn: 拖累；拖拉；缓慢而吃力地行进
meanings.meaning_en: to pull something along the ground, often because it is too heavy to carry
meanings.example: He grabbed her arm and dragged her into the room.
meanings.example_cn: 他抓住她的手臂把她拖进房间。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of computers and machines instead of people to do a job
a law or set of laws
meanings.example: This is a very important piece of legislation (= law ).
meanings.example_cn: 这是一条非常重要的法规。

meanings.meaning_en: two weeks
meanings.example: a fortnight’s holiday
meanings.example_cn: 十四天的假期

meanings.meaning_en: ropes and  pulleys (= wheels )  used for lifting heavy things
meanings.example: ...fishing tackle.
meanings.example_cn: …渔具。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to deal with a difficult problem
to say unfair or unpleasant things that hurt someone’s pride, feelings etc
meanings.example: A number of bombs have exploded, seriously injuring at least five people.
meanings.example_cn: 一些炸弹爆炸了，至少5人严重受伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 口头的；言语的；动词的；照字面的
meanings.meaning_en: spoken rather than written
meanings.example: verbal skills
meanings.example_cn: 语言技能

meanings.meaning_en: a word that has been formed from a verb, for example a gerund, infinitive, or participle
to organize or make plans for something such as a meeting, party, or trip
meanings.example: Contact your local branch to arrange an appointment.
meanings.example_cn: 请联络当地分部安排预约。

meanings.meaning_en: to make food, materials, or goods ready to be used or sold, for example by preserving or improving them in some way
meanings.example: Goats’ cheese may be processed in many ways.
meanings.example_cn: 山羊奶干酪可以有多种加工方法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过程，进行；方法，步骤；作用；程序；推移
meanings.meaning_en: a series of actions that are done in order to achieve a particular result
meanings.example: Two million workers are employed processing goods for electronic firms.
meanings.example_cn: 200 万名工人受雇为电子公司加工产品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经过特殊加工（或处理）的
椅子；讲座；（会议的）主席位；大学教授的职位
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture for one person to sit on, which has a back, a seat, and four legs
meanings.example: a kitchen chair
meanings.example_cn: 厨房椅

meanings.meaning_cn: 担任（会议的）主席；使…入座；使就任要职
meanings.meaning_en: to be the  chairperson  of a meeting or committee
meanings.example: They bought a new table and chairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他们买了一套新的桌椅。

meanings.meaning_en: if you assemble a large number of people or things, or if they assemble, they are gathered together in one place, often for a particular purpose
meanings.example: A large crowd had assembled outside the American embassy.
meanings.example_cn: 一大群人聚集在美国大使馆外。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of metal rings which are joined together in a line and used for fastening things, supporting weights, decoration etc
meanings.example: She had a gold chain around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她脖子上戴了条金项链。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten someone or something to something else using a chain, especially in order to prevent them from escaping or being stolen
meanings.example: a length of heavy chain
meanings.example_cn: 一段沉重的链条

meanings.meaning_cn: 比例的，成比例的；相称的，均衡的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is proportional to something else is in the correct or most suitable relationship to it in size, amount, importance etc
meanings.example: The fee charged by the realtor is directly proportional to the price of the property.
meanings.example_cn: 房产代理人收取的费用和房产价格是成正比的。

meanings.example: a proportional increase in costs
meanings.example_cn: 成本的相应提高

meanings.meaning_en: a wound or damage to part of your body caused by an accident or attack
meanings.example: She was taken to hospital with serious head injuries.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受重伤被送到医院。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something because of new information or ideas
meanings.example: The college has revised its plans because of local objections.
meanings.example_cn: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

meanings.example: We have revised our estimates of population growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已修正了对人口增长的估计。

meanings.meaning_cn: 旅行，在……旅游；在……作巡回演出

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells things such as  share s  in companies or foreign money for other people
meanings.example: a real estate broker
meanings.example_cn: 房地产经纪人

meanings.meaning_cn: 作为权力经纪人进行谈判

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in advertising
meanings.example: He was the most brilliant adman that any of us knew.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是我们任何人都知道的最出色的广告人。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that is obtained from doing something or selling something
meanings.example: We sold the business and bought a villa in Spain with the proceeds.
meanings.example_cn: 我们卖了公司，用所得的钱在西班牙买了一幢别墅。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is allowed to use a house, building, land etc for a period of time in return for payment to the owner
meanings.example: A lease is a rental agreement between the lessee and the lessor.
meanings.example_cn: 租赁契约是出租人和承租人之间达成的租用协议。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something, especially something that is difficult to get
meanings.example: It remained very difficult to procure food, fuel, and other daily necessities.
meanings.example_cn: 当时仍然很难获得食品、燃料和其他日用必需品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 属于，应归入；居住；适宜；应被放置
meanings.meaning_en: If something belongs to you, you own it
meanings.example: The house had belonged to her family for three or four generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这座房子属于她家已有三四代了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 交易；事务；办理；会报，学报
meanings.meaning_en: a business deal or action, such as buying or selling something
meanings.example: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
meanings.example_cn: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 离岸的；[海洋] 近海的；吹向海面的
meanings.meaning_en: in or under the sea and not far from the coast
meanings.example: offshore oil fields
meanings.example_cn: 近海油田

meanings.example: an offshore island
meanings.example_cn: 近海岛屿

meanings.meaning_en: If there is a decline in something, it becomes less in quantity, importance, or quality
meanings.example: Official figures show a sharp decline in the number of foreign tourists.
meanings.example_cn: 官方数字显示外国游客数量骤降。

meanings.meaning_en: to say no politely when someone invites you somewhere, offers you something, or wants you to do something
the quality of being brave when you are facing a difficult or dangerous situation or when you are very ill
meanings.example: Sue showed great courage throughout her illness.
meanings.example_cn: 休在生病期间表现出了极大的勇气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 授予专利；取得…的专利权
meanings.meaning_en: to obtain a special document giving you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product
meanings.example: He patented the idea that the atom could be split.
meanings.example_cn: 他得到了原子可以分裂的这个见解的专利。

meanings.meaning_en: protected by a patent
a special document that gives you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product that no one else is allowed to copy
the process of moving goods or people from one place to another
meanings.example: baggage that is lost or damaged in transit
meanings.example_cn: 在运输过程中丢失或损坏的行李

meanings.example: transit by air or sea
meanings.example_cn: 空运或海运

meanings.meaning_cn: 功能；[数] 函数；职责；盛大的集会
meanings.meaning_en: the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
meanings.example: The nervous system regulates our bodily functions (= eating, breathing, going to the toilet etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 神经系统控制着我们身体的功能。

meanings.meaning_en: If a machine or system is functioning, it is working or operating
meanings.example: Bauhaus architects thought that function was more important than form.
meanings.example_cn: 包豪斯学派的建筑师认为功能重于形式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 锚；抛锚停泊；靠山；新闻节目主播
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of heavy metal that is lowered to the bottom of the sea, a lake etc to prevent a ship or boat moving
meanings.example: We dropped anchor a few yards offshore.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在离岸几码远的地方抛锚停航。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something firmly so that it cannot move
meanings.example: The next morning, they weighed anchor (=  lifted the anchor  ) and began to move south again.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天早上他们起锚，又开始向南航行。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重商主义；商人本性；商业主义
meanings.meaning_en: a theory prevalent in Europe during the 17th and 18th centuries asserting that the wealth of a nation depends on its possession of precious metals and therefore that the government of a nation must maximize the foreign trade surplus, and foster national commercial interests, a merchant marine, the establishment of colonies, etc
meanings.example: The need to change the pattern of growth in the world economy should not become an excuse for mercantilism fraudulently to present itself in a superficially more constructive form.
meanings.example_cn: 改变全球经济增长模式的必要性，不应成为重商主义的借口，这种重商主义带有欺骗性，以一种表面上更具建设性的形式出现。

meanings.meaning_en: to regularly travel a long distance to get to work
meanings.example: Baldry’s 20-year prison sentence was commuted to three years.
meanings.example_cn: 鲍德里二十年的刑期被减至三年。

meanings.meaning_en: A commute is the journey that you make when you commute
meanings.example: The average Los Angeles commute is over 60 miles a day.
meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶平均通勤路程每天超过60英里。

meanings.meaning_en: to take control of a country or area next to your own, especially by using force
meanings.example: The Baltic republics were annexed by the Soviet Union in 1940.
meanings.example_cn: 1940年，波罗的海各共和国被苏联吞并。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are remunerated for work that you do, you are paid for it
meanings.example: You will be remunerated and so will your staff.
meanings.example_cn: 你将会得到报酬，你的员工也会。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is collected and kept for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The fund was set up to try to save the cathedral.
meanings.example_cn: 设立基金以挽救大教堂。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide money for an activity, organization, event etc
happening or appearing every year or once a year
meanings.example: Salary levels are reviewed on a yearly basis.
meanings.example_cn: 工资水平每年都要审查。

meanings.meaning_en: Yearly is also an adverb
meanings.example: a total yearly income of $78,000
meanings.example_cn: 7.8万美元的年总收入

meanings.example: Clients normally pay fees in advance, monthly, quarterly, or yearly.
meanings.example_cn: 客户们通常提前付费，或按月，或按季度，或按年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 头；头痛；上端；最前的部分；理解力
meanings.meaning_en: the top part of your body that has your face at the front and is supported by your neck
meanings.example: He kissed the top of her head.
meanings.example_cn: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 前进；用头顶；作为…的首领；站在…的前头；给…加标题
meanings.meaning_en: to go or travel towards a particular place, especially in a deliberate way
meanings.example: Alan fell asleep as soon as he put his head on the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦头一挨枕头就睡着了。

meanings.example: They dived head first into the water.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一头跳进水中。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who offers to pay a particular amount of money for something that is being sold
meanings.example: The antiques will be sold to the highest bidder (=  the person who offers to pay the most  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这些古董将卖给出价最高的人。

meanings.meaning_en: the most important person, or one of the most important people, in a company or organization – used especially in job titles and in news reports
meanings.example: Most health chiefs believe the reforms have gone too far.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数卫生部领导人都觉得改革搞得过火了。

meanings.meaning_en: highest in rank
meanings.example: industry chiefs
meanings.example_cn: 工业界领袖

meanings.meaning_cn: 副本；配对物；极相似的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: Someone's or something's counterpart is another person or thing that has a similar function or position in a different place
meanings.example: As soon as he heard what was afoot, he telephoned his German and Italian counterparts to protest.
meanings.example_cn: 他一听到在进行中的事，马上就给德国和意大利相应人员打电话抗议。

meanings.meaning_en: something important that you succeed in doing by your own efforts
meanings.example: His great achievement is to make all the players into a united team.
meanings.example_cn: 他的伟大成就在于把所有选手组织成一支团结的队伍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下流的；肮脏的；脾气不好的；险恶的
meanings.meaning_en: nasty behaviour or remarks are extremely unkind and unpleasant
meanings.example: a nasty temper
meanings.example_cn: 坏脾气

meanings.example: the nasty things that were being written about her
meanings.example_cn: 人们描述的那些关于她的坏事情

meanings.meaning_cn: 标志；马克；符号；痕迹；分数
meanings.meaning_en: a cut, hole, or other small sign of damage
meanings.example: I can’t get these marks out of my T-shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 我无法把我T恤衫上的这些污迹去掉。

meanings.meaning_en: to write or draw on something, so that someone will notice what you have written
a strong desire to have or do something even though you know you should not
meanings.example: Resist the temptation to buy the item until you’re certain you need it.
meanings.example_cn: 要抵挡住购买的诱惑，除非你确有需要。

meanings.meaning_en: to read through something that is written or printed in order to correct any mistakes in it
meanings.example: I didn't even have the chance to proofread my own report.
meanings.example_cn: 我甚至没有机会校对自己的报告。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something in order to improve it and make it seem more modern
meanings.example: Many older companies are revamping their image.
meanings.example_cn: 很多老牌公司都在更新公司形象。

meanings.meaning_en: Revamp is also a noun
meanings.example: The revamp includes replacing the old navy uniform with a crisp blue and white cotton outfit.
meanings.example_cn: 改进的内容包括将旧海军制服换成清新的蓝白相间的棉套装。

meanings.meaning_en: a room, building, piece of land etc that is adjacent to something is next to it
meanings.example: We stayed in adjacent rooms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住在毗连的房间里。

meanings.meaning_en: the sense which you use to hear sounds
meanings.example: a child with a hearing disability
meanings.example_cn: 有听力障碍的儿童

meanings.meaning_en: to be so big that other things are made to seem very small
meanings.example: The cathedral is dwarfed by the surrounding skyscrapers.
meanings.example_cn: 周围的摩天大楼使得大教堂显得很矮小。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who is a dwarf has not continued to grow to the normal height because of a medical condition. Many people think that this use is offensive.
a dwarf plant or animal is much smaller than the usual size

meanings.meaning_cn: 展示；描述，陈述；介绍；赠送
meanings.meaning_en: an event at which you describe or explain a new product or idea
meanings.example: We will begin a series of presentations to help the public fully understand our system.
meanings.example_cn: 我们将进行一系列的说明，帮助公众充分了解我们的制度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一批；一炉；一次所制之量
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that arrive or are dealt with together
meanings.example: an overnight batch file
meanings.example_cn: 夜间批处理文件

meanings.meaning_en: to group (items) for efficient processing
a situation in which you trust someone not to tell secret or private information to anyone else
meanings.example: The relationship between attorney and client is based on confidentiality.
meanings.example_cn: 律师和委托人之间的关系是建立在保密的基础之上的。

meanings.example: ...a rate which does not overvalue the peso.
meanings.example_cn: ...没有对比索过高估价的一个汇率。

meanings.meaning_en: To overvalue something, often a cost or rate of exchange, means to place its value at too high a level compared with other similar things
an official rule or order
meanings.example: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像条条框框很多。

meanings.meaning_en: used or worn because of official rules
meanings.example: regulations governing the safety of toys
meanings.example_cn: 监控玩具安全的条例

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something that has been officially agreed and chosen by a political party, a business, or another organization
meanings.example: an insurance policy
meanings.example_cn: 保险单

meanings.meaning_en: a simple drawing or plan that shows exactly where something is, what something looks like, or how something works
meanings.example: On our project, we gradually decomposed each of the areas within the context diagram.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们的项目中，我们逐渐地分解环境图中的每个区域。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or represent something in a diagram
all the workers available for a particular kind of work
meanings.example: trained manpower
meanings.example_cn: 经过培训的劳动力

meanings.meaning_cn: 运送者，促进者；传送装置
meanings.meaning_en: a person or thing that forwards

meanings.meaning_cn: 媒体；媒质（medium的复数）；血管中层；浊塞音；中脉
meanings.meaning_en: all the organizations, such as television, radio, and newspapers, that provide news and information for the public, or the people who do this work
meanings.example: The scandal was widely reported in the national media .
meanings.example_cn: 这一丑闻在全国媒体上被广泛报道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 管理；行政；实施；行政机构
meanings.meaning_en: the activities that are involved in managing the work of a company or organization
meanings.example: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

meanings.meaning_en: relaxed and quiet, not angry, nervous, or upset
meanings.example: Glen was calm and composed at the funeral.
meanings.example_cn: 格伦在葬礼上表现得平静而镇定。

meanings.meaning_en: to become quiet and relaxed after you have been angry, excited, nervous, or upset, or to make someone become quiet and relaxed
a situation or time that is quiet and peaceful

meanings.meaning_cn: 包工的；雇来承包规定活计的；做零活的
meanings.meaning_en: working on occasional jobs or by the piece rather than in a regular job
meanings.example: a jobbing gardener

meanings.meaning_cn: 批购（货物）转卖给零售商；做零工（job的ing形式）

meanings.meaning_en: to say or shout something loudly so that someone can hear you
meanings.example: I heard someone calling in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 我听到远处有人在叫。

meanings.meaning_en: when you speak to someone on the telephone
meanings.example: ‘I’m coming!’ she called down the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: “来啦！”她朝楼下喊道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a choice or judgment about something, especially after considering all the possibilities or arguments
meanings.example: Has anything been decided yet?
meanings.example_cn: 已经作出什么决定了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to share the insurance of something between two or more companies, so that there is less risk for each
meanings.example: The Obama tax proposals don't include a plan to limit foreign insurers' ability to reinsure their own policies -- a practice some congressional Democrats allege is done to avoid U.S. taxes.
meanings.example_cn: 奥巴马的税收改革方案中没有限制外国保险商对自身保单进行再保险能力的计划，一些国会民主党议员宣称这种做法是为了在美国避税。

meanings.meaning_cn: 应付的；到期的；可付的；可获利的
meanings.meaning_en: a bill, debt etc that is payable must be paid
meanings.example: The rent is payable in advance .
meanings.example_cn: 租金须预付。

meanings.meaning_cn: 决定性的；最后的；确实的；确定性的
meanings.meaning_en: Conclusive evidence shows that something is certainly true
meanings.example: Her attorneys claim there is no conclusive evidence that any murders took place.
meanings.example_cn: 她的律师们声称没有任何发生过谋杀的确凿证据。

meanings.meaning_cn: 总共的；粗野的；恶劣的；显而易见的
meanings.meaning_en: clearly wrong and unacceptable
meanings.example: He abused the Admiral in the grossest terms.
meanings.example_cn: 他用最粗俗的字眼辱骂那位海军上将。

meanings.meaning_en: to earn £20,000 etc before tax has been taken away
material in the form of thin sheets that is used for writing on, wrapping things etc
meanings.example: I’ll get you a piece of paper so you can write the number down.
meanings.example_cn: 我给你找张纸，你好把号码写下来。

meanings.meaning_en: made of paper
meanings.example: Do you have a pen and paper?
meanings.example_cn: 你有笔和纸吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate the walls of a room by covering them with special paper
a subject or problem that is often discussed or argued about, especially a social or political matter that affects the interests of a lot of people
meanings.example: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.
meanings.example_cn: 堕胎是个很有争议的话题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发行，发布；发给；放出，排出
meanings.meaning_en: if an organization or someone in an official position issues something such as documents or equipment, they give these things to people who need them
meanings.example: We should raise the issue of discrimination with the council.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应提请市政会讨论歧视的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多余的，过剩的；被解雇的，失业的；冗长的，累赘的
meanings.meaning_en: if you are redundant, your employer no longer has a job for you
meanings.example: Seventy factory workers were made redundant in the resulting cuts.
meanings.example_cn: 在继而发生的裁员中，70名工厂工人被解雇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 水槽，水槽；低谷期；饲料槽；低气压
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow open container that holds water or food for animals
meanings.example: a horse trough
meanings.example_cn: 马槽

meanings.meaning_en: to keep a person or animal apart from others for a period of time in case they are carrying a disease
meanings.example: She was sent home and put in quarantine.
meanings.example_cn: 她被送回家实施隔离。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a person or animal is kept apart from others in case they are carrying a disease
continuing for only a limited period of time
meanings.example: temporary pain relief
meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.example: I’m living with my parents, but it’s only temporary.
meanings.example_cn: 我和父母住在一起，但这只是暂时的。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature, especially one that is considered to be good or useful
meanings.example: What attributes should a good manager possess?
meanings.example_cn: 一名优秀的经理应该具备哪些素质？

meanings.meaning_en: If you attribute something to an event or situation, you think that it was caused by that event or situation
meanings.example: Women tend to attribute their success to external causes such as luck.
meanings.example_cn: 女性往往把她们的成功归因于外因，如运气。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where you can buy and eat a meal
meanings.example: He took her out for a five-course dinner in a fancy restaurant.
meanings.example_cn: 他带她到一家豪华餐厅吃了一顿有五道菜的晚餐。

meanings.meaning_en: a box, usually outside a house, where someone’s letters are delivered or collected
meanings.example: The prank crammed his mailbox with computer-delivered electronic junk mail.
meanings.example_cn: 该恶作剧病毒把他的邮箱塞满计算机发送的电子垃圾邮件。

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes problems, or that makes someone or something less likely to be successful or effective
meanings.example: Criminal behaviour can be linked to economic disadvantage.
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪行为可能会与经济困难有关。

meanings.meaning_en: a large thin book with a paper cover that contains news stories, articles, photographs etc, and is sold weekly or monthly
meanings.example: a magazine article
meanings.example_cn: 杂志中的文章

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you try to defeat in a competition, game, fight, or argument
meanings.example: Graf’s opponent in today’s final will be Sukova.
meanings.example_cn: 格拉芙今天的决赛对手将是苏科娃。

meanings.example: He is admired even by his political opponents.
meanings.example_cn: 他甚至受到政敌的钦佩。

meanings.meaning_en: an extra or more detailed piece of information that is added to an official document and changes it slightly
meanings.example: a horse and rider
meanings.example_cn: 马匹和骑师

meanings.meaning_en: an official limit on the number or amount of something that is allowed in a particular period
meanings.example: The government has decided to scrap quotas on car imports.
meanings.example_cn: 政府决定取消汽车进口配额。

meanings.meaning_en: the floor at the top of a set of stairs or between two sets of stairs
meanings.example: the first-floor landing
meanings.example_cn: 一楼的楼梯平台

meanings.meaning_en: relating to something or happening as a result of it, but not as important
meanings.example: There may be collateral benefits to the scheme.
meanings.example_cn: 这项计划可能有附带的益处。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抵押品；[法] 担保品；旁系亲属
meanings.meaning_en: property or other goods that you promise to give someone if you cannot pay back the money they lend you
to repeat exactly what someone else has said or written
meanings.example: He quoted a short passage from the Bible.
meanings.example_cn: 他引用了《圣经》里的一小段。

meanings.meaning_en: a sentence or phrase from a book, speech etc which you repeat in a speech or piece of writing because it is interesting or amusing
meanings.example: A military spokesman was quoted as saying that the border area is now safe.
meanings.example_cn: 报道引述军方一位发言人的话，说边境地区现在很安全。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who directs or controls a group, organization, country etc
meanings.example: the largest ever gathering of world leaders
meanings.example_cn: 全世界领导人史无前例的大聚会

meanings.meaning_en: an action or event that causes difficulty or sadness for someone
meanings.example: Joe resigned, which was a severe blow because we needed him desperately.
meanings.example_cn: 乔辞职了，这是一个巨大的打击，因为我们非常需要他。

meanings.meaning_en: if the wind or a current of air blows, it moves
meanings.example: His mother’s death was a shattering blow .
meanings.example_cn: 他母亲的死是一个沉重的打击。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分钟（minute的复数）；会议记录；备忘录
meanings.meaning_en: A minute is one of the sixty parts that an hour is divided into. People often say "a minute" or "minutes" when they mean a short length of time.
meanings.example: The pizza will then take about twenty minutes to cook.
meanings.example_cn: 接下来，比萨饼大约要用20分钟烤好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把…记录在案；为…测定时间（minute的单三形式）
meanings.example: Bye Mom, see you in a minute.
meanings.example_cn: 再见，妈妈，一会儿见。

meanings.meaning_cn: 检查，核对；制止，抑制；在…上打勾
meanings.meaning_en: to do something in order to find out whether something really is correct, true, or in good condition
meanings.example: Check the tiles carefully before you buy them.
meanings.example_cn: 购买之前要把瓷砖仔细检查一下。

meanings.meaning_en: something that controls something else and stops it from getting worse, continuing to happen etc
meanings.example: A first rule in solving any mystery is to check the facts.
meanings.example_cn: 揭开谜团的第一条规则是核查事实。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring length, equal to 2.54 centimetres. There are 12 inches in a foot.
meanings.example: The curtains were an inch too short.
meanings.example_cn: 窗帘短了一英寸。

meanings.meaning_en: to move very slowly in a particular direction, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Rainfall here is under 15 inches a year.
meanings.example_cn: 本地的年降雨量不到15英寸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 视力；美景；眼力；幻象；想象力；幻视（漫威漫画旗下超级英雄）
meanings.meaning_en: the ability to see
meanings.example: She suffered temporary loss of vision after being struck on the head.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受撞击以后出现暂时性失明。

meanings.example: Tears blurred her vision (= made it difficult for her to see ).
meanings.example_cn: 泪水模糊了她的视线。

meanings.meaning_en: a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
meanings.example: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁没有用多长时间就整理好了手提箱。

meanings.meaning_en: a tense situation is one in which you feel very anxious and worried because of something bad that might happen
meanings.example: Is anything wrong? You look a little tense.
meanings.example_cn: 有什么不对劲吗？你看起来有点紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: If your muscles tense, if you tense, or if you tense your muscles, your muscles become tight and stiff, often because you are anxious or frightened
meanings.example: Newman's stomach muscles tensed.
meanings.example_cn: 纽曼的腹部肌肉绷紧了。

meanings.meaning_en: any of the forms of a verb that show the time, continuance, or completion of an action or state that is expressed by the verb. ‘I am’ is in the present tense, ‘I was’ is past tense, and ‘I will be’ is future tense.

meanings.meaning_cn: 最重要的，主要的；至高无上的
meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else
meanings.example: During a war the interests of the state are paramount, and those of the individual come last.
meanings.example_cn: 战争时期国家利益是首要的，个人利益置于最后。

meanings.example: Women’s role as mothers is of paramount importance to society.
meanings.example_cn: 女性作为母亲的角色对社会至关重要。

meanings.meaning_en: finally, after everything else has been done or considered
meanings.example: Ultimately, the decision rests with the child’s parents.
meanings.example_cn: 最终，决定权在这孩子的父母手中。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the 100-year periods measured from before or after the year of Christ’s birth
meanings.example: the story of life on a small farm at the turn of the century
meanings.example_cn: 讲述世纪初一个小农场生活的故事

meanings.meaning_en: a belief that you have been treated unfairly, or an unfair situation or event that affects and upsets you
meanings.example: anyone who has a legitimate grievance against the company
meanings.example_cn: 凡是有正当理由对公司感到不满的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 添加；[数] 加法；增加物
meanings.meaning_en: the act of adding something to something else
meanings.example: This is a fine book; a worthy addition to the series.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一本好书——是对这套丛书有价值的增补。

meanings.meaning_en: a decimal system is based on the number 10
meanings.example: changing to a decimal system
meanings.example_cn: 改为十进制

meanings.meaning_en: a  fraction (= a number less than 1 )  that is shown as a  full stop  followed by the number of  tenth s  ,  hundredth s  etc. The numbers 0.5, 0.175, and 0.661 are decimals.
meanings.example: calculations accurate to three decimal places
meanings.example_cn: 精确到小数点后三位的计算

meanings.meaning_cn: 印在信纸的信头；印有信头的信纸
meanings.meaning_en: the name and address that is printed at the top of a sheet of writing paper
meanings.example: The letter had been written on university letterhead.
meanings.example_cn: 这封信是用印有大学校名抬头的信纸写的。

meanings.meaning_en: work, especially physical work
meanings.example: The garage charges £30 an hour for labour.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车修理厂收取每小时30英镑的人工费。

meanings.meaning_en: to move slowly and with difficulty
meanings.example: Many women do hard manual labour(= work with their hands ).
meanings.example_cn: 许多妇女从事繁重的体力劳动。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay someone more money than they deserve
meanings.example: Most big companies continue to overpay their top executives.
meanings.example_cn: 多数大公司继续给高管支付过高的薪水。

meanings.meaning_cn: 娱乐；消遣；使发笑；使愉快
meanings.meaning_en: to make time pass in an enjoyable way, so that you do not get bored
meanings.example: Doing jigsaws would amuse Amy for hours on end.
meanings.example_cn: 拼图能让埃米连续玩上几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a system in which people work a particular number of hours each week or month, but can change the times at which they start and finish each day
meanings.example: Staff work at the council to a "flexitime system" which means they take breaks at different times and if they go out to buy a sandwich they clock in and out by swiping their cards .
meanings.example_cn: 该地方议会实行“弹性工作制”，工作人员可以在不同时间段休息。 如果他们出去买三明治，就必须刷卡登记。

meanings.meaning_cn: 演说；从事；忙于；写姓名地址；向…致辞；与…说话；提出；处理
meanings.meaning_en: if you address an envelope, package etc, you write on it the name and address of the person you are sending it to
meanings.example: Send a stamped, self-addressed envelope (=  with your address on it so it can be sent back to you  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 寄上一个贴好邮票的、写有回邮地址的信封。

meanings.meaning_cn: 地址；演讲；致辞；说话的技巧；称呼
meanings.meaning_en: a formal speech that someone makes to a group of people
If you deprive someone of something that they want or need, you take it away from them, or you prevent them from having it
meanings.example: They've been deprived of the fuel necessary to heat their homes.
meanings.example_cn: 他们无法得到住房取暖必需的燃料。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a disease
meanings.example: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
meanings.example_cn: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you are trying to achieve, such as a total, an amount, or a time
meanings.example: There is no target date for completion of the new project.
meanings.example_cn: 这个新的项目何时完工没有预定日期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把……作为目标；规定……的指标；瞄准某物
meanings.meaning_en: to make something have an effect on a particular limited group or area
meanings.example: The government may fail to meet (= achieve ) its target of recycling 25% of domestic waste.
meanings.example_cn: 政府可能达不到回收利用25%的生活垃圾的目标。

meanings.meaning_en: several people or things that are all together in the same place
meanings.example: A group of us are going to London.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有一群人要去伦敦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 专业，专长；特产；特性；招牌菜
meanings.meaning_en: a subject or job that you know a lot about or have a lot of experience of
meanings.example: Johnson’s specialty is medieval European history.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰逊的专业是中世纪欧洲史。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount calculated by adding together several quantities, and then dividing this amount by the total number of quantities
meanings.example: The December figures brought the annual average for 2001 up to 10.6 per cent.
meanings.example_cn: 12月的数据将2001年的年平均水平提升到10.6%。

meanings.meaning_en: the average amount is the amount you get when you add together several quantities and divide this by the total number of quantities

meanings.meaning_cn: 算出…的平均数；将…平均分配；使…平衡
meanings.meaning_en: to usually do something or usually happen a particular number of times, or to usually be a particular size or amount
nothing
meanings.example: The new machine reduced labour costs to almost nil.
meanings.example_cn: 新机器把劳动成本几乎降到零。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach a child at a school, college, or university
meanings.example: The Ormerod School educates handicapped children.
meanings.example_cn: 奥默罗德学校的教育对象为残疾儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: complete, or as great as is possible
meanings.example: a total ban on cigarette advertising
meanings.example_cn: 香烟广告的全面禁止

meanings.meaning_en: to reach a particular total
meanings.example: He looked at her with a total lack of comprehension.
meanings.example_cn: 他一头雾水地望着她。

meanings.meaning_en: the final number or amount of things, people etc when everything has been counted
meanings.example: a sport that demands total commitment
meanings.example_cn: 需要全身心投入的体育运动

meanings.meaning_en: an advantage, improvement, or help that you get from something
meanings.example: I never had the benefit of a university education.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未受过大学教育。

meanings.meaning_en: if you benefit from something, or it benefits you, it gives you an advantage, improves your life, or helps you in some way
meanings.example: The new credit cards will be of great benefit to our customers.
meanings.example_cn: 新信用卡将大大方便我们的客户。

meanings.meaning_cn: 劳动力；工人总数，职工总数
meanings.meaning_en: all the people who work in a particular industry or company, or are available to work in a particular country or area
meanings.example: Women now represent almost 50% of the workforce.
meanings.example_cn: 如今女性几乎占全部劳动人口的 50%。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使多样化，使变化；增加产品种类以扩大
meanings.meaning_en: if a business, company, country etc diversifies, it increases the range of goods or services it produces
meanings.example: We need to diversify the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要使经济多元化。

meanings.meaning_en: if you overturn something, or if it overturns, it turns upside down or falls over on its side
meanings.example: Leslie jumped to her feet, overturning her chair.
meanings.example_cn: 莱斯莉一跃而起，碰倒了椅子。

meanings.example: His car overturned, trapping him inside.
meanings.example_cn: 他的汽车发生侧翻，把他困在了里面。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find someone or something by looking very carefully
meanings.example: It was too dark to search further.
meanings.example_cn: 天太暗，无法继续寻找。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to find someone or something
meanings.example: The area was thoroughly searched .
meanings.example_cn: 这一地区已被彻底搜查过。

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in the amount of money in a country’s  economy  , so that prices fall or stop rising
meanings.example: Deflation is beginning to take hold in the clothing industry.
meanings.example_cn: 服装业开始出现通货紧缩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 未开发的；未使用的；塞子未开的
meanings.meaning_en: an untapped supply, market, or talent is available but has not yet been used
meanings.example: Older people are an untapped resource in the employment market.
meanings.example_cn: 年龄较大的人是就业市场中有待利用的资源。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you give or do in order to help something be successful
meanings.example: a campaign contribution
meanings.example_cn: 竞选捐款

meanings.meaning_cn: 条件太好地；超过合格之最低要求
meanings.example: I’m having trouble finding another job – everyone says I’m overqualified.
meanings.example_cn: 我在找另一份工作，但遇到了困难——每个人都说我资历太高。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are overqualified for a particular job, you have more experience or training than is needed
having the darkest colour, like coal or night
meanings.example: a black evening dress
meanings.example_cn: 黑色晚礼服

meanings.meaning_en: the dark colour of coal or night

meanings.meaning_cn: 使变黑；把鞋油等涂在…上；把（眼眶）打成青肿
meanings.meaning_en: to make something black

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度的，过分的；不适当的；未到期的
meanings.meaning_en: more than is reasonable, suitable, or necessary
meanings.example: De Gaulle felt that America had undue influence in Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 戴高乐感到美国在欧洲影响力过大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 评论员，解说员；实况播音员；时事评论者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who knows a lot about a particular subject, and who writes about it or discusses it on the television or radio
meanings.example: political commentators
meanings.example_cn: 政治评论员

meanings.meaning_en: To refurbish a building or room means to clean it and decorate it and make it more attractive or better equipped
meanings.example: We have spent money on refurbishing the offices.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已在这些办公室的翻新上花了钱。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or area in a building that is under the level of the ground
meanings.example: They bought an old schoolhouse to live in and built a workshop in the basement.
meanings.example_cn: 他们买了座旧校舍居住，还在地下室建了个作坊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 优先的；选择的；特惠的；先取的
meanings.meaning_en: preferential treatment, rates etc are deliberately different in order to give an advantage to particular people
meanings.example: preferential credit terms for reliable borrowers
meanings.example_cn: 向可靠借款人提供的优惠信贷条件

meanings.meaning_en: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
meanings.example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone interested in something, or make them want to take part in something
meanings.example: I’m not usually attracted to blondes.
meanings.example_cn: 我一般不喜欢金发女子。

meanings.meaning_en: a written description of the characters, place, and things that will happen in a film, play etc
meanings.example: The conflict degenerating into civil war is everybody's nightmare scenario.
meanings.example_cn: 这场冲突恶化成内战成为每个人的恶梦。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of getting rid of dangerous waste material in a place that is not safe
meanings.example: The government has promised to stop dumping by the state-owned chemical plants.
meanings.example_cn: 政府已保证停止国营化工厂的倾倒行为。

meanings.meaning_en: If you dump something somewhere, you put it or unload it there quickly and carelessly
meanings.example: We dumped our bags at the nearby Grand Hotel and hurried toward the market.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把包扔在附近的格兰德旅馆，急匆匆地向市场赶去。

meanings.meaning_cn: [心理] 外向性；[医] 外翻
meanings.meaning_en: the directing of one's interest outwards, esp towards social contacts
meanings.example: Two personality traits shine through the complexity of economists’ regression analyses: neuroticism and extroversion.
meanings.example_cn: 经济学家通过复杂的回归分析突出了两种性格：神经质及外向型。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶然性；[安全] 意外事故；可能性；[审计] 意外开支；[离散数学或逻辑学]偶然式
meanings.meaning_en: A contingency is something that might happen in the future
meanings.example: I need to examine all possible contingencies.
meanings.example_cn: 我得查看所有可能发生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being unable to pay your debts
meanings.example: In 1999 it was revealed that he was close to bankruptcy.
meanings.example_cn: 1999年他被披露几近破产。

meanings.meaning_en: a person to whom a warranty is given
meanings.example: To deepen the study of engineering guarantee warrantee, and then to quicken the establishment of it, is very significant to improve China's risk management level.
meanings.example_cn: 加强对工程保证担保的研究，尽快建立工程保证担保制度，这对提高我国建筑企业的风险管理水平有着积极的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: what you think or believe about something
meanings.example: In my view, the country needs a change of government.
meanings.example_cn: 依我看，这个国家需要换个政府。

meanings.meaning_en: to watch a television programme, film etc
to tell someone about something in a way that is clear or easy to understand
meanings.example: He carefully explained the procedure.
meanings.example_cn: 他仔细解释了程序。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正派的；得体的；相当好的
meanings.meaning_en: of a good enough standard or quality

meanings.example_cn: 不错的工资待遇

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable for a particular purpose or in a particular situation

meanings.example_cn: 最适宜生长的条件

meanings.example: This design makes the optimum use of the available space.
meanings.example_cn: 这一设计最大限度地利用了现有的空间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 勒索，敲诈；勒索所得之款
meanings.meaning_en: when someone tries to get money from you or make you do what they want by threatening to tell other people your secrets
meanings.example: She had already tried emotional blackmail (=  tried to make him feel guilty  ) to stop him leaving.
meanings.example_cn: 她试过以情相迫，不让他离开。

meanings.meaning_en: to use blackmail against someone
to fasten or close something by turning it, or to be fastened in this way
meanings.example: "Yes, I know that," Kelly said, screwing the silencer onto the pistol.
meanings.example_cn: “是的，我知道那事。”凯利一边把消音器拧到手枪上一边说道。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin pointed piece of metal that you push and turn in order to fasten pieces of metal or wood together

meanings.example: To compare medical abortion practised at home and in clinics in terms of effectiveness, safety and acceptability.
meanings.example_cn: 旨在比较在家或在诊所进行药物流产的有效性、安全性和可接受性。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you risk as the result of a horse race, card game etc
meanings.example: For a dollar stake, you can win up to $1,000,000.
meanings.example_cn: 押一美元赌注，最多可赢一百万美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: 资助，支持；系…于桩上；把…押下打赌
meanings.meaning_en: to risk losing something that is valuable or important to you on the result of something

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 除法；部门；分配；分割；师（军队）；赛区
meanings.meaning_en: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
meanings.example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife
meanings.example_cn: 夫妻之间传统的分工

meanings.meaning_en: the middle of the day, at or around 12 o’clock

meanings.example_cn: 我们中途在科尔切斯特停留吃了午饭。

meanings.example: the full heat of the midday sun
meanings.example_cn: 正午烈日的酷热

meanings.meaning_en: to be involved in a war against someone, or a fight against something
meanings.example: The government, along with the three factions that had been waging a civil war, signed a peace agreement.
meanings.example_cn: 政府和发动了内战的3方一起签订了1份和平协议。

meanings.meaning_en: money you earn that is paid according to the number of hours, days, or weeks that you work
Slightly means to some degree but not to a very large degree
meanings.example: His family then moved to a slightly larger house.
meanings.example_cn: 他的家后来搬到了一间稍微大一点儿的房子。

meanings.meaning_en: if a room, building etc can accommodate a particular number of people or things, it has enough space for them
meanings.example: He bought a huge house to accommodate his library.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一座大房子来放他的藏书。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone their money back, especially because they are not satisfied with the goods or services they have paid for
meanings.example: I took the radio back, and they refunded my money .
meanings.example_cn: 我把收音机送回去，他们给我退了款。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is given back to you if you are not satisfied with the goods or services that you have paid for
to give something, especially money, to a person or an organization in order to help them
meanings.example: people who volunteer to donate blood
meanings.example_cn: 自愿献血者

meanings.meaning_en: food - used especially when talking about the business of producing or selling food

meanings.example_cn: 基本食品短缺

meanings.meaning_en: land that is always very wet or covered with a layer of water

meanings.example_cn: 我整个晚上都在这条路后面的一个沼泽地旁听蛙鸣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使陷于沼泽；使沉没；使陷入困境

meanings.example_cn: 他们的电子导航装置失灵了，一个巨浪吞没了那只船。

meanings.meaning_en: including every possible detail

meanings.example_cn: 医生给他做了一次全面的体检。

meanings.meaning_en: if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it

meanings.example_cn: 对铜交易的垄断

meanings.meaning_cn: 重新估价；重新评价；使升值

meanings.meaning_en: a board with buttons marked with letters or numbers that are pressed to put information into a computer or other machine

meanings.example_cn: 计算机键盘

meanings.meaning_cn: 键入；用键盘式排字机排字

a loud noise

meanings.example_cn: 这台旧机器以前噪音大得吓人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大使馆；大使馆全体人员
meanings.meaning_en: a group of officials who represent their government in a foreign country, or the building they work in
meanings.example: the American Embassy in Paris
meanings.example_cn: 美国驻巴黎大使馆

meanings.meaning_cn: 恭维；称赞；问候；致意；道贺
meanings.meaning_en: a remark that shows you admire someone or something

meanings.example_cn: 所有客人都对她赞不绝口。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚定的；牢固的；严格的；结实的
meanings.meaning_en: not completely hard, but not soft, and not easy to bend into a different shape

meanings.example_cn: 沙发的坐垫很硬。

meanings.meaning_en: to make or become firm

meanings.example_cn: 硬的青苹果

meanings.example: Most doctors recommend sleeping on a firm mattress.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数医生建议睡硬床垫。

meanings.meaning_en: a business or company, especially a small one
being part of the traditions of a country or group of people

meanings.example_cn: 传统的意大利烹饪

meanings.meaning_cn: 活的；现存的；活跃的；逼真的

meanings.example_cn: 他是仍然健在的最伟大的作曲家之一。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that you earn money or the money that you earn

meanings.example_cn: 太阳与一切生物息息相关。

meanings.example: a living language
meanings.example_cn: 活语言，仍在使用的语言

meanings.meaning_en: support or help, especially with money

meanings.example_cn: 她飞到纽约设法为这个计划募集一些资助。

meanings.meaning_en: uncontrolled flames, light, and heat that destroy and damage things

meanings.example_cn: 仓库全给烧毁了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 点燃；解雇；开除；使发光；烧制；激动；放枪

meanings.example_cn: 30人死于芝加哥市中心的一场火灾。

meanings.example_cn: 小林先生被选中代表公司出席会议。

meanings.meaning_cn: [经] 反垄断的；[经] 反托拉斯的
meanings.meaning_en: intended to prevent companies from unfairly controlling prices

meanings.example_cn: 更严厉的新反垄断法

meanings.meaning_en: altruistic behaviour shows that you care about and will help other people, even though this brings no advantage for yourself

meanings.example_cn: 他的动机是完全无私的吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 历史，历史学；历史记录；来历

meanings.example_cn: 从古至今，妇女的成就都被大大地忽视了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可估价的；可评价的；可征收的；可征税的

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or coming from a province

meanings.example_cn: 省级选举

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗野的人；乡下人；外地人

meanings.example_cn: 魁北克省政府

meanings.example: She improved visibly from day to day, until Martin wondered if he was doing right, for he knew that all her compliance and endeavor was for his sake.
meanings.example_cn: 她一天比一天进步了，直到马丁怀疑起自己的做法是否得体。 因为他明白她的这一切迁就和努力都是为了他。

meanings.example: The energy, the faith, the devotion which we bring to this endeavor will light our country and all who serve it -- and the glow from that fire can truly light the world.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在这场努力中所献出的精力、信念与虔诚、将照亮我们的国家以及所有为国家服务的人，而从这一火焰所聚出的光辉必能照明全世界。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is secretly added to food or drink, making it less pure
meanings.example: METHODS 4 species of Sanguisorbae and a adulterant were analysed by molecule biological technique random amplified polymorphic DNA(RAPD)and HPLC fingerprinting technique respectively.
meanings.example_cn: 方法采用分子生物学技术随机扩增多态性DNA（RAPD）技术和HPLC技术对地榆属的4个品种及其混淆品进行分析。

meanings.meaning_en: adulterating
having a lot of money, possessions etc

meanings.example_cn: 世界上的富国

meanings.meaning_en: The wealthy are people who are wealthy
meanings.example: The best education should not be available only to the wealthy.
meanings.example_cn: 不应该只有富人才能得到最好的教育。

meanings.meaning_en: to fill something with air or gas so it becomes larger, or to become filled with air or gas

meanings.example_cn: 我们用了半小时给橡皮筏充好气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 律师；（加拿大）出庭律师（等于arrister-at-law）；（英）（有资格出席高等法庭并辩护的）专门律师
meanings.meaning_en: a lawyer in Britain who can argue cases in the higher law courts
to think of a new idea, plan etc and develop it in your mind

meanings.example_cn: 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有义务的；必定的；受约束的；装有封面的

meanings.example_cn: 法律上你有责任报告这起事故。

meanings.meaning_en: a long or high jump made with a lot of energy
a long talk on a particular subject that someone gives to a group of people, especially to students in a university
meanings.example: ...a series of lectures by Professor Eric Robinson.
meanings.example_cn: …埃里克·鲁滨逊教授的系列讲座。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk to a group of people on a particular subject, especially to students in a university

meanings.meaning_cn: 相当大的；重要的，值得考虑的
meanings.meaning_en: fairly large, especially large enough to have an effect or be important
meanings.example: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不可能的；不可能存在的；难以忍受的；不真实的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is impossible cannot happen or be done

meanings.example_cn: “我想和弗兰克斯先生谈谈。”“恐怕不行。”

meanings.meaning_en: something that cannot be done

meanings.example_cn: 这些事情不可能准确无误。

meanings.meaning_en: a photographic copy, especially of something printed, written, or drawn

meanings.example_cn: 我寄给他的是原件，不是复印件。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a photographic copy of something
a large notice or advertisement on a piece of card, which is put up or carried in a public place

meanings.example_cn: 印有“欢迎来到德比维尔”的巨幅标语牌

meanings.meaning_cn: 张贴，悬挂；公布；张贴公告于
轻微的，少量的；脆弱的；细长的；不重要的
meanings.meaning_en: small in degree

meanings.example_cn: 些许的改进

meanings.meaning_en: to offend someone by treating them rudely or without respect

meanings.example_cn: 少许的增加

meanings.example: a slight change of plan
meanings.example_cn: 计划的略微变动

meanings.meaning_cn: 投票；民意测验；投票数；投票所
meanings.meaning_en: the process of finding out what people think about something by asking many people the same question, or the record of the result
meanings.example: A recent poll found that 80% of Californians support the governor.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的一项民意调查发现80%的加利福尼亚人支持州长。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask a lot of people the same questions in order to find out what they think about a subject

meanings.meaning_cn: 无角的；剪过毛的；修过枝的
meanings.example: Labour is ahead in the polls.
meanings.example_cn: 工党在民意调查中处于领先地位。

meanings.meaning_en: a long stick or post usually made of wood or metal, often set upright in the ground to support something
meanings.example: a telephone pole
meanings.example_cn: 电话线杆

meanings.meaning_en: to push a boat along in the water using a pole

meanings.meaning_cn: 翻覆；[贸易] 营业额；流通量；半圆卷饼；失误
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of business done during a particular period
meanings.example: The company had a turnover of $3.8 million.
meanings.example_cn: 那个公司拥有380万美元的营业额。

meanings.example: Requirements volatility stems largely from the rapid pace at which underlying system technologies change; this leads to early obsolescence of designs and components that might otherwise be reusable.
meanings.example_cn: 在底层系统技术以快速的步伐发生变化时，需求变动性就会大量地滋生；这会导致设计和组件的提早退化，否则它们是可重用的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集思广益；头脑风暴；灵机一动
meanings.example: While some of the greatest ideas and solutions come up in brainstorm meetings, we also lose most of our time in discussion without action.
meanings.example_cn: 当在头脑风暴的会议上有一些顶级的主意或者解决方法提出时，我们也浪费了很多时间在没有行动的讨论上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集体讨论；集思广益以寻找

meanings.meaning_en: Oval things have a shape that is like a circle but is wider in one direction than the other
meanings.example: ...the small oval framed picture of a little boy.
meanings.example_cn: …一个小男孩的镶在椭圆形框架里的小幅照片。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape like a circle, but wider in one direction than the other
a small specially shaped piece of metal that you put into a lock and turn in order to lock or unlock a door, start a car etc
meanings.example: A bunch of keys hung from his belt.
meanings.example_cn: 他的皮带上挂着一串钥匙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 键入；锁上；调节…的音调；提供线索

meanings.meaning_en: very important or necessary

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度充电；超载；装药过多
meanings.example: They were being overcharged for cheap beer.
meanings.example_cn: 他们买的是便宜的啤酒，却被收取了高价。

meanings.meaning_cn: 对……索价过高；使……过度充电
meanings.meaning_en: to charge someone too much money for something
very keen and excited about something that is going to happen or about something you want to do
meanings.example: He’s a bright kid and eager to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个聪明的孩子，热爱学习。

meanings.example: She’s a very hard worker and very eager to please.
meanings.example_cn: 她工作很卖力，而且很希望别人满意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 道歉；谢罪；辩护；勉强的替代物
meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or write to show that you are sorry for doing something wrong
meanings.example: Edward can’t be here today, but he sends his apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 爱德华今天来不了，他向大家表示歉意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 代理人，代理商；药剂；特工
meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that represents another person or company, especially in business
meanings.example: Our agent in Rio deals with all our Brazilian business.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在里约热内卢的业务代表处理我们在巴西的全部业务。

meanings.meaning_en: agreed in a contract
meanings.example: Tutors have a contractual obligation to research and publish.
meanings.example_cn: 大学导师按合同规定必须从事研究工作并发表作品。

meanings.meaning_en: a difficult or unpleasant situation in which you do not know what to do, or in which you have to make a difficult choice

meanings.example_cn: 该国的经济困境

meanings.meaning_en: the position of being a director of a company or organization
meanings.example: Barry resigned his directorship in December 1973.
meanings.example_cn: 巴里于1973年12月辞去了董事一职。

meanings.example: disjointed fragments of information
meanings.example_cn: 杂乱的信息片段

meanings.meaning_cn: 测量；[计量] 度量；尺寸；量度制

meanings.example_cn: 体温的精确测量

meanings.meaning_cn: 销售；出售；拍卖；销售额；廉价出售
meanings.meaning_en: when you sell something
meanings.example: Harvey gets a $50 commission every time he makes a sale (= sells something as part of his job ) .
meanings.example_cn: 哈维每做成一笔生意可得到50美元的佣金。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行政的；经营的；执行的，经营管理的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the job of managing a business or organization and making decisions
meanings.example: a commission with executive powers
meanings.example_cn: 有执行权的委员会

meanings.meaning_cn: 总经理；执行委员会；执行者；经理主管人员
meanings.meaning_en: a manager in an organization or company who helps make important decisions
a medical condition that makes you cough a lot
meanings.example: He’s got a bad cough.
meanings.example_cn: 他咳嗽得很厉害。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly push air out of your throat with a short sound, often repeatedly
meanings.example: Symptoms include a sore throat and dry cough.
meanings.example_cn: 症状是喉咙痛和干咳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灵巧的；整洁的；优雅的；齐整的；未搀水的；平滑的
meanings.meaning_en: tidy and carefully arranged
meanings.example: neat handwriting
meanings.example_cn: 工整的笔迹

meanings.meaning_en: willing to consider new ideas or listen to someone else’s opinions
meanings.example: You might find them in a more receptive mood tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 也许他们明天会更乐于接受意见。

meanings.meaning_en: next to and touching an upright surface, especially for support
meanings.example: There was a ladder propped up against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 有一把梯子靠在墙边。

meanings.example: The younger policeman was leaning against the bureau with his arms folded.
meanings.example_cn: 那位较年轻的警官两臂交叉，倚靠在办公桌旁。

meanings.meaning_en: a specific fact, idea, person, or thing that is used to explain or support a general idea, or to show what is typical of a larger group

meanings.example_cn: 父母应该为孩子树立榜样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 作为…的例子；为…做出榜样

meanings.example: This kind of personnel 'spillover, ' far more than sharing individual technologies, has been key to thriving innovation ecosystems like Silicon Valley.
meanings.example_cn: 这类人员“溢出”是推动硅谷这样的创新之地发展的关键，甚至比分享具体的技术重要得多。

meanings.meaning_en: bread or cake that is stale is no longer fresh or good to eat
meanings.example: French bread goes stale (= becomes stale ) very quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 法式面包极易变味。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变陈旧；撒尿；变得不新鲜
meanings.example: stale cake
meanings.example_cn: 不新鲜的蛋糕

meanings.meaning_cn: 飞行员；快车；飞行物；（美）广告传单

meanings.meaning_en: if something terminates, or if you terminate it, it ends
meanings.example: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

meanings.example: a woman’s decision on whether or not to terminate the pregnancy
meanings.example_cn: 女子关于是否终止妊娠的决定

meanings.meaning_en: to tell the public about a product or service in order to persuade them to buy it
meanings.example: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

meanings.meaning_en: to become less strong or decrease

meanings.example_cn: 我们等风暴减弱。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the groups of people who work together in a particular part of a large organization such as a hospital, university, company, or government

meanings.example_cn: 人事部

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion that everyone in a group agrees with or accepts
meanings.example: The EU Council of Finance Ministers failed to reach a consensus on the pace of integration.
meanings.example_cn: 欧盟财政部长会议未能就一体化的进度达成共识。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, company, or organization that employs people
meanings.example: The shoe factory is the largest employer in this area.
meanings.example_cn: 这家制鞋厂是本地区最大的雇主。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something more noticeable
meanings.example: The photograph seemed to accentuate his large nose.
meanings.example_cn: 照片似乎突出了他的大鼻子。

meanings.meaning_en: when a  jury  in a law court retires, they go away to consider whether someone is guilty or not
meanings.example: At the age when most people retire, he is ready to face a new career.
meanings.example_cn: 在大多数人退休的年纪，他准备要面对一项新事业。

meanings.meaning_en: something you buy, or the act of buying it
meanings.example: She paid for her purchases and left.
meanings.example_cn: 她付钱买好东西离开了。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy something
meanings.example: I enclose my receipt as proof of purchase .
meanings.example_cn: 我附上小票作为购物凭证。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无形的，触摸不到的；难以理解的
meanings.meaning_en: an intangible quality or feeling is difficult to describe exactly
meanings.example: The island has an intangible quality of holiness.
meanings.example_cn: 该岛屿有一种难以形容的神圣感。

meanings.meaning_en: never having happened before, or never having happened so much
meanings.example: He took the unprecedented step of stating that the rumours were false.
meanings.example_cn: 他史无前例地声明那些谣言实属子虚乌有。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同化；吸收；[生化] 同化作用
meanings.meaning_en: the process of understanding and using new ideas
to improve something
meanings.example: Good lighting will enhance any room.
meanings.example_cn: 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

meanings.meaning_en: a group such as a club or business that has formed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The public expect high standards from any large organization.
meanings.example_cn: 公众对任何大型机构都期望很高。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular part of a country, town etc
meanings.example: Only cheeses made in this area may be labelled ‘Roquefort.’
meanings.example_cn: 只有这个地区出产的干酪才能被称作“罗克福尔干酪”。

meanings.meaning_en: to take a claim or complaint against someone to a court of law
meanings.example: ...the cost of litigating personal injury claims in the county court.
meanings.example_cn: ...在县级法院的人身伤害赔偿诉讼费用。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way of doing, designing, or producing something, especially one that is typical of a particular place, period of time, or group of people

meanings.example_cn: 将日本的管理方式用于欧洲企业的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: to design clothing, furniture, or the shape of someone’s hair in a particular way
the movement of blood around your body

meanings.example_cn: 运动能促进血液循环。

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge or skill that you gain from doing a job or activity, or the process of doing this

meanings.example_cn: 小册子中的建议反映了我们所获得的实践经验。

meanings.example_cn: 我有一些时装设计方面的经验。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of training someone so that they learn to control their behaviour and obey rules
meanings.example: The book gives parents advice on discipline.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书指导父母如何管教孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach someone to obey rules and control their behaviour
meanings.example: serious discipline problems in the police force
meanings.example_cn: 警察队伍内严重的纪律问题

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is paid to work for someone else

meanings.example_cn: 政府雇员

meanings.meaning_cn: 息票；赠券；联票；[经] 配给券
meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of printed paper that gives you the right to pay less for something or get something free
meanings.example: The coupon entitles you to ten cents off your next purchase.
meanings.example_cn: 这张优惠券可以让你在下次购物时节省10分钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大学的；学院的；大学生的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to college or a college

meanings.example_cn: 大学体育运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 文化适应；文化移入；文化互渗（不同文化在频繁交流中的互相影响）

meanings.example_cn: 文化冲突与文化融合是文化适应过程中两个最为重要的环节。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of sending and receiving letters
meanings.example: The magazine is unable to enter into any correspondence on medical matters.
meanings.example_cn: 本杂志无法答复有关医学方面的来信。

meanings.meaning_en: people in general, considered in relation to the laws, organizations etc that make it possible for them to live together
meanings.example: technology and its effects on modern society
meanings.example_cn: 科技及其对现代社会的影响

meanings.meaning_en: to strengthen the position of power or success that you have, so that it becomes more effective or continues for longer
meanings.example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

meanings.meaning_en: in the direction that is behind you

meanings.example_cn: 汉娜往后退了一步。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially examine a company’s financial records in order to check that they are correct
meanings.example: Each year they audit our accounts and certify them as being true and fair.
meanings.example_cn: 每年他们都会审核我们的账目，以证明其准确合理。

meanings.meaning_en: an official examination of a company’s financial records in order to check that they are correct
when something is officially stopped for a period of time
meanings.example: He received a six-month suspension for unprofessional behaviour.
meanings.example_cn: 他因有违职业道德的行为被停职六个月。

meanings.meaning_cn: 能干的，能胜任的；有才华的

meanings.example_cn: 一个坚强能干的女人

meanings.meaning_en: the main building or offices used by a large company or organization
meanings.example: the headquarters of the United Nations
meanings.example_cn: 联合国总部

meanings.example: In many countries you have to haggle before you buy anything.
meanings.example_cn: 在许多国家里买东西之前都得讨价还价。

meanings.example: Israel cannot "haggle its way out of" commitments, Erekat added in a statement. A settlement freeze was an Israeli obligation, he said, not a Palestinian precondition.
meanings.example_cn: 艾拉卡特在声明中说，以色列不能“讨价还价，逃避承诺”；冻结定居点扩建是以色列的义务，而非巴勒斯坦提出的前提条件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 方面;[数] 维；尺寸；次元；容积 vt标出尺寸
meanings.meaning_en: a part of a situation or a quality involved in it
meanings.example: You can have a spiritual dimension to your life without being religious.
meanings.example_cn: 即使你不信宗教，也可以在生命中拥有精神层面的内容。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make something become smaller or less
