meanings.example_cn: 在我听来，这很无聊。

meanings.meaning_en: to discuss something in order to reach an agreement, especially in business or politics
meanings.example: His first aim is to get the warring parties back to the negotiating table (= discussing something ).
meanings.example_cn: 他的首要目标就是把交战各方拉回到谈判桌上。

meanings.meaning_cn: [经] 滞胀，不景气状况下之物价上涨
meanings.meaning_en: If an economy is suffering from stagflation, inflation is high but there is no increase in the demand for goods or in the number of people who have jobs
meanings.example: Many of the industrialized economies would be pushed into a cycle of stagflation.
meanings.example_cn: 许多工业化经济将被推入到一个滞胀的循环中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不经济的；浪费的；不节俭的
meanings.meaning_en: using too much effort, money, or materials to make a profit
meanings.example: Old vehicles are often uneconomical.
meanings.example_cn: 旧车往往很费钱。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of getting better after an illness, injury etc
meanings.example: Hopes of economic recovery are fading.
meanings.example_cn: 经济复苏的希望越来越渺茫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多样；种类；杂耍；变化，多样化
meanings.meaning_en: the differences within a group, set of actions etc that make it interesting
meanings.example: I really like the variety the store has to offer.
meanings.example_cn: 我很喜欢这家商店商品的丰富多样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 棱纹平布；雷普（物体伦琴当量）
meanings.meaning_en: a silk, wool, rayon, or cotton fabric with a transversely corded surface

meanings.example: Amand：And can yon give me CIF price for Mexico also?
meanings.example_cn: 阿曼达：那么您能同时给我们报墨西哥到岸价吗?

meanings.meaning_en: a book made of plain paper on which you can write notes
meanings.example: He brought out a notebook and pen from his pocket.
meanings.example_cn: 他从口袋里掏出了一个笔记本和一支钢笔。

meanings.meaning_en: to report something in a way that is not completely true or correct
meanings.example: His account was badly distorted by the press.
meanings.example_cn: 他的话被报界严重歪曲。

meanings.meaning_en: an official or public list
the official system for providing something, especially something that everyone in a country needs to have, or the official organization that provides it
meanings.example: the health service
meanings.example_cn: 医疗保健服务

meanings.meaning_cn: 服务性的；耐用的；服现役的
meanings.example: the postal service
meanings.example_cn: 邮政服务

meanings.meaning_en: if someone services a machine or vehicle, they examine it and do what is needed to keep it working well
meanings.example: the police service
meanings.example_cn: 警察部门

meanings.meaning_cn: [电子] 电路，回路；巡回；一圈；环道
meanings.meaning_en: a path that forms a circle around an area, or a journey along this path
meanings.example: We did a circuit of the old city.
meanings.example_cn: 我们绕着老城走了一圈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无比的；无双的；空前未有的
meanings.meaning_en: bigger, better, or worse than anything else
meanings.example: an achievement unparalleled in sporting history
meanings.example_cn: 体育史上空前的成就

meanings.meaning_cn: [生理] 阈下的；潜在意识的；微小得难以察觉的
meanings.meaning_en: affecting your mind in a way that you are not conscious of
meanings.example: a subliminal message
meanings.example_cn: 潜在的含义

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone not to do something
meanings.example: Doctors had tried to dissuade patients from smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 医生曾试图说服病人不要抽烟。

meanings.meaning_en: If something or someone claims your attention, they need you to spend your time and effort on them
meanings.example: There is already a long list of people claiming her attention.
meanings.example_cn: 已经有太多人需要她的关注了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 要求；声称；索赔；断言；值得
meanings.meaning_en: a statement that something is true, even though it has not been proved
the time when crops are gathered from the fields, or the act of gathering them
meanings.example: The company is now reaping the harvest of careful planning.
meanings.example_cn: 公司现在尝到了精心规划带来的甜头。

meanings.meaning_en: to gather crops from the fields

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧的；密封的；绷紧的；麻烦的；严厉的；没空的；吝啬的
meanings.meaning_en: tight clothes fit your body very closely, especially in a way that is uncomfortable
meanings.example: tight jeans
meanings.example_cn: 紧身牛仔裤

meanings.meaning_en: very firmly or closely
meanings.example: My shoes were so tight that I could hardly walk.
meanings.example_cn: 鞋子很紧，我几乎不能走路。

meanings.example: The jacket is rather a tight fit (= it fits too tightly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这件夹克衫太紧了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 张力，拉力；紧张，不安；电压
meanings.meaning_en: tightness or stiffness in a wire, rope, muscle etc
meanings.example: Tension in the neck muscles can cause headaches.
meanings.example_cn: 颈部肌肉紧张会导致头痛。

meanings.example: Muscle tension can be a sign of stress.
meanings.example_cn: 肌肉紧张可能是压力大的迹象。

meanings.meaning_en: blind flying is when you use only instruments to fly an aircraft because you cannot see through cloud, mist etc
meanings.example: David's good looks and impeccable manners had always made her blind to his faults.
meanings.example_cn: 大卫俊朗的外表和完美的风度总是令她对他的缺点视而不见。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone to see for a short time
a trick or excuse to stop someone from discovering the truth
to make someone lose their good sense or judgment and be unable to see the truth about something

meanings.meaning_cn: 简短的，简洁的；短暂的，草率的
meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a short time
meanings.example: We stopped by Alice’s house for a brief visit.
meanings.example_cn: 我们顺路在艾丽斯家小坐片刻。

meanings.meaning_en: a short spoken or written statement giving facts about a law case
meanings.example: Let’s keep this conversation brief; I have a plane to catch.
meanings.example_cn: 我们长话短说吧，我还要赶飞机。

meanings.meaning_cn: 总帐，分户总帐；[会计] 分类帐；帐簿；底帐；（手脚架上的）横木
meanings.meaning_en: a book in which a business, bank etc records how much money it receives and spends
when something is lost or destroyed, especially in a way that is not useful or reasonable, or the amount that is lost or destroyed
meanings.example: The system used to result in a great deal of food wastage.
meanings.example_cn: 这种做法过去造成了大量的食物浪费。

meanings.meaning_cn: 季度的，按季度的；一年四次的
meanings.meaning_en: produced or happening four times a year
meanings.example: We publish a quarterly journal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出版一份季刊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按季度，[农] 一季一次地；纵横四分地
meanings.meaning_en: Quarterly is also an adverb
meanings.example: The rent is payable quarterly.
meanings.example_cn: 房租按季度支付。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine that is produced four times a year
meanings.example: It makes no difference whether dividends are paid quarterly or annually.
meanings.example_cn: 红利是按季度还是按年度支付没有区别。

meanings.meaning_cn: 浪费；废物；荒地；损耗；地面风化物
meanings.meaning_en: when something such as money or skills are not used in a way that is effective, useful, or sensible
meanings.example: excessive waste in state spending
meanings.example_cn: 政府支出方面的过度浪费

meanings.meaning_en: to use more money, time, energy etc than is useful or sensible
waste materials, substances etc are unwanted because the good part of them has been removed
A showpiece is something that is admired because it is the best thing of its type, especially something that is intended to be impressive
meanings.example: The factory was to be a showpiece of Western investment in the East.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂将成为西方在东方投资的样板。

meanings.meaning_cn: 接受；承认；承担；承兑；容纳
meanings.meaning_en: to take something that someone offers you, or to agree to do something that someone asks you to do
meanings.example: Rick accepted her offer of coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of papers containing detailed, usually secret information about a person or subject
meanings.example: The company is compiling a dossier of evidence to back its allegations.
meanings.example_cn: 公司正在搜集证明材料来支持自己的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: the first form that a new design of a car, machine etc has, or a model of it used to test the design before it is produced
the way in which shops and businesses try to sell their products
meanings.example: the director of merchandising
meanings.example_cn: 销售总监

meanings.example: The image below is an example of showing an image and some text simultaneously.
meanings.example_cn: 下面的图像是同时显示图像和一些文本的示例。

meanings.meaning_en: to include or deal with a particular subject or group of things
meanings.example: a course covering business law
meanings.example_cn: 一门包括商业法的课程

meanings.meaning_cn: 封面，封皮；盖子；掩蔽物;幌子，借口
meanings.meaning_en: the outer front or back part of a magazine, book etc
meanings.example: Are there any areas you feel are not covered adequately in the book?
meanings.example_cn: 书中是否有哪些方面你觉得论述得还不够详细？

meanings.meaning_en: a machine with keys that you press in order to print letters of the alphabet onto paper
meanings.example: She tapped out a letter on the typewriter.
meanings.example_cn: 她用打字机打出了一封信。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of papers, records etc that contain information about a particular person or subject
meanings.example: We will keep your details on file (= store them for later use ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们将把你的详细资料存档。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep papers, documents etc in a particular place so that you can find them easily
someone who is involved in illegal activities or has been proved guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Police have described the man as a violent and dangerous criminal.
meanings.example_cn: 警方形容那名男子是个凶暴而危险的罪犯。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to crime
meanings.example: a convicted criminal
meanings.example_cn: 一名已决罪犯

meanings.meaning_en: based on incorrect information or ideas
meanings.example: I don’t want to give you any false hopes .
meanings.example_cn: 我不想让你有任何虚假的希望。

meanings.example: The statement gives us a false impression that we understand something when we do not.
meanings.example_cn: 这句话使我们产生错觉，以为自己懂了，但其实并没懂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 友好关系；加入；联盟；从属关系
meanings.meaning_en: the connection or involvement that someone or something has with a political, religious etc organization
meanings.example: The kidnappers had no affiliation with any militant group.
meanings.example_cn: 这些绑架者与任何军事组织都没有紧密联系。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide which one of a number of things or people you want
meanings.example: It took us ages to choose a new carpet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们挑选新地毯花了很长时间。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose one thing or do one thing instead of another
meanings.example: Depending on your circumstances you can opt for one method or the other.
meanings.example_cn: 根据自己的情况，你可以选择这种或那种方法。

meanings.example: Upon receipt of a copy of the arbitration application, the respondent shall, within the time limit prescribed by the Arbitration Rules, submit its defence to the arbitration commission.
meanings.example_cn: 被申请人收到仲裁申请书副本后，应当在仲裁规则规定的期限内向仲裁委员会提交答辩书。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has to defend their own case in a law court, especially in a  divorce  case

meanings.meaning_cn: 信息，资料；知识；情报；通知
meanings.meaning_en: facts or details that tell you something about a situation, person, event etc
meanings.example: I need more information.
meanings.example_cn: 我需要更多信息。

meanings.meaning_en: an area surrounded by a wall or fence, and used for a particular purpose
meanings.example: the bear enclosure at the zoo
meanings.example_cn: 动物园中的熊园

meanings.meaning_en: a unit of time that is equal to 10 to the power of  minus  18
meanings.example: "They built up nice little pictures, " says David Villeneuve, program leader of attosecond science at the National Research Council of Canada in Ottawa.
meanings.example_cn: “他们制作了漂亮的小图片，”David Villeneuve说，他是在加拿大渥太华的国家研究理事会的阿托秒科学的项目领导。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷人的；吸引人的；使人神魂颠倒的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely interesting
meanings.example: a fascinating book
meanings.example_cn: 一本引人入胜的书

meanings.example: That sounds absolutely fascinating .
meanings.example_cn: 那听起来极具吸引力。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality that is beyond compare is the best of its kind
meanings.example: a beauty and an elegance beyond compare
meanings.example_cn: 无与伦比的美丽与优雅

meanings.meaning_en: When you compare things, you consider them and discover the differences or similarities between them
meanings.example: Compare the two illustrations in Figure 60.
meanings.example_cn: 比较一下图60中的两个图示。

meanings.example: The bank refused to accept any mortgage on land.
meanings.example_cn: 银行拒绝接受任何土地抵押。

meanings.example: At this point, such claims have no bearing on the mortgage or housing crisis; they have bearing only on the holders of these securities themselves.
meanings.example_cn: 从这一点上来说，这些贷款凭证与抵押贷款或住房危机没有任何关系，他们只与拥有这些证券的持有者有关。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very ashamed and sad because you know that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: She looked self-conscious and guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她看上去很不自然，很内疚的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: a politician who is in charge of a government depart-ment, in Britain and some other countries
meanings.example: a senior Cabinet minister
meanings.example_cn: 资深的内阁部长

meanings.meaning_cn: 执行牧师职务；辅助或伺候某人
meanings.meaning_en: to work as a priest
a piece of furniture with a flat top supported by legs
meanings.example: The food was served on long tables.
meanings.example_cn: 食物放在长餐桌上供应。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a bill etc to be discussed or dealt with in the future

meanings.meaning_cn: 主任，主管；导演；人事助理
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of a particular activity or organization
meanings.example: The company is run by a board of directors (= a group of directors ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司由董事会管理。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something exist that did not exist before
meanings.example: Some people believe the universe was created by a big explosion.
meanings.example_cn: 有些人认为宇宙是通过一次大爆炸创造出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: lack of food, especially for a long period of time, that can cause illness or death
meanings.example: Try to satisfy your hunger by eating some fruit.
meanings.example_cn: 吃些水果充充饥吧。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone hungers for something or hungers after it, you are emphasizing that they want it very much
meanings.example: But Jules was not eager for classroom learning, he hungered for adventure.
meanings.example_cn: 但是朱尔斯并不热衷于课堂学习，他渴望冒险。

meanings.meaning_en: Man and men are sometimes used to refer to all human beings, including both males and females. Some people dislike this use.
meanings.example: The chick initially has no fear of man.
meanings.example_cn: 小鸡最初不怕人。

meanings.meaning_en: Consumable is also a noun
meanings.example: Suppliers add computer consumables, office equipment and furniture to their product range.
meanings.example_cn: 供应商把计算机耗材、办公设备及家具加进他们的产品范围中。

meanings.meaning_en: consumable goods are intended to be used and then replaced
to charge a tax on something
meanings.example: Cigarettes are heavily taxed in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 在英国，香烟被课以重税。

meanings.meaning_en: Tax is an amount of money that you have to pay to the government so that it can pay for public services such as road and schools
meanings.example: No-one enjoys paying tax.
meanings.example_cn: 没人喜欢缴税。

meanings.example: In his opinion, benevolence and expressions of gratitude appear to be subtle but powerful ways to bring happiness into one's life and to extend it.
meanings.example_cn: 按他的观点，仁慈和表达感谢之情似乎以微妙但强有力的方式把幸福带到生活中，并使它得到延续。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a box or bowl that you use to keep things in
meanings.example: ice cream in plastic containers
meanings.example_cn: 塑料容器里的冰激凌

meanings.meaning_cn: 实验；试验；实验法；实验过程
meanings.meaning_en: the process of testing various ideas, methods etc to find out how good or effective they are
meanings.example: The issue of animal experimentation is an emotive subject.
meanings.example_cn: 动物实验问题是个敏感的话题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 收缩；畏缩；<俚>精神病学家
meanings.meaning_en: A shrink is a psychiatrist
meanings.example: I've seen a shrink already.
meanings.example_cn: 我已经看过了精神病医生。

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller, or to make something smaller, through the effects of heat or water

meanings.meaning_cn: 位置，方位；职位，工作；姿态；站位
meanings.meaning_en: the way someone is standing, sitting, or lying
meanings.example: Lie in a comfortable position .
meanings.example_cn: 以一个舒服的姿势躺下。

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully put something in a particular position
meanings.example: Frankie shifted his position so that his knees would not become cramped.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗基换了个姿势，这样他的膝盖就不会老蜷着动弹不得。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things or ideas correspond, the parts or information in one relate to the parts or information in the other
meanings.example: The two halves of the document did not correspond.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件的前后两部分不相符。

meanings.meaning_cn: 地面；土地；范围；战场;根据
meanings.meaning_en: a good reason for doing, believing, or saying something
meanings.example: There are strong grounds for believing his statement.
meanings.example_cn: 有充分的理由可以相信他的话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使接触地面；打基础；使搁浅
meanings.meaning_en: if you ground a boat or if it grounds, it hits the bottom of the sea so that it cannot move
meanings.example: ‘You’re under arrest.’ ‘On what grounds?’
meanings.example_cn: “你被捕了。”“理由是什么？”

meanings.meaning_cn: 土地的；地面上的；磨碎的；磨过的
meanings.meaning_en: ground coffee or nuts have been broken up into powder or very small pieces, using a special machine

meanings.meaning_cn: 逆打；反手一击；追加的一杯酒；（英）回扣
meanings.meaning_en: a hit or shot that you do using the back of your hand
If something rarely happens, it does not happen very often
meanings.example: They battled against other Indian tribes, but rarely fought with the whites.
meanings.example_cn: 他们与其他印第安部落交战，但很少与白人作战。

meanings.meaning_en: to give all your attention and effort to one particular thing
meanings.example: For the next few years, she dedicated herself to her work.
meanings.example_cn: 随后的几年里，她全身心地投入工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the goods that are being carried in a ship or plane
meanings.example: a cargo plane
meanings.example_cn: 货机

meanings.meaning_cn: 衰落；变小；亏缺；退潮；消逝
meanings.meaning_en: if something such as power, influence, or a feeling wanes, it becomes gradually less strong or less important
meanings.example: My enthusiasm for the project was waning.
meanings.example_cn: 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

meanings.example: The group’s influence had begun to wane by this time.
meanings.example_cn: 此时，这个团体的影响力已经开始减弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有效的，起作用的；实际的，实在的；给人深刻印象
meanings.meaning_en: successful, and working in the way that was intended
meanings.example: The cheaper drugs are just as effective in treating arthritis.
meanings.example_cn: 较便宜的药品对治疗关节炎同样有效。

meanings.meaning_en: having two of something or two parts
meanings.example: a dual system of education
meanings.example_cn: 二元[双元]教育体系

meanings.meaning_en: correct and true in every detail
meanings.example: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: when you get rid of something
meanings.example: bomb disposal experts
meanings.example_cn: 拆弹专家

meanings.meaning_en: to form or give an opinion about someone or something after thinking carefully about all the information you know about them
meanings.example: You should never judge a person by their looks.
meanings.example_cn: 决不要以貌取人。

meanings.meaning_en: the official in control of a court, who decides how criminals should be punished
meanings.example: Judge us on the improvements we make in the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 请根据我们在经济方面取得的进步来评价我们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 编译；编制；编辑；[图情] 汇编
meanings.meaning_en: to make a book, list, record etc, using different pieces of information, music etc
meanings.example: The document was compiled by the Department of Health.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization formed by workers to protect their rights
meanings.example: Are you planning to join the union?
meanings.example_cn: 你打算加入工会吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 长度，长；时间的长短；（语）音长
meanings.meaning_en: the measurement of how long something is from one end to the other
meanings.example: We measured the length and width of the living room.
meanings.example_cn: 我们量了客厅的长和宽。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that someone pays regularly to use a room, house etc that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: I pay the rent at the beginning of every month.
meanings.example_cn: 我每逢月初交付房租。

meanings.meaning_en: to regularly pay money to live in a house or room that belongs to someone else, or to use something that belongs to someone else

meanings.meaning_cn: 稳定地；稳固地；有规则地

meanings.meaning_en: unlimited rule; autocracy
meanings.example: Although the European perspective has been instrumental in guiding young democracies out of the grip of authoritarianism and autarchy, this power to transform the fringe is slipping.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管欧洲一直以来对指引新的民主国家脱离专政与独裁起到了帮助作用，但是，这种能够改变外围的力量正处在不稳定中。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of an object that is furthest from its centre
meanings.example: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge.
meanings.example_cn: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使锐利；将…开刃；给…加上边
meanings.meaning_en: to put something on the edge or border of something
meanings.example: He stood at the water’s edge staring across the lake.
meanings.example_cn: 他站在水边，凝视着湖对面。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them

meanings.meaning_cn: 负责的，可靠的；有责任的

meanings.meaning_en: the place where God is believed to live and where good people are believed to go when they die

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a ticket that is given back to you after it has been torn, as proof that you have paid

meanings.meaning_en: to find information, especially on a computer

someone who works in an office  typing  letters, keeping records, answering telephone calls, arranging meetings etc

to take someone’s attention away from something by making them look at or listen to something else

the scientific study of people, their societies,  culture s  etc

meanings.example_cn: 她完美的舞台表演

清算人；公司资产清理人

meanings.meaning_cn: 船舶的；海生的；海产的；航海的，海运的

meanings.meaning_cn: 海运业；舰队；水兵；（海军）士兵或军官
meanings.meaning_en: A marine is a member of an armed force, for example the U.S. Marine Corps or the Royal Marines, who is specially trained for military duties at sea as well as on land.
meanings.example: the effects of oil pollution on marine mammals
meanings.example_cn: 石油污染对海洋哺乳动物的影响

meanings.meaning_cn: 摄影的；逼真的；（尤指记忆）详细准确的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to photographs, using photographs, or used in producing photographs
meanings.example: photographic film
meanings.example_cn: 摄影胶片

meanings.meaning_en: money that you gain by selling things or doing business, after your costs have been paid
meanings.example: The shop’s daily profit is usually around $500.
meanings.example_cn: 这家商店每天的利润一般在500美元左右。

meanings.meaning_en: to be useful or helpful to someone
meanings.example: She sold the business and bought a farm with the profits.
meanings.example_cn: 她卖了公司，用所得利润买下了一座农场。

meanings.meaning_en: something that has been done in the wrong way, or an opinion or statement that is incorrect
meanings.example: The most common mistake is to plant them too deep.
meanings.example_cn: 最常见的错误就是把它们种得太深了。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand something wrongly
if a government or organization retrenches, it spends less money
meanings.example: Shortly afterwards, cuts in defence spending forced the aerospace industry to retrench.
meanings.example_cn: 此后不久，国防开支的削减迫使航空航天业紧缩开支。

meanings.meaning_en: to defeat someone completely
meanings.example: We were trounced 13-0.
meanings.example_cn: 我们以0比13惨败。

meanings.meaning_en: the material that everything in the universe is made of, including solids, liquids, and gases
meanings.example: particles of matter
meanings.example_cn: 物质的微粒

meanings.meaning_en: to be important, especially to be important to you, or to have an effect on what happens

meanings.meaning_cn: 装满，使充满；满足；堵塞；任职
meanings.meaning_en: if a container or place fills, or if you fill it, enough of something goes into it to make it full
meanings.example: He poured her a drink, then filled his own glass.
meanings.example_cn: 他给她倒了一杯，然后将自己的杯子斟满。

meanings.example: My job was filling the flour sacks.
meanings.example_cn: 我的工作是装面粉袋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 稳健的，温和的；适度的，中等的；有节制的
meanings.meaning_en: not very large or very small, very hot or very cold, very fast or very slow etc
meanings.example: Even moderate amounts of alcohol can be dangerous.
meanings.example_cn: 喝酒即使不多也会有危险。

meanings.meaning_en: If you moderate something or if it moderates, it becomes less extreme or violent and easier to deal with or accept
meanings.example: a moderate degree of success
meanings.example_cn: 一定程度上的成功

meanings.meaning_en: strong metal that can be shaped easily, consisting of iron and  carbon
meanings.example: a steel bridge
meanings.example_cn: 钢铁大桥

meanings.example: (= steel that does not change colour ) knives
meanings.example_cn: 不锈钢小刀

meanings.meaning_cn: 钢制的；钢铁业的；坚强的
国内的；家庭的；驯养的；一心只管家务的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or happening in one particular country and not involving any other countries
meanings.example: Unfortunately his domestic life wasn’t very happy.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸的是，他的家庭生活并不幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: a servant who works in a large house
to agree to a suggestion, idea etc after considering it carefully
meanings.example: I assented to the request of the American publishers to write this book.
meanings.example_cn: 我同意了美国出版商们写这本书的请求。

meanings.meaning_en: approval or agreement from someone who has authority
The publication of a book or magazine is the act of printing it and sending it to stores to be sold
meanings.example: The guide is being translated into several languages for publication near Christmas.
meanings.example_cn: 这本指南正被翻译成好几种语言，准备在圣诞节前后出版。

meanings.meaning_en: manual work involves using your hands or your physical strength rather than your mind
meanings.example: People in manual occupations have a lower life expectancy.
meanings.example_cn: 干体力活的人预期寿命较短。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that gives instructions about how to do something, especially how to use a machine

meanings.meaning_cn: （失事船或飞机等的）残骸；（船只等的）失事
meanings.meaning_en: the parts of something such as a plane, ship, or building that are left after it has been destroyed in an accident
meanings.example: Firemen managed to pull some survivors from the wreckage.
meanings.example_cn: 消防队员设法从残骸中拖出了几名幸存者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 安全；保险；安全设备；保险装置；安打
meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is safe from danger or harm
meanings.example: You shouldn’t travel alone, for safety’s sake .
meanings.example_cn: 为安全起见，不要独自一人旅行。

meanings.meaning_en: If you observe an important day such as a holiday or anniversary, you do something special in order to honour or celebrate it
meanings.example: ...where he will observe Thanksgiving with family members.
meanings.example_cn: …在那里他将与家人一起庆祝感恩节。

meanings.meaning_cn: 书籍；卷；帐簿；名册；工作簿
meanings.meaning_en: a set of printed pages that are held together in a cover so that you can read them
meanings.example: I’ve just started reading a book by Graham Greene.
meanings.example_cn: 我刚开始看格雷厄姆·格林写的一本书。

meanings.meaning_en: to make arrangements to stay in a place, eat in a restaurant, go to a theatre etc at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: a cookery book
meanings.example_cn: 烹饪书

meanings.meaning_en: to hit your hands against each other many times to make a sound that shows your approval, agreement, or enjoyment
meanings.example: One man began to clap, and others joined in.
meanings.example_cn: 一个人鼓起了掌，其他人也跟着鼓掌。

meanings.meaning_en: the loud sound that you make when you hit your hands together many times to show that you enjoyed something
meanings.example: The couple were cheered and clapped on their arrival.
meanings.example_cn: 这对夫妇抵达时人群为他们欢呼鼓掌。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a loud deep sound
meanings.example: Guns boomed in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 远处大炮隆隆作响。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick increase of business activity
to control and direct something such as money or energy towards a particular purpose
meanings.example: Water had channelled grooves in the rock.
meanings.example_cn: 水在岩石上冲出了沟槽。

meanings.meaning_en: a television station and all the programmes that it broadcasts

meanings.meaning_cn: 季节的；周期性的；依照季节的
meanings.meaning_en: happening, expected, or needed during a particular season
meanings.example: heavy seasonal rains
meanings.example_cn: 季节性的大雨

meanings.meaning_cn: 明亮的，鲜明的；聪明的；愉快的
meanings.meaning_en: shining strongly, or with plenty of light
meanings.example: Her eyes were hurting from the bright lights.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的光线刺痛了她的眼睛。

meanings.example: bright sunshine
meanings.example_cn: 灿烂的阳光

meanings.meaning_en: The brights on a vehicle are its headlights when they are set to shine their brightest
meanings.example: a large bright room
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的大房间

meanings.meaning_cn: 外部的；表面的；[药] 外用的；外国的；外面的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the outside of something or of a person’s body
meanings.example: the external appearance of the building
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的外观

meanings.meaning_en: If a payment or expense is deductible, it can be deducted from another sum such as your income, for example, when calculating how much income tax you have to pay
meanings.example: Part of the auto-loan interest is deductible as a business expense.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一项业务支出，汽车消费的部分贷款利息是可以扣除的。

meanings.meaning_en: the main area on a computer where you can find the  icon s  that represent programs, and where you can do things to manage the information on the computer
meanings.example: We have stopped making desktops because no one is making money from them.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已经停止生产台式电脑了，因为不赚钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特别的；详细的；独有的；挑剔的
meanings.meaning_en: a particular thing or person is the one that you are talking about, and not any other
meanings.example: In this particular case, no one else was involved.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事没有其他人牵涉其中。

meanings.meaning_en: the facts and details about a job, property, legal case etc
meanings.example: Most students choose one particular area for research.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数学生选择一个特定领域进行研究。

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge or understanding of a particular subject or situation
meanings.example: Health officials have tried to raise awareness (=  improve people’s knowledge  ) about AIDS.
meanings.example_cn: 卫生部官员努力提高人们对艾滋病的认识。

meanings.meaning_en: a large building for storing large quantities of goods

meanings.meaning_cn: 储入仓库；以他人名义购进（股票）

meanings.meaning_en: if something floats, it moves slowly through the air or stays up in the air
meanings.example: I looked up at the clouds floating in the sky.
meanings.example_cn: 我仰望着天上的浮云。

meanings.meaning_cn: 彩车，花车；漂流物；浮舟；浮萍
meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle that is decorated to drive through the streets as part of a special event
meanings.example: Leaves floated gently down from the trees.
meanings.example_cn: 叶子从树上轻轻飘落。

meanings.meaning_cn: 荒废的；即将过时的；逐渐被废弃的
meanings.meaning_en: becoming obsolete
meanings.example: ...outmoded, obsolescent equipment.
meanings.example_cn: ...陈旧过时的设备。

meanings.meaning_cn: 已婚的，有配偶的；婚姻的，夫妇的；密切结合的
meanings.meaning_en: having a husband or a wife
meanings.example: Are you married or single?
meanings.example_cn: 你是已婚还是单身？

meanings.example: They’ve been married for eight years.
meanings.example_cn: 他们已经结婚八年了。

meanings.example: Married men earn 70 percent more than single men.
meanings.example_cn: 已婚男子比单身男子多挣70%。

meanings.meaning_cn: 防潮的（Damp Proofing）；民主党（Democratic Party）；露点（Dew Point）；数据处理（Data Processing）；难民（Displaced Person）；棒球双杀（Double Play）

meanings.example: I understood the psychology of this, but it still hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 我理解这种心理，但这仍然让我感到伤心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 从而，因此；在那附近；在那方面
meanings.meaning_en: with the result that something else happens
meanings.example: Our bodies can sweat, thereby losing heat by evaporation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的身体会流汗，由此能通过蒸发散热。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意见；判断力；[法] 审判；评价

meanings.example: The average salary for a teacher is $39,000 a year.
meanings.example_cn: 教师的平均工资是39,000美元一年。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you receive as payment from the organization you work for, usually paid to you every month

meanings.meaning_cn: 饥饿的；渴望的；荒年的；不毛的
meanings.meaning_en: wanting to eat something
meanings.example: I was cold, tired, and hungry.
meanings.example_cn: 我又冷，又累，又饿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大量的；实质的；内容充实的
meanings.meaning_en: large in amount or number
meanings.example: We have the support of a substantial number of parents.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有相当多家长的支持。

meanings.example: a substantial salary
meanings.example_cn: 丰厚的薪水

meanings.meaning_en: to copy something exactly
meanings.example: New copies of the form can be duplicated from a master copy.
meanings.example_cn: 可以用原件来复制新的表格。

meanings.meaning_en: an exact copy of something that you can use in the same way
meanings.example: The video was duplicated illegally.
meanings.example_cn: 这盘录像带是非法拷贝的。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same as something, or made as an exact copy of something
a difficult time when there is less trade, business activity etc in a country than usual
meanings.example: the economic recession of the early 1980s
meanings.example_cn: 20世纪80年代初的经济衰退

meanings.meaning_en: a ceremony that is always performed in the same way, in order to mark an important religious or social occasion
meanings.example: ancient pagan rituals
meanings.example_cn: 古老的异教仪式

meanings.meaning_cn: 仪式的；例行的；礼节性的
meanings.meaning_en: done in a fixed and expected way, but without real meaning or sincerity
meanings.example: the importance of religion and ritual in our lives
meanings.example_cn: 我们生活中宗教和宗教仪式的重要性

meanings.meaning_cn: 快乐的；有乐趣的；令人愉快的
meanings.meaning_en: something enjoyable gives you pleasure
meanings.example: Games can make learning more enjoyable.
meanings.example_cn: 游戏可以寓教于乐。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove an object from somewhere, especially with difficulty
meanings.example: You’ll have to have that tooth extracted.
meanings.example_cn: 你得把那颗牙拔掉。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing, music etc taken from a particular book, piece of music etc
paper for writing letters, usually with matching envelopes
meanings.example: a letter on hotel stationery
meanings.example_cn: 用酒店信纸写的信

meanings.meaning_en: to make the picture of a film, photograph etc appear in a larger form on a screen or flat surface
meanings.example: the projected closure of the hospital
meanings.example_cn: 计划关闭这所医院

meanings.meaning_en: a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
to give someone information that should be secret
meanings.example: Officials refuse to divulge details of the negotiations.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们拒绝透露谈判的细节。

meanings.meaning_en: one part of a situation, idea, plan etc that has many parts
meanings.example: a south-facing aspect
meanings.example_cn: 朝南方向

meanings.meaning_en: formal to make someone or something move by shouting, pushing them etc
meanings.example: The charity urged quick action.
meanings.example_cn: 慈善机构敦促迅速采取行动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强烈的欲望，迫切要求；推动力
meanings.meaning_en: a strong wish or need
to use your teeth to cut, crush, or chew something
meanings.example: The dog bit him and made his hand bleed.
meanings.example_cn: 那只狗把他的手咬出血了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of cutting or crushing something with your teeth

meanings.meaning_cn: 机内测试设备（Built-In Test Equipment）

meanings.meaning_en: to talk about something with another person or a group in order to exchange ideas or decide something
meanings.example: Littman refused to discuss the case publicly.
meanings.example_cn: 利特曼拒绝公开讨论此案。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀疑的；怀疑论的，不可知论的
meanings.example: Not all theory that we read in this course is skeptical.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在这门课中提及的理论不全是怀疑性的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 交付；托运；寄存；把…委托给
meanings.meaning_en: to send something somewhere, especially in order to sell it

meanings.meaning_cn: 开始；机会；通路；空缺的职位
meanings.meaning_en: the beginning or first part of something
meanings.example: There are very few openings in scientific research.
meanings.example_cn: 科学研究领域很少有职位空缺。

meanings.meaning_en: first or beginning
a  bar chart
meanings.example: One way to quickly check out if there's any area in your shot that is overexposed to this degree is to view the histogram on your shot.
meanings.example_cn: 一个方法来快速检查在你的拍摄中是否有过度曝光到这种程度的情况发生可用拍摄中的直方图。

meanings.meaning_en: an office worker who is only employed temporarily
meanings.example: She began working for the company as a temp.
meanings.example_cn: 她开始在这家公司做临时雇员。

meanings.meaning_en: to work as a temp

meanings.meaning_cn: 苦的；痛苦的；尖刻的；充满仇恨的
meanings.meaning_en: feeling angry, jealous, and upset because you think you have been treated unfairly
meanings.example: a bitter old man
meanings.example_cn: 一个满腹怨恨的老人

meanings.meaning_en: a type of dark beer that is popular in Britain, or a glass of this
a large amount of money, property etc that a person or country owns
meanings.example: The country’s wealth comes from its oil.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的财富来自石油。

meanings.meaning_en: to be attracted to something and therefore move towards it or become involved with it
meanings.example: You naturally gravitate toward people with shared values.
meanings.example_cn: 你自然而然地被具有共同价值观的人吸引。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large  supermarket
to start to use new ideas, methods, or inventions
meanings.example: the need for large businesses to innovate
meanings.example_cn: 大公司革新的需要

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something to something else with nails
meanings.example: Frank put the first plank down and nailed it in place.
meanings.example_cn: 弗兰克放下第一块木板，把它钉到位。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin pointed piece of metal with a flat top, which you hit into a surface with a hammer, for example to join things together or to hang something on

meanings.meaning_cn: 知识，学问；知道，认识；学科
meanings.meaning_en: the information, skills, and understanding that you have gained through learning or experience
meanings.example: He did not have much knowledge of American history.
meanings.example_cn: 他对美国历史所知不多。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth surface has no rough parts, lumps, or holes, especially in a way that is pleasant and attractive to touch
meanings.example: Her skin felt smooth and cool.
meanings.example_cn: 她的皮肤摸上去又滑又凉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使光滑；消除（障碍等）；使优雅；缓和
meanings.meaning_en: to make a rough surface flat and even
meanings.example: a smooth pebble
meanings.example_cn: 光滑的卵石

meanings.example: The stone steps had been worn smooth .
meanings.example_cn: 石阶被磨得光溜溜的了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you smooth something, you move your hands over its surface to make it smooth and flat
meanings.example: She stood up and smoothed down her frock.
meanings.example_cn: 她站了起来，抚平了自己的连衣裙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 丑闻；流言蜚语；诽谤；公愤
meanings.meaning_en: an event in which someone, especially someone important, behaves in a bad way that shocks people
meanings.example: It caused quite a scandal when he left his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开妻子成了一大丑闻。

meanings.meaning_en: A creditworthy person or organization is one who can safely be lent money or allowed to have goods on credit, for example, because in the past they have always paid back what they owe
meanings.example: The Fed wants banks to continue to lend to creditworthy borrowers.
meanings.example_cn: 联邦储备银行想让各家银行继续贷款给信用良好的借款人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 离开；出发，起程；违反；去世
meanings.meaning_en: to leave, especially when you are starting a journey
meanings.example: Flights by Air Europe depart Gatwick on Tuesdays.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲航空公司的航班每逢周二从盖特威克机场起飞。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, group, or organization that you compete with in sport, business, a fight etc
meanings.example: This gives the company a competitive advantage over its rivals.
meanings.example_cn: 这使该公司与其对手相比具有一项竞争优势。

meanings.example: He finished 39 seconds ahead of his main rival .
meanings.example_cn: 他比主要对手早39秒到达终点。

meanings.example: She was 2 minutes faster than her nearest rival .
meanings.example_cn: 她比紧随其后的对手快两分钟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调解；仲裁；调停；作中间人

meanings.meaning_en: chances of future success
meanings.example: I had no job, no education, and no prospects .
meanings.example_cn: 我没有工作，没受过什么教育，前途渺茫。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine an area of land or water, in order to find gold, silver, oil etc
to understand or think of something or someone in a particular way
meanings.example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
meanings.example_cn: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: words and expressions used in a particular profession or by a particular group of people, which are difficult for other people to understand – often used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Keep it simple and avoid the use of jargon.
meanings.example_cn: 简单点，避免使用术语。

meanings.meaning_en: the system or type of money that a country uses
meanings.example: The bank can supply you with foreign currency .
meanings.example_cn: 这家银行能为你提供外币。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of teaching or being taught the skills for a particular job or activity
meanings.example: Police drivers have to undergo intensive training .
meanings.example_cn: 警察驾驶员都得接受强化训练。

meanings.example: a rigorous training session
meanings.example_cn: 一节严格的训练课

meanings.meaning_cn: 航空；飞行术；飞机制造业
meanings.meaning_en: the science or practice of flying in aircraft
meanings.example: ...the aviation industry.
meanings.example_cn: …航空工业。

meanings.meaning_en: the power you have because of your official position
meanings.example: an agreement between the US and Colombian authorities
meanings.example_cn: 美国和哥伦比亚当局的一份协议

meanings.meaning_en: If you divest yourself of something that you own or are responsible for, you get rid of it or stop being responsible for it
meanings.example: The company divested itself of its oil interests.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司从石油生意中抽身。

meanings.meaning_en: to know who someone is or what something is, because you have seen, heard, experienced, or learned about them in the past
meanings.example: I didn’t recognize you in your uniform.
meanings.example_cn: 你穿上制服我认不出你了。

meanings.meaning_en: special attention or importance
meanings.example: a change of emphasis in government policy
meanings.example_cn: 政府政策重心的变化

meanings.meaning_en: based on instinct and not involving thought
meanings.example: a mother’s instinctive love
meanings.example_cn: 母亲本能的爱

meanings.meaning_en: to make certain that something will happen properly
meanings.example: facilities to ensure the safety of cyclists
meanings.example_cn: 确保骑车人安全的设施

meanings.meaning_en: a person or country that belongs to a group or organization
meanings.example: The majority of union members voted in favour of a strike.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数工会成员投票赞成罢工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾斜；翘起；以言词或文字抨击
meanings.meaning_en: to move a part of your body, especially your head or chin, upwards or to the side
meanings.example: My mother tilted her head and smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 我妈妈歪着头笑了。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement or position in which one side of something is higher than the other
meanings.example: Ned’s mouth tilted upwards slightly at the corners.
meanings.example_cn: 内德的嘴角微微翘起。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or idea that a word, expression, or sign represents
meanings.example: Life seemed to have lost its meaning since Janet’s death.
meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特去世以后生活似乎失去了意义。

meanings.meaning_cn: [地理][水文] 冰碛；放钱的抽屉；备用现金
meanings.meaning_en: money in the till is money that a company or organization has
meanings.example: You keep as much money as you need in the till to run your operations.
meanings.example_cn: 你做业务要储备足够的钱。

meanings.meaning_en: until
to prepare land for growing crops
electronic equipment, such as computers and televisions, uses electricity that has passed through computer chips, transistors etc
meanings.example: electronic games
meanings.example_cn: 电子游戏

meanings.example: an electronic organizer (= a small piece of electronic equipment that you can use to record addresses, phone numbers etc )
meanings.example_cn: 电子记事本

meanings.meaning_en: to die from being under water for too long, or to kill someone in this way
meanings.example: Many people drowned when the boat overturned.
meanings.example_cn: 船翻后许多人淹死了。

meanings.example: Jane was drowned in the river.
meanings.example_cn: 简在那条河里溺水身亡。

meanings.meaning_en: money paid to someone because they have suffered injury or loss, or because something they own has been damaged
meanings.example: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
meanings.example_cn: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

meanings.meaning_cn: 登记；注册；记录；挂号邮寄；把…挂号；正式提出
meanings.meaning_en: to put someone’s or something’s name on an official list
meanings.example: The tanker is registered in Rotterdam.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘油轮是在鹿特丹登记的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 登记；注册；记录；寄存器；登记簿
meanings.meaning_en: an official list of names of people, companies etc, or a book that has this list
to defeat a person or group and make them obey you
meanings.example: The native population was subjugated and exploited.
meanings.example_cn: 土著人被征服，并遭受剥削。

meanings.meaning_cn: 投资；覆盖；耗费；授予；包围
meanings.meaning_en: to buy shares, property, or goods because you hope that the value will increase and you can make a profit
meanings.example: I’ve got a few thousand dollars I’m looking to invest.
meanings.example_cn: 我有几千美元想作投资。

meanings.meaning_cn: 实用；效用；公共设施；功用
meanings.meaning_en: a service such as gas or electricity provided for people to use
meanings.example: Does your rent include utilities?
meanings.example_cn: 你的房租包括公用事业费吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 实用的；通用的；有多种用途的

meanings.meaning_en: if you incur a cost, debt, or a fine, you have to pay money because of something you have done
meanings.example: The government had also incurred huge debts.
meanings.example_cn: 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

meanings.meaning_en: a place in a road where the traffic cannot pass easily, so that there are a lot of delays
meanings.example: Understaffing has caused a real bottleneck.
meanings.example_cn: 人手不足严重妨碍了整个进度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 高雅的，优雅的；讲究的；简炼的；简洁的
meanings.meaning_en: beautiful, attractive, or graceful
meanings.example: a tall, elegant young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材高挑、举止优雅的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: the most important part of something, from which new ideas develop
meanings.example: India has a good scientific research base.
meanings.example_cn: 印度有良好的科研基础。

meanings.meaning_en: not having good moral principles
to have your main place of work, business etc in a particular place
to come from an earlier time in history than something else
meanings.example: The economic troubles antedate the current administration.
meanings.example_cn: 这些经济问题早在现任政府就职之前就已出现。

meanings.meaning_en: an earlier date
to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance
meanings.example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的假期要是凑巧赶在一起，我们常常会一同去度假。

meanings.meaning_en: precise information, details etc are exact, clear, and correct
meanings.example: precise sales figures
meanings.example_cn: 准确的销售数据

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of being grateful
meanings.example: Tears of gratitude filled her eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 她眼里充满感激的泪水。

meanings.meaning_en: when you tell someone that you are happy because they have achieved something or because something nice has happened to them
meanings.example: letters of congratulation
meanings.example_cn: 祝贺信

meanings.meaning_cn: 违反规定，反常；撤消管制规定
meanings.meaning_en: Deregulation is the removal of controls and restrictions in a particular area of business or trade
meanings.example: Since deregulation, banks are permitted to set their own interest rates.
meanings.example_cn: 解除管制后，银行获准自定利率。

meanings.meaning_cn: 胜任的；有能力的；能干的；足够的
meanings.meaning_en: having enough skill or knowledge to do something to a satisfactory standard
meanings.example: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 一名合格的机修工应该能够解决这个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who gets services or advice from a professional person, company, or organization
meanings.example: a meeting with an important client
meanings.example_cn: 与一位重要客户的会面

meanings.meaning_cn: 簿记员；会计员；铁路的司旗员
meanings.meaning_en: A bookkeeper is a person whose job is to keep an accurate record of the money that is spent and received by a business or other organization

meanings.meaning_cn: 播送，播放；（无线电或电视）广播；播撒（种子）
meanings.meaning_en: to send out radio or television programmes
meanings.example: The interview was broadcast live across Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 这次采访向整个欧洲进行了现场直播。

meanings.meaning_en: a programme on the radio or on television

meanings.meaning_cn: 限制；使具有资格；证明…合格
meanings.meaning_en: to have the right to have or do something, or to give someone this right
meanings.example: Free school lunches are given to children who qualify.
meanings.example_cn: 符合条件的儿童可获得免费的学生午餐。

meanings.meaning_cn: [会计] 收入；[金融] 进款
meanings.meaning_en: You can use takings to refer to the amount of money that a business such as a shop or a movie theatre gets from selling its goods or tickets during a particular period
meanings.example: Their takings were fifteen to twenty thousand dollars a week.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的营业收入是每周1.5万至2万美元之间。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of moving up and down on a surface
meanings.example: Try to catch the ball on the second bounce.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量在球第二次弹起时接住。

meanings.meaning_en: if a ball or other object bounces, or you bounce it, it immediately moves up or away from a surface after hitting it
to finish an activity and go somewhere – often used humorously
meanings.example: The rest of us adjourned to a nearby pub for some refreshments.
meanings.example_cn: 我们其他人转移阵地，去了附近酒吧吃点心。

meanings.meaning_en: An appointee is someone who has been chosen for a particular job or position of responsibility
meanings.example: ...Becket, a recent appointee to the Supreme Court.
meanings.example_cn: ...贝克特，一个最近刚被任命在最高法院工作的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 进入者；新会员；参加竞赛者；新工作者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who takes part in a competition
meanings.example: All items entered for the competition must be the entrant's own work.
meanings.example_cn: 所有参赛作品必须是参赛者自己的作品。

meanings.meaning_en: the sets of programs that tell a computer how to do a particular job
meanings.example: She loaded the new software .
meanings.example_cn: 她给电脑装上新的软件。

meanings.meaning_cn: [金融] 透支；[金融] 透支额
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money you owe to a bank when you have spent more money than you had in your account
meanings.example: a £250 overdraft
meanings.example_cn: 250英镑的透支额

meanings.example: Many students have a free overdraft facility (= agreement with their bank to have an overdraft up to a particular limit ).
meanings.example_cn: 许多学生都能享受免费透支服务。

meanings.meaning_en: a big building where people wait to get onto planes, buses, or ships, or where goods are loaded
meanings.example: the airport’s passenger terminal
meanings.example_cn: 机场航站楼

meanings.meaning_en: a terminal illness cannot be cured, and causes death
the component parts of something are the parts that it consists of
meanings.example: Gorbachev failed to keep the component parts of the Soviet Union together.
meanings.example_cn: 戈尔巴乔夫没能使苏联各组成部分保持在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成分；组件；[电子] 元件
meanings.meaning_en: one of several parts that together make up a whole machine, system etc
a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: an adversarial system, especially in politics and the law, is one in which two sides oppose and attack each other
meanings.example: the adversarial nature of two-party politics
meanings.example_cn: 两党政治的对抗性

meanings.meaning_en: land along the side of a river or lake
meanings.example: the river bank
meanings.example_cn: 河岸

meanings.meaning_en: if a plane banks, it slopes to one side when turning

meanings.meaning_cn: 普遍的，广泛的；分布广的
meanings.meaning_en: existing or happening in many places or situations, or among many people
meanings.example: the widespread use of chemicals in agriculture
meanings.example_cn: 化学品在农业中的广泛使用

meanings.meaning_cn: 全部的；全体的；一切在内的
meanings.meaning_en: considering or including everything
meanings.example: The overall cost of the exhibition was £400,000.
meanings.example_cn: 展览会的全部费用是40万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: considering or including everything
meanings.example: The overall result is an increase in population.
meanings.example_cn: 总的结果是人口增加。

meanings.meaning_en: a loose-fitting piece of clothing like a coat, that is worn over clothes to protect them
meanings.example: An overall winner and a runner-up were chosen.
meanings.example_cn: 总冠军和第二名被选了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a heavy military vehicle that has a large gun and runs on two metal belts fitted over its wheels
the typical weather conditions in a particular area
meanings.example: Los Angeles’ warm dry climate
meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶温暖干燥的气候

meanings.meaning_en: to fail after a period of time because something has gone wrong
meanings.example: Their marriage began to founder soon after the honeymoon.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的婚姻在蜜月之后不久便触礁了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who establishes a business, organization, school etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 共同决策制；劳资协同经营制度
meanings.meaning_en: joint participation of management and employees or employees' trade union representatives in some decisions

meanings.meaning_cn: 监视器；监听器；监控器；显示屏；班长
meanings.meaning_en: a television or part of a computer with a screen, on which you can see pictures or information
meanings.example: a heart monitor
meanings.example_cn: 心脏监测仪

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully watch and check a situation in order to see how it changes over a period of time
a complete range of opinions, people, situations etc, going from one extreme to its opposite
meanings.example: The two articles here represent opposite ends of the spectrum .
meanings.example_cn: 这里的两篇文章代表了两个极端的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: the reason that makes someone do something, especially when this reason is kept hidden
meanings.example: What do you suppose the killer’s motive was?
meanings.example_cn: 你认为凶手的动机是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: the motive power or force for a machine, vehicle etc makes it move
meanings.example: The violence was clearly prompted by political motives.
meanings.example_cn: 这次暴力事件显然是由政治动机引发的。

meanings.example: It’s not the kind of thing he’d do unless he had an ulterior motive (= a reason he kept hidden ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他不会做这种事的，除非他另有隐情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 履行；实现；满足；使结束（等于fulfil）

meanings.meaning_en: if something is mandatory, the law says it must be done
meanings.example: Murder carries a mandatory life sentence .
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀罪依照法律要判无期徒刑。

meanings.example: The Council has made it mandatory for all nurses to attend a refresher course every three years.
meanings.example_cn: 理事会规定所有护士必须每三年参加一次进修课程。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out something
meanings.example: A postmortem was ordered to try to ascertain the cause of death.
meanings.example_cn: 下令验尸以查明死因。

meanings.meaning_cn: 企业家的，创业者的；中间商的
meanings.example: ...her prodigious entrepreneurial flair.
meanings.example_cn: …她惊人的创业天赋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奶油，乳脂；精华；面霜；乳酪
meanings.meaning_en: a thick yellow-white liquid that rises to the top of milk
meanings.example: fresh cream
meanings.example_cn: 鲜奶油

meanings.meaning_cn: 团结；重整；恢复；（网球等）连续对打
meanings.meaning_en: to become stronger again after a period of weakness or defeat
meanings.example: After a shaky start, he rallied and won the title in style.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然开局不顺，但他振作精神，最后漂亮地赢得了冠军。

meanings.meaning_en: a large public meeting, especially one that is held outdoors to support a political idea, protest etc
meanings.example: The Tokyo stock market rallied later in the day.
meanings.example_cn: 当天晚些时候东京股市止跌回升。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迹象；符号；记号；手势；指示牌
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper, metal, or wood with words or a picture that gives people information, warnings, or instructions
meanings.example: a sign on the door
meanings.example_cn: 门上的标牌

meanings.meaning_en: to write your  signature  on something to show that you wrote it, agree with it, or were present
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["road signs"]}
meanings.example_cn: 路标

meanings.meaning_en: a fault in someone’s character or in a system, organization, design etc
meanings.example: The legislation has a fundamental weakness.
meanings.example_cn: 这项立法有一个根本性缺陷。

meanings.meaning_en: waste material that has been thrown away
meanings.example: a refuse dump
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾场

meanings.meaning_en: to say firmly that you will not do something that someone has asked you to do
meanings.example: refuse collection
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾收集

meanings.meaning_en: If you can discern something, you are aware of it and know what it is
meanings.example: You need a long series of data to be able to discern such a trend.
meanings.example_cn: 你需要一大串数据才能认清这一趋势。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the value of one country’s money when it is exchanged for another country’s money
meanings.example: Nigeria has just devalued its currency .
meanings.example_cn: 尼日利亚刚刚令自己的货币贬值。

meanings.meaning_cn: 区分；辨别；使杰出，使表现突出
meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and understand the difference between two or more things or people
meanings.example: The light was too dim for me to distinguish anything clearly.
meanings.example_cn: 光线太暗，我什么也看不清。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经济学；国家的经济状况
meanings.meaning_en: the study of the way in which money and goods are produced and used
meanings.example: a Harvard professor of economics
meanings.example_cn: 哈佛大学的经济学教授

meanings.meaning_cn: 保险；保险费；保险契约；赔偿金
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a company in which you pay them money, especially regularly, and they pay the costs if something bad happens, for example if you become ill or your car is damaged
meanings.example: Your father took out insurance to cover the mortgage.
meanings.example_cn: 你父亲购买了抵押借款保险。

meanings.meaning_en: help and advice that is given to someone about their work, education, or personal life
meanings.example: a missile with a sophisticated electronic guidance system
meanings.example_cn: 有精密电子制导系统的导弹

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同的；不相干的；全异的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of things or people that are very different and not related to each other
meanings.example: a meeting covering many disparate subjects
meanings.example_cn: 涉及许多不同议题的会议

meanings.example: the difficulties of dealing with disparate groups of people
meanings.example_cn: 和不同的人群打交道的难处

meanings.meaning_en: to become worse
meanings.example: Ethel’s health has deteriorated.
meanings.example_cn: 埃塞尔的健康状况恶化了。

meanings.meaning_en: an action, especially an official one, that is intended to deal with a particular problem
meanings.example: New safety measures were being demanded after last night’s horrific train crash.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚发生严重的火车相撞事故后，民众要求制定新的安全措施。

meanings.meaning_en: to find the size, length, or amount of something, using standard units such as  inch es  ,metres etc
meanings.example: The new bridge was erected as a temporary measure to replace the one which was destroyed by floods.
meanings.example_cn: 建这座新桥是为了临时代替被洪水毁坏的那座桥。

meanings.meaning_cn: [法] 法案；广告；账单；[金融] 票据；钞票；清单
meanings.meaning_en: a written list showing how much you have to pay for services you have received, work that has been done etc
meanings.example: Have you paid the phone bill?
meanings.example_cn: 电话费你付了吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 宣布；开账单；用海报宣传
meanings.meaning_en: to send someone a bill

meanings.meaning_cn: 提升，[劳经] 晋升；推销，促销；促进；发扬，振兴
meanings.meaning_en: a move to a more important job or position in a company or organization
meanings.example: I want a job with good prospects for promotion.
meanings.example_cn: 我想要一份有良好晋升机会的工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可通过谈判解决的；可协商的
meanings.meaning_en: an offer, price, contract etc that is negotiable can be discussed and changed before being agreed on
meanings.example: Part-time barman required. Hours and salary negotiable.
meanings.example_cn: 招聘兼职酒吧男服务员，工作时间及薪金面议。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine someone or something very carefully
meanings.example: He scrutinized the document.
meanings.example_cn: 他细阅了这份文件。

meanings.example: She scrutinized his face.
meanings.example_cn: 她细细端详他的脸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到绝顶；达到高潮；达到顶点
内部的人，会员；熟悉内情者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a special knowledge of a particular organization because they are part of it
meanings.example: an insider’s view of the way that a Japanese company works
meanings.example_cn: 业内人士对日本公司运作方式的看法

meanings.meaning_cn: 禁止出入港口；禁止或限制贸易；征用或扣押
meanings.meaning_en: to officially stop particular goods being traded with another country
meanings.example: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia.
meanings.example_cn: 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order to stop trade with another country
a process in which a doctor makes someone talk about their past experiences, relationships etc in order to help them with mental or emotional problems
meanings.example: She’s been in analysis for three years.
meanings.example_cn: 她接受精神分析治疗已经三年了。

meanings.meaning_en: a laboratory
meanings.example: the school science lab
meanings.example_cn: 学校的科学实验室

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of producing conditions which are similar to real ones, especially in order to test something, or the conditions that are produced
meanings.example: a computer simulation used to train airline pilots
meanings.example_cn: 用于训练航空公司飞行员的电脑模拟程序

meanings.meaning_cn: 年金，养老金；年金保险；年金享受权
meanings.meaning_en: a fixed amount of money that is paid each year to someone, usually until they die
meanings.example: He received a paltry annuity of $100.
meanings.example_cn: 他收到了微不足道的100美元年金。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done as a reaction to something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: His immediate response was one of disbelief.
meanings.example_cn: 他的第一反应是不相信。

meanings.meaning_en: to make, design, or think of a new type of thing
meanings.example: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone in 1876.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历山大 · 格雷厄姆 · 贝尔于1876年发明了电话。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of admitting or accepting that something is true
someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft
meanings.example: an airline pilot
meanings.example_cn: 航空公司飞行员

meanings.meaning_en: A pilot plan or a pilot project is one that is used to test an idea before deciding whether to introduce it on a larger scale
meanings.example: a fighter pilot
meanings.example_cn: 战斗机驾驶员

meanings.meaning_en: to guide an aircraft, spacecraft, or ship as its pilot
meanings.example: The official report into the accident says that it was caused by pilot error (= a mistake by the pilot ) .
meanings.example_cn: 那宗事故的官方报告称事故是由飞行员失误造成的。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something so that it is no longer attractive, enjoyable, useful etc
meanings.example: The whole park is spoiled by litter.
meanings.example_cn: 整个公园环境都给垃圾破坏了。

meanings.example: We didn’t let the incident spoil our day.
meanings.example_cn: 我们没有让这件事破坏我们一整天的气氛。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something has been done completely or has finished completely
meanings.example: an old custom that has vanished altogether
meanings.example_cn: 一个彻底消亡的古老习俗

meanings.meaning_en: not wearing any clothes – used humorously
meanings.example: Congress could ban the procession altogether.
meanings.example_cn: 国会可以完全禁止这次游行。

meanings.meaning_en: when you put things into cases or boxes so that you can send or take them somewhere
meanings.example: I can do my packing the night before we leave.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以出发前一晚收拾行李。

meanings.meaning_en: things that people do, especially in order to achieve a particular aim
meanings.example: Everyone is free to engage in peaceful political activity.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都可以自由参加和平的政治活动。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which someone complains about something
meanings.example: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 日历；[天] 历法；日程表
meanings.meaning_en: a set of pages that show the days, weeks, and months of a particular year, that you usually hang on a wall
meanings.example: There was a calendar on the wall above, with large squares around the dates.
meanings.example_cn: 墙的上方曾有一本日历，日期框在大方格里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 将…列入表中；将…排入日程表

meanings.meaning_en: Facilities are buildings, pieces of equipment, or services that are provided for a particular purpose
meanings.example: What recreational facilities are now available?
meanings.example_cn: 什么娱乐设施现在是可用的？

meanings.meaning_cn: 法律；规律；法治；法学；诉讼；司法界
meanings.meaning_en: the whole system of rules that people in a particular country or area must obey
meanings.example: Elected officials ought to obey the law.
meanings.example_cn: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay a debt by making regular payments
meanings.example: There's little advantage to amortizing the loan, especially on a 30 or 40-year basis.
meanings.example_cn: 分期偿还这项贷款没有什么好处，尤其是按30或40年偿还。

meanings.example: If you have a resume or CV, linkto it from the About page, both as a downloadable PDF file and a Web-readableHTML file.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你有个人简历，就在“关于我”页面中创建链接，并提供一个PDF版和一个网络HTML版的下载链接。

meanings.meaning_cn: 依赖，依靠；取决于；相信，信赖
meanings.meaning_en: If you depend on someone or something, you need them in order to be able to survive physically, financially, or emotionally
meanings.example: He depended on his writing for his income.
meanings.example_cn: 他靠写作谋生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 躺下；产卵；搁放；放置；铺放；涂，敷
meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something down carefully into a flat position
meanings.example: He laid his hand on my shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 他把一只手搭在我的肩上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世俗的；外行的；没有经验的
meanings.meaning_en: not trained or not knowing much about a particular profession or subject
meanings.example: They laid a wreath at the place where so many people died.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在这么多人丧生的地方放了一个花圈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 位置；短诗；花纹方向；叙事诗；性伙伴
meanings.meaning_en: a poem or song
meanings.example: Lay the material flat on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 把布料平铺在桌上。

meanings.meaning_en: a light frame covered in coloured paper or plastic that you let fly in the air on the end of one or two long strings
meanings.example: She has a blue and green kite.
meanings.example_cn: 她有一只蓝色和绿色的风筝。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使用空头支票；像风筝一样飞；轻快地移动
meanings.example: The child tailed his kite.
meanings.example_cn: 小孩儿给自己的风筝装了尾巴。

meanings.meaning_en: a plastic or rubber tube containing wires that carry telephone messages, electronic signals, television pictures etc
meanings.example: cables and switches for computers
meanings.example_cn: 电脑的缆线和开关

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone a  telegram

meanings.meaning_cn: 值得做的，值得花时间的
meanings.meaning_en: if something is worthwhile, it is important or useful, or you gain something from it
meanings.example: He wanted to do a worthwhile job.
meanings.example_cn: 他想做有意义的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of leaving a place, especially at the start of a journey
meanings.example: There are several departures for New York every day.
meanings.example_cn: 每天有好几个班次去纽约。

meanings.meaning_en: If you receive reimbursement for money that you have spent, you get your money back, for example because the money should have been paid by someone else
meanings.example: She is demanding reimbursement for medical and other expenses.
meanings.example_cn: 她在要求医疗和其他费用的报销。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏；使瓦解；使分裂；使中断；使陷于混乱
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from continuing in its usual way by causing problems
meanings.example: Traffic was disrupted by a hoax bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 有人虚报有炸弹，造成了交通混乱。

meanings.example: Climate change could disrupt the agricultural economy.
meanings.example_cn: 气候变化可能给农业经济带来不良影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of equipment that produces high temperatures, used for heating and shaping metal objects
meanings.example: Someone stole my credit card and forged my signature.
meanings.example_cn: 有人偷了我的信用卡，并假冒我的签名。

meanings.meaning_en: to illegally copy something, especially something printed or written, to make people think that it is real
meanings.example: a forged passport
meanings.example_cn: 假护照

meanings.meaning_cn: 理论的；理论上的；假设的；推理的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the study of ideas, especially scientific ideas, rather than with practical uses of the ideas or practical experience
meanings.example: theoretical physics
meanings.example_cn: 理论物理

meanings.meaning_en: if something is scarce, there is not very much of it available
meanings.example: Food was often scarce in the winter.
meanings.example_cn: 冬季常常粮食短缺。

meanings.meaning_en: scarcely
meanings.example: There was fierce competition for the scarce resources .
meanings.example_cn: 对这些紧缺资源的争夺非常激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or an instance of ameliorating or the state of being ameliorated
meanings.example: By dint of discussing political matters, vaguely and without precision, from the point of view of the general amelioration of the fate of all men, they came to say a little more than "yes" and "no."
meanings.example_cn: 当马吕斯把关于改善全民生活的政治问题含糊而不明确地摊在桌上谈时，他们相互要比说简单的“是”“不”稍稍多说了几句。

meanings.meaning_cn: 通货膨胀的；通货膨胀倾向的；通货膨胀引起的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or causing price increases
meanings.example: inflationary pressures in the economy
meanings.example_cn: 经济上的通货膨胀压力

meanings.meaning_cn: 批准，认可；授权给；委托代替
meanings.meaning_en: to give official permission for something
meanings.example: an authorized biography
meanings.example_cn: 授权传记

meanings.meaning_cn: 使适应；确定方向；使朝东
meanings.meaning_en: to find exactly where you are by looking around you or using a map
meanings.example: She looked at the street names, trying to orient herself.
meanings.example_cn: 她看看街名，试图确定自己的方位。

meanings.meaning_en: the eastern part of the world, especially China and Japan

meanings.meaning_cn: 伟大的，重大的；极好的，好的；主要的
meanings.meaning_en: very large in amount or degree
meanings.example: The movie was a great success.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片大获成功。

meanings.meaning_en: a very successful and famous person in a particular sport, profession etc
meanings.example: The news came as possibly the greatest shock of my life.
meanings.example_cn: 这个消息可能是我一生中最大的打击。

meanings.meaning_cn: 原子能的；[细胞] 细胞核的；中心的；原子核的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving the nucleus (= central part ) of an atom, or the energy produced when the nucleus of an atom is either split or joined with the nucleus of another atom
meanings.example: France’s reliance on nuclear energy
meanings.example_cn: 法国对核能的依赖

meanings.meaning_en: a thing, place, activity etc that you get something from
meanings.example: They get their money from various sources.
meanings.example_cn: 他们从各种途径弄到钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使负义务；强使，强迫；对…施以恩惠
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone have to do something, because it is the law, their duty, or the right thing to do
meanings.example: The ruling obligates airlines to release information about their flight delays.
meanings.example_cn: 这一裁决迫使航空公司公布航班晚点信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有责任的，有义务的；必需的
海盗行为；剽窃；著作权侵害；非法翻印
meanings.meaning_en: the crime of illegally copying and selling books, tapes, videos, computer programs etc
meanings.example: software piracy
meanings.example_cn: 软件盗版

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone or something looks to other people
meanings.example: He was always criticising his wife’s appearance.
meanings.example_cn: 他老是批评妻子的外表。

meanings.meaning_en: why something happens, or why someone does something
meanings.example: She has reason to feel guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她有理由感到内疚。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a particular judgment about a situation after carefully considering the facts
to discover whether something is correct or true
meanings.example: American forces will remain to verify compliance with the treaty.
meanings.example_cn: 美军将继续驻留，核查条约是否得到遵守。

meanings.meaning_cn: 包，包裹；套装软件，[计] 程序包
meanings.meaning_en: something wrapped in paper, packed in a box, and then sent by mail or delivered
meanings.example: There’s a package here for a Miami Lakes address.
meanings.example_cn: 这里有一个寄往迈阿密湖的包裹。

meanings.meaning_en: to put food or other goods into a bag, box etc ready to be sold or sent

meanings.meaning_cn: 包含；牵涉；使陷于；潜心于
meanings.meaning_en: if an activity or situation involves something, that thing is part of it or a result of it
meanings.example: What will the job involve?
meanings.example_cn: 这份工作包括什么？

meanings.meaning_en: a small book of cheques that your bank gives you
meanings.example: The woman took out her chequebook and quickly made out four cheques.
meanings.example_cn: 那个女人拿出支票簿迅速开了4张支票。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a problem or subject easy to notice so that people pay attention to it
meanings.example: Your résumé should highlight your skills and achievements.
meanings.example_cn: 你的简历应该突出自己的技能和成绩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最精彩的部分；最重要的事情；加亮区
meanings.meaning_en: the most important, interesting, or enjoyable part of something such as a holiday, performance, or sports competition
the act of closing a company by selling the things that belong to it, in order to pay its debts
meanings.example: Hundreds of small businesses went into liquidation (= were closed ).
meanings.example_cn: 数以百计的小公司破产了。

meanings.meaning_en: to communicate or express something, with or without using words
meanings.example: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在头顶上；在空中；在高处
meanings.example: The fireworks cracked overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 鞭炮在头顶上空噼啪地爆响。

meanings.meaning_cn: 高架的；在头上的；在头顶上的
meanings.example: A number of birds are circling overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 很多鸟在头顶上空盘旋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天花板；[会计] 经常费用；间接费用；吊脚架空层

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring computer information, equal to eight  bit s (=  the smallest unit on which information is stored on a computer  )
meanings.example: Each character requires one byte of storage space.
meanings.example_cn: 每个字符需要一个字节的储存空间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回答；作出反应；承担责任
meanings.meaning_en: to do something as a reaction to something that has been said or done
meanings.example: They are likely to respond positively to the president's request for aid.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有可能积极地回应该总统的援助请求。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something lose its effect or value
meanings.example: Recent inflation could nullify the economic growth of the last several years.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的通货膨胀可能会抵消过去数年的经济增长。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of privatizing something
meanings.example: We learned all the tricks of privatization.
meanings.example_cn: 我们学到了私有化的所有技巧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 更新；使……恢复；使……清新；消除……的疲劳
meanings.meaning_en: if you refresh your computer screen while you are connected to the Internet, you make the screen show any new information that has arrived since you first began looking at it
meanings.example: A shower will refresh you.
meanings.example_cn: 洗个淋浴你就凉快了。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold something in your hand or arms, or support it as you take it somewhere
meanings.example: Gina was carrying a small bunch of flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 吉娜拿着一小束花。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance a ball or bullet travels after it has been thrown, hit, or fired
meanings.example: Angela carried the child in her arms.
meanings.example_cn: 安杰拉把小孩抱在怀里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 列出的；表列的；已登录的
meanings.example: The pupils were asked to list the sports they loved most and hated most.
meanings.example_cn: 学生们被要求列出他们最喜欢的和最讨厌的运动。

meanings.meaning_en: To list several things such as reasons or names means to write or say them one after another, usually in a particular order

meanings.meaning_cn: 方向；定向；适应；情况介绍；向东方
meanings.meaning_en: the type of activity or subject that a person or organization seems most interested in and gives most attention to
meanings.example: The party has a broadly socialist orientation.
meanings.example_cn: 该政党大体上倾向于社会主义。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something must not be done, seen, used etc
meanings.example: Smoking is banned in the building.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼内禁止吸烟。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order that prevents something from being used or done
the act of changing from one bus, aircraft etc to another while travelling
meanings.example: Getting there often means a couple of transfers on a bus line.
meanings.example_cn: 去那里经常得倒两三趟公共汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: if a skill, idea, or quality transfers from one situation to another, or if you transfer it, it can be used in the new situation

meanings.meaning_cn: 发光体；杰出人物；知识渊博的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is very famous or highly respected for their skill at doing something or their knowledge of a particular subject
meanings.example: luminaries of Parisian society
meanings.example_cn: 巴黎社会的名流

meanings.meaning_en: someone who goes into houses, shops etc to steal things
meanings.example: Burglars broke into their home.
meanings.example_cn: 窃贼闯进了他们家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 持有；拥有；保存；拘留；约束或控制
meanings.meaning_en: to keep something to be used when it is needed
meanings.example: Further copies of the book are held in the library.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书在图书馆还存有一些。

meanings.meaning_en: control, power, or influence over something or someone
meanings.example: Weapons were held at various sites.
meanings.example_cn: 武器存放在不同地点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生涯；职业；事业；速度，全速
meanings.meaning_en: a job or profession that you have been trained for, and which you do for a long period of your life
meanings.example: a teaching career
meanings.example_cn: 教学事业

meanings.meaning_en: Career advice or guidance consists of information about different jobs and help with deciding what kind of job you want to do
meanings.example: He realized that his acting career was over.
meanings.example_cn: 他意识到自己的演艺事业已走到了尽头。

meanings.meaning_en: to move forwards quickly without control, making sudden sideways movements
meanings.example: a physiotherapist who wanted to make a dramatic career change by becoming an author
meanings.example_cn: 想彻底改行当作家的理疗师

meanings.meaning_en: If you pander to someone or to their wishes, you do everything that they want, often to get some advantage for yourself
meanings.example: He has offended the party's traditional base by pandering to the rich and the middle classes.
meanings.example_cn: 他迎合富人和中产阶级，触犯了该党的传统基础。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of sharing things among a large group of people in a planned way
meanings.example: population distribution
meanings.example_cn: 人口分布

meanings.meaning_cn: 旗舰；（作定语）一流；佼佼者
meanings.meaning_en: the most important ship in a group of ships belonging to the navy
meanings.example: the flagship of the new Ford range
meanings.example_cn: 新款福特汽车系列中的旗舰产品

meanings.meaning_cn: 明智的; 通情达理的; 合乎情理的; 意识到的，能感觉到的;
meanings.meaning_en: reasonable, practical, and showing good judgment
meanings.example: She seems very sensible.
meanings.example_cn: 她好像很明智。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可感觉到的东西; 敏感的人;
meanings.example: sensible advice
meanings.example_cn: 合理的建议

meanings.meaning_en: something successful or impressive that is achieved after a lot of effort and hard work
meanings.example: It was a major accomplishment for a player who had been injured so recently.
meanings.example_cn: 对于一个刚受过伤的选手来说，这是很好的成绩。

meanings.meaning_en: Damage consists of the unpleasant effects that something has on a person, situation, or type of activity
meanings.example: Incidents of this type cause irreparable damage to relations with the community.
meanings.example_cn: 此类事件对与该团体的关系造成不可挽回的伤害。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伤害；毁坏（damage的第三人称单数）
meanings.meaning_en: To damage something means to cause it to become less good, pleasant, or successful
meanings.example: ...the electoral chaos that damaged Florida's reputation.
meanings.example_cn: …损害佛罗里达州声誉的选举骚乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 水平的；地平线的；同一阶层的
meanings.meaning_en: flat and level
meanings.example: a horizontal surface
meanings.example_cn: 水平面

meanings.meaning_cn: 水平线，水平面；水平位置
