meanings.example_cn: 我客气地笑着打了个招呼，可是那女人没有答理我。

meanings.example: The two cousins exchanged greetings (= greeted each other ) .
meanings.example_cn: 表兄妹俩互相问候。

meanings.meaning_cn: 地位；状态；情形；重要身份
meanings.meaning_en: the official legal position or condition of a person, group, country etc
meanings.example: These documents have no legal status in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 这些文件在英国并无法律效力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 运输；运费；四轮马车；举止；客车厢
meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with wheels that is pulled by a horse, used in the past
meanings.example: Canals were originally built for the carriage of coal.
meanings.example_cn: 运河原先是为运煤而修建的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小玩意；小器具；小配件；诡计
meanings.meaning_en: A gadget is a small machine or device which does something useful. You sometimes refer to something as a gadget when you are suggesting that it is complicated and unnecessary.
meanings.example: ...sales of kitchen gadgets including toasters, kettles, and percolators.
meanings.example_cn: …厨房小用品的销售，包括烤面包机、水壶和咖啡渗滤壶。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or their behaviour, ideas etc are bad or wrong
meanings.example: I knew my parents would disapprove, but I went anyway.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道父母会反对，但我还是去了。

meanings.meaning_en: books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
meanings.example: He has read many of the major works of literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 企业；事业；进取心；事业心
meanings.meaning_en: a company, organization, or business
meanings.example: commercial enterprises such as banks and food manufacturers
meanings.example_cn: 银行和食品制造厂等商业企业

meanings.meaning_en: to go down below the surface of water, mud etc
meanings.example: Their motorboat struck a rock and began to sink.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的摩托艇触了礁，开始下沉。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open container that you fill with water and use for washing yourself, washing dishes etc
meanings.example: The kids watched as the coin sank to the bottom of the pool.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们看着那枚硬币沉到池底。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle for passengers, which travels along metal tracks in the street
meanings.example: You can get to the beach easily from the centre of town by tram.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以很容易地在市中心坐有轨电车到达海滩。

meanings.meaning_en: the size, shape, design etc, in which something such as a book or magazine is produced
meanings.example: a large-format book for the partially-sighted
meanings.example_cn: 一本给弱视者阅读的大开本的书

meanings.meaning_en: to organize the space on a computer  disk  so that information can be stored on it
Plunge is also a noun
meanings.example: ...a plunge into cold water.
meanings.example_cn: …向着冰冷的水中的纵身一跳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然地下降；投入；陷入；跳进
meanings.meaning_en: to move, fall, or be thrown suddenly forwards or downwards
a building where horses are kept
meanings.example: Our stable abuts against his dwelling.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的马厩和他的住所毗连。

meanings.meaning_en: steady and not likely to move or change
to put or keep a horse in a stable
an act of pushing yourself suddenly up into the air using your legs
meanings.example: the best jump of the competition
meanings.example_cn: 这次比赛中的最佳一跳

meanings.meaning_en: to let yourself drop from a place that is above the ground
meanings.example: a dancer famous for his impressive jumps
meanings.example_cn: 一位以其出色的跳跃闻名的舞蹈家

meanings.meaning_en: relating to sport for young people below a particular age
meanings.example: the junior football club
meanings.example_cn: 青少年足球俱乐部

meanings.meaning_cn: 年少者，晚辈；地位较低者；大学三年级学生
meanings.meaning_en: a child who goes to a junior school
a very short book that usually contains information on one particular subject
meanings.example: a free booklet on drug abuse
meanings.example_cn: 关于嗜毒问题的免费小册子

meanings.meaning_en: a way of selling products to people by telephone
meanings.example: Many people start their careers in telesales.
meanings.example_cn: 很多人从电话销售开始他们的职业生涯。

meanings.meaning_en: a smell or flavour that is distinctive though faint
meanings.example: the debate about whether parents should smack their children
meanings.example_cn: 有关父母该不该打孩子的辩论

meanings.meaning_en: to hit someone, especially a child, with your open hand in order to punish them

meanings.meaning_cn: （一套）家具；套房；组曲；（一批）随员，随从
meanings.meaning_en: a set of rooms, especially expensive ones in a hotel
meanings.example: a honeymoon suite
meanings.example_cn: 蜜月套房

meanings.meaning_cn: 使比赛；使相配；敌得过，比得上；相配；与…竞争
meanings.meaning_en: if one thing matches another, or if two things match, they look attractive together because they are a similar colour, pattern etc
meanings.example: We painted the cabinets green to match the rug.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把柜子刷成绿色，和地毯相配。

meanings.meaning_cn: 比赛，竞赛；匹配；对手；火柴
meanings.meaning_en: an organized sports event between two teams or people
meanings.example: Do you think this outfit matches?
meanings.example_cn: 你认为这套衣服配吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of goods or work produced by a person, machine, factory etc
meanings.example: Output is up 30% on last year.
meanings.example_cn: 产量比去年提高了30%。

meanings.meaning_en: if a computer outputs information, it produces it
to set up a tent or a camp for a short time
meanings.example: Try and pitch your tent on level ground.
meanings.example_cn: 试试在平地上搭帐篷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沥青；音高；程度；树脂；倾斜；投掷；球场
meanings.meaning_en: a marked out area of ground on which a sport is played

meanings.example: She would preside over the innocent repasts of the young heir, with ineffable satisfaction, almost with an air of joint proprietorship with Richards in the entertainment.
meanings.example_cn: 她会怀着难以形容的满意心情主持这位年轻继承人的天真的用餐，那副神态就几乎像在这个款待中她跟理查兹共同享有所有权似的。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is in a situation where they are not protected from something dangerous or unpleasant
meanings.example: Exposure to lead is known to damage the brains of young children.
meanings.example_cn: 已知接触铅会损害幼童的大脑。

meanings.meaning_en: Bookkeeping is the job or activity of keeping an accurate record of the money that is spent and received by a business or other organization
meanings.example: She deputed the bookkeeping to me while he was away.
meanings.example_cn: 在他外出时他把簿记工作交给了我。

meanings.meaning_en: an official whose job is to check that something is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: ticket inspectors
meanings.example_cn: 查票员

meanings.meaning_cn: 法定的；法令的；可依法惩处的
meanings.meaning_en: fixed or controlled by law
meanings.example: statutory employment rights
meanings.example_cn: 法定就业权利

meanings.meaning_en: the purpose of something is what it is intended to achieve
meanings.example: Nick had no particular purpose in mind when he started.
meanings.example_cn: 尼克开始的时候头脑中并没有明确的目标。

meanings.meaning_en: difficult to understand or deal with, because many parts or details are involved
meanings.example: a complicated voting system
meanings.example_cn: 复杂的选举制度

meanings.meaning_cn: 解决方案；溶液；溶解；解答
meanings.meaning_en: a way of solving a problem or dealing with a difficult situation
meanings.example: The best solution would be for them to separate.
meanings.example_cn: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

meanings.meaning_en: an assembly of gears designed to transmit motion
meanings.example: The gearing of this machine is unusual.
meanings.example_cn: 这机器的齿轮装置很特别.

meanings.meaning_cn: 以齿轮连起；配搭活动（gear的ing形式）

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that emphasizes the good qualities of another person or thing
meanings.example: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser.
meanings.example_cn: 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

meanings.meaning_en: If people or things complement each other, they are different or do something different, which makes them a good combination
meanings.example: There will be a written examination to complement the practical test.
meanings.example_cn: 会有一次书面考试来补充实践测试。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly end a close romantic relationship with someone
meanings.example: She jilted her fiancé just before the wedding.
meanings.example_cn: 她在婚礼前一刻抛弃了未婚夫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 事情；事务；私事；（尤指关系不长久的）风流韵事
meanings.meaning_en: public or political events and activities
meanings.example: Are you interested in world affairs?
meanings.example_cn: 你对世界大事感兴趣吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a tax on goods coming into a country or going out of a country
meanings.example: America wants to eliminate tariffs on items such as electronics.
meanings.example_cn: 美国想要取消电子类产品的关税。

meanings.meaning_en: two people who are married or having a sexual or romantic relationship
meanings.example: a newly married couple
meanings.example_cn: 一对新婚夫妇

meanings.meaning_en: to join or fasten two things together
meanings.example: the couple next door
meanings.example_cn: 隔壁的那对夫妇

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in an activity or event
meanings.example: Some members refused to participate.
meanings.example_cn: 有些会员拒绝参加。

meanings.meaning_cn: 头奖；累积赌注；十分成功
meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of money that you can win in a game that is decided by chance
meanings.example: a £50,000 jackpot
meanings.example_cn: 五万英镑的头奖

meanings.meaning_cn: 头奖的；累积赌注的；大笔收入的
meanings.example: jackpot winners
meanings.example_cn: 头奖得主

meanings.meaning_en: when people agree that an idea, statement, explanation etc is right or true
meanings.example: Acceptance by their peer group is important to most youngsters.
meanings.example_cn: 对大多数年轻人来说，为同辈所接纳是很重要的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 高纤维素饮食（High Roughage Diet）；人力资源开发（human resource development）
存在；生存；生活；继续存在
meanings.meaning_en: to happen or be present in a particular situation or place
meanings.example: The custom of arranged marriages still exists in many countries.
meanings.example_cn: 许多国家仍存在包办婚姻的习俗。

meanings.meaning_en: Insolvency is the state of not having enough money to pay your debts
meanings.example: ...eight mortgage companies, seven of which are on the brink of insolvency.
meanings.example_cn: …8家抵押贷款公司，其中7家濒临破产。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone to come to a party, wedding, meal etc
meanings.example: I’m afraid I wasn’t invited.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕我没有受到邀请。

meanings.meaning_en: an invitation to a party, meal etc
to refuse to buy something, use something, or take part in something as a way of protesting
meanings.example: We boycott all products tested on animals.
meanings.example_cn: 我们抵制所有拿动物做试验的产品。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of boycotting something, or the period of time when it is boycotted
someone who always worries about their health and thinks they may be ill, even when they are really not ill
the start or first part of an event, story, period of time etc
meanings.example: There’s a short poem at the beginning of every chapter.
meanings.example_cn: 每一章的开头都有一首短诗。

meanings.example: From the beginning of my career as a journalist, I’ve been writing about gender issues.
meanings.example_cn: 从我一开始干记者这一行，我就写性别议题的题材。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to persuade someone by using influence, arguments, or threats
meanings.example: They are putting pressure on people to vote yes.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正在向民众施加压力，要求他们投赞成票。

meanings.example: You must never give in to pressure .
meanings.example_cn: 你绝不能屈从压力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反常的，不规则的；变态的
meanings.meaning_en: very different from usual in a way that seems strange, worrying, wrong, or dangerous
meanings.example: abnormal behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 反常行为

meanings.meaning_cn: 明显的；可感知的；易觉察的
meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that is palpable is so strong that other people notice it and can feel it around them
meanings.example: There was a palpable sense of relief among the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 众人显然都感到如释重负。

meanings.example: sweeping generalizations about women drivers
meanings.example_cn: 对女性司机一概而论的看法

meanings.meaning_en: affecting many things, or making an important difference to something

meanings.meaning_cn: 打扫；扫除（sweep的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: the position of being the leader of a group, organization, country etc
meanings.example: The US must now take a firm leadership role.
meanings.example_cn: 美国现在必须扮演一个强有力的领导人角色。

meanings.meaning_en: to invent a new word or expression, especially one that many people start to use
meanings.example: The word ‘aromatherapy’ was coined in the 1920s. aromatherapy
meanings.example_cn: （芳香疗法）这个词是在20世纪20年代创造出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, usually flat and round, that is used as money

meanings.meaning_cn: 苛求的；要求高的；吃力的
meanings.meaning_en: needing a lot of ability, effort, or skill
meanings.example: a demanding job
meanings.example_cn: 高要求的工作

meanings.meaning_cn: 潜能；可能性；[电] 电势
meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
meanings.example: The boy has great potential.
meanings.example_cn: 这个男孩有很大的潜力。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future

meanings.meaning_cn: （企业等的）合并；并购；吸收（如刑法中重罪吸收轻罪）
meanings.meaning_en: the joining together of two or more companies or organizations to form one larger one
meanings.example: merger negotiations
meanings.example_cn: 合并谈判

meanings.meaning_en: Entrepreneurship is the state of being an entrepreneur, or the activities associated with being an entrepreneur
meanings.example: They, like other necessity entrepreneurs, may have resorted to entrepreneurship due to a lack of better options.
meanings.example_cn: 他们像其他生存型企业家一样，因为没有更好的选择才会诉诸于创业。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of buying something such as raw materials or  currency  in one place and selling them immediately in another place in order to make a profit from the difference in prices
meanings.example: Astute Singaporeans quickly spotted an arbitrage opportunity.
meanings.example_cn: 精明的新加坡人很快看到了一个套利机会。

meanings.meaning_en: The source of something is the person, place, or thing which you get it from
meanings.example: ...over 40 percent of adults use television as their major source of information about the arts.
meanings.example_cn: …超过40%的成年人利用电视作为他们了解艺术信息的主要来源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发起；向…提供消息（source的ing形式）
meanings.example: Renewable sources of energy must be used.
meanings.example_cn: 可再生的能源必须利用。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what is not used, does not happen etc, when something else is used, happens etc
meanings.example: You probably picked up my keys instead of yours.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能没拿你的钥匙而错拿了我的。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of keeping or putting something in a special place while it is not being used
meanings.example: the storage of highly radioactive material
meanings.example_cn: 高放射性材料的存放

meanings.meaning_en: to sell something at an auction
meanings.example: Eight drawings by French artist Jean Cocteau will be auctioned next week.
meanings.example_cn: 法国艺术家让·科克托的8幅画作将在下周拍卖。

meanings.meaning_en: a public meeting where land, buildings, paintings etc are sold to the person who offers the most money for them
someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
meanings.example: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable
meanings.example_cn: 既便宜又可靠的避孕方法

meanings.example: Miller was a quiet and reliable man.
meanings.example_cn: 米勒是个话不多且可靠的人。

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are being sold
meanings.example: A range of official Disney merchandise was on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 一系列正版的迪士尼商品在出售。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to sell goods or services using methods such as advertising
meanings.example: They inspected the merchandise carefully.
meanings.example_cn: 他们仔细地检查了商品。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where goods are sold to the public. In British English, a store is large and sells many different things, but in American English, a store can be large or small, and sell many things or only one type of thing.
meanings.example: At Christmas the stores stay open late.
meanings.example_cn: 在圣诞节期间，商店营业到很晚。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things away and keep them until you need them
to invite people to your home for a meal, party etc, or to take your company’s customers somewhere to have a meal, drinks etc
meanings.example: Mark usually does the cooking when we entertain.
meanings.example_cn: 我们招待客人时通常都是马克下厨。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s character, especially the way they behave towards other people
meanings.example: Despite their different personalities, they became the best of friends.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管个性不同，他们还是成了最好的朋友。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使复位；改变…的位置；使变换阵地
meanings.example: It is not possible to reposition the rug without damaging it.
meanings.example_cn: 想要挪动地毯又不损坏它是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, or change a decision or agreement
meanings.example: The governor does not have the authority to rescind the ruling.
meanings.example_cn: 该州长无权撤销这项裁决。

meanings.meaning_en: an important victory or success after a difficult struggle
meanings.example: Winning the championship is a great personal triumph .
meanings.example_cn: 赢得冠军是伟大的个人成就。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain a victory or success after a difficult struggle
someone who receives something
meanings.example: ...the largest recipient of U.S. foreign aid.
meanings.example_cn: …最大的美国对外援助接受方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易接受的，感受性强的

meanings.meaning_en: if a government privatizes an organization, industry, or service that it owns or controls, it sells it
meanings.example: Many state-owned companies were privatized.
meanings.example_cn: 许多国有公司被私有化了。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that has been wrapped in paper or put in a special envelope, especially so that it can be sent by post
meanings.example: The parcel was delivered last week.
meanings.example_cn: 那个邮包上周送到了。

meanings.example: He sends regular food parcels to his family in Libya.
meanings.example_cn: 他定期给在利比亚的家人邮寄食品包裹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行动；功绩；证书；[法] 契据
meanings.meaning_en: something someone does, especially something that is very good or very bad
meanings.example: After the morning’s good deeds he deserved a rest.
meanings.example_cn: 上午做了好事之后，他理应休息一下。

meanings.example: She tried to strangle her baby and her lover helped her finish the evil deed .
meanings.example_cn: 她试图掐死自己的宝宝，她的情人帮着完成了这个罪恶的勾当。

meanings.meaning_en: most important
meanings.example: His principal reason for making the journey was to visit his family.
meanings.example_cn: 他那次旅程的首要目的是探访家人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of a school
meanings.example: Teaching is her principal source of income.
meanings.example_cn: 教书是她主要的收入来源。

meanings.meaning_en: the group of people who govern a country or state
meanings.example: The Government are planning further cuts in public spending.
meanings.example_cn: 政府正计划进一步削减公共支出。

meanings.meaning_en: not moving, being done, or happening quickly
meanings.example: The car was travelling at a very slow speed.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车正以非常慢的速度行驶。

meanings.example: a slow walker
meanings.example_cn: 慢慢走着的人

meanings.meaning_en: In informal English, slower is used to mean "at a slower speed" and slowest is used to mean "at the slowest speed." In nonstandard English, slow is used to mean "with little speed."
meanings.example: The economy faces a year of slower growth.
meanings.example_cn: 经济将面临增长更缓慢的一年。

meanings.example: Take a few deep, slow breaths.
meanings.example_cn: 慢慢地深吸几口气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 引擎，发动机；机车，火车头；工具
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a vehicle that produces power to make it move
meanings.example: Is the engine running smoothly?
meanings.example_cn: 发动机运转平稳吗？

meanings.meaning_en: if money that you receive is taxable, you have to pay tax on it
meanings.example: It is worth consulting the guide to see whether your income is taxable.
meanings.example_cn: 值得查一下这本手册看看你的收入是否该纳税。

meanings.meaning_cn: 点心；起提神作用的东西；精力恢复
meanings.meaning_en: small amounts of food and drink that are provided at a meeting, sports event etc
meanings.example: Refreshments will be served after the meeting.
meanings.example_cn: 会后有茶点招待。

meanings.meaning_cn: 洗涤；清洗；洗黑钱（把来路可疑的钱弄得貌似合法）
meanings.meaning_en: to wash and iron clothes, sheets etc
meanings.example: He was jailed of laundering drug money.
meanings.example_cn: 他因帮毒贩洗钱而锒铛入狱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公文包；文件夹；证券投资组合；部长职务
meanings.meaning_en: a large flat case used especially for carrying pictures, documents etc
meanings.example: an investment portfolio
meanings.example_cn: 投资组合

meanings.meaning_cn: 碟；金属板；金属牌；感光底片
meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of metal with words or numbers on it, for example on a door or a car
meanings.example: The brass plate on the door said ‘Dr Rackman’.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜门牌上写着“雷克曼博士”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 导游；情报员，通讯员；送快信的人
meanings.meaning_en: A courier is a person who is paid to take letters and packages direct from one place to another
meanings.example: ...a motorcycle courier.
meanings.example_cn: …一名骑摩托车的信使。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture of an object in a mirror or in the lens of a camera
meanings.example: She peered closely at her image in the mirror.
meanings.example_cn: 她仔细检视镜子中自己的映像。

meanings.meaning_en: Your papers are official documents, such as your passport or identity card, that prove who you are or that give you official permission to do something
meanings.example: A young Moroccan stopped by police refused to show his papers.
meanings.example_cn: 一个被警察拦住的摩洛哥青年拒绝出示他的身份证件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使资本化；以大写字母写；估计…的价值
meanings.meaning_en: to write a letter of the alphabet using a  capital  letter
meanings.example: Our intention is to capitalize the company by any means we can.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的目的是尽一切可能把该公司资本化。

meanings.meaning_en: a card that can be sent in the post without an envelope, especially one with a picture on it
meanings.example: Don’t forget to send us a postcard!
meanings.example_cn: 别忘了给我们寄张明信片！

meanings.meaning_en: to defend yourself successfully against people who attack, criticize, or oppose you
meanings.example: The Chancellor has withstood the criticism and held firm.
meanings.example_cn: 总理顶住批评，坚持立场。

meanings.meaning_en: a relationship between two amounts, represented by a pair of numbers showing how much bigger one amount is than the other
meanings.example: From the database snapshot, note the counters in Listing 3 and monitor the ratio among these counters.
meanings.example_cn: 在数据库快照中，注意清单 3 中的计数器并监控这些计数器之间的比例。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose the place, person etc that you want to hit or reach and point a weapon or another object towards them
meanings.example: Denver aimed his gun but did not shoot.
meanings.example_cn: 丹佛举枪瞄准，但是没有射击。

meanings.meaning_en: something you hope to achieve by doing something

meanings.meaning_cn: 明确的；清楚的；直率的；详述的
meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a way that is very clear and direct
meanings.example: The contrast could not have been made more explicit.
meanings.example_cn: 这个对比再清楚不过了。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement which you make so that a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc is kept for you at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: a dinner reservation
meanings.example_cn: 预订晚餐

meanings.meaning_en: to remember information
meanings.example: I find it very difficult to retain facts.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得具体事实很难记住。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空气，大气；天空；样子；曲调
meanings.meaning_en: the mixture of gases around the Earth, that we breathe
meanings.example: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to let fresh air into a room, especially one that has been closed for a long time
meanings.example: You need to put some air in the tyres.
meanings.example_cn: 你得给轮胎充气了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗暴的；如熊的；股票看跌的
meanings.meaning_en: a bearish market is one where the prices of  share s  are decreasing

meanings.meaning_cn: 巨大的，广大的；无边无际的；非常好的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
meanings.example_cn: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 介绍；引进；采用；入门；传入
meanings.meaning_en: the act of bringing something into use for the first time
meanings.example: The book is a friendly, down-to-earth introduction to physics.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一本简明、实用的物理学入门书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回顾；复习；评论；检讨；检阅
meanings.meaning_en: a careful examination of a situation or process
meanings.example: The policy comes up for review (= will be reviewed ) in April.
meanings.example_cn: 这项政策将在4月份予以审议。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine, consider, and judge a situation or process carefully in order to see if changes are necessary
meanings.example: All fees are subject to review(= may be reviewed ).
meanings.example_cn: 所有费用有待审查。

meanings.meaning_en: to be sold for a particular price in a shop
meanings.example: Their products are retailed all over Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的产品在英国各地都有零售。

meanings.meaning_en: the sale of goods in shops to customers, for their own use and not for selling to anyone else
to be sold for a particular price in a shop

meanings.meaning_cn: 灯火管制；灯火熄灭；暂时的意识丧失
meanings.meaning_en: a period during a war when all the lights in a town or city must be turned off
meanings.example: ...blackout curtains.
meanings.example_cn: …灯火管制时用的窗帘。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan or suggestion for a possible course of action, especially one that you think of suddenly
meanings.example: You should talk to Ken – he's always full of good ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该和肯谈谈，他总是满脑子好主意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 上级的；优秀的，出众的；高傲的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking that you are better than other people – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: She had that superior tone of voice.
meanings.example_cn: 她带着那种傲慢的语气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 上级，长官；优胜者，高手；长者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a higher rank or position than you, especially in a job
to move or lift something to a higher position, place, or level
meanings.example: Can you raise the lamp so I can see?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把灯举高点好让我看清吗？

meanings.meaning_en: an increase in the money you earn
meanings.example: William raised his hat and smiled at her.
meanings.example_cn: 威廉抬一抬帽子，朝她笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel pleased by doing what they want
meanings.example: Nothing I did would ever satisfy my father.
meanings.example_cn: 我做什么都不能让父亲满意。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when something or someone is best, greatest, highest, most successful etc
meanings.example: Sales this month have reached a new peak .
meanings.example_cn: 本月的销售额创了新高。

meanings.meaning_en: When something peaks, it reaches its highest value or its highest level
meanings.example: Most athletes reach their peak in their mid 20s.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数运动员在25岁左右达到巅峰状态。

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about the best, highest, or greatest level or amount of something
meanings.example: He’s past his peak as a tennis player.
meanings.example_cn: 作为网球运动员他已过了巅峰期。

meanings.meaning_en: available or belonging only to particular people, and not shared
meanings.example: Bel Air is an exclusive suburb of Los Angeles.
meanings.example_cn: 贝莱尔是洛杉矶郊外一处高级住宅区。

meanings.meaning_cn: 独家新闻；独家经营的项目；排外者
meanings.meaning_en: an important or exciting story that is printed in only one newspaper, because that newspaper was the first to find out about it
to show that a particular situation exists, or that something is likely to be true
meanings.example: The study indicates a connection between poverty and crime.
meanings.example_cn: 研究显示贫穷和犯罪有关联。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially in the past, who was paid to clean someone’s house, cook for them, answer the door etc, and who often lived in the house
meanings.example: Many young girls became domestic servants .
meanings.example_cn: 许多年轻姑娘成了家仆。

meanings.meaning_en: oil that is obtained from below the surface of the Earth and is used to make petrol,  paraffin  , and various chemical substances
meanings.example: petroleum-based products
meanings.example_cn: 石油产品

meanings.meaning_en: help, such as money or food, given by an organization or government to a country or to people who are in a difficult situation
meanings.example: Foreign aid from many countries poured into the famine area.
meanings.example_cn: 来自许多国家的救援物资纷纷送到饥荒地区。

meanings.meaning_en: to help someone do something
meanings.example: convoys delivering humanitarian aid
meanings.example_cn: 运载人道主义援助的车队

meanings.meaning_cn: 有益的，值得的；有报酬的，报答的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel happy and satisfied because you feel you are doing something useful or important, even if you do not earn much money
meanings.example: Teaching can be a very rewarding career.
meanings.example_cn: 教书可以是一种很有意义的职业。

meanings.meaning_en: You say that someone is endowed with a particular desirable ability, characteristic, or possession when they have it by chance or by birth
meanings.example: You are endowed with wealth, good health and a lively intellect.
meanings.example_cn: 你天生赋有财富、健康，和敏锐的智力。

meanings.meaning_en: to go away from a place or a person
meanings.example: My baby gets upset when I leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 我一离开房间宝宝就会不安。

meanings.meaning_en: time that you are allowed to spend away from your work, especially in the armed forces
meanings.example: Before leaving the train, make sure you have all your belongings with you.
meanings.example_cn: 下火车前一定要带好随身物品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疯狂的；发疯的；愚蠢的；着迷的
meanings.meaning_en: crazy or very silly
meanings.example: He can’t possibly get that finished in time. He must be mad !
meanings.example_cn: 他不可能按时完成的。他一定是疯了！

meanings.example: I’d go mad (= start to feel crazy ) if I was stuck at home all day.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我整天困在家里我会发疯的。

meanings.example: The sale of residential property was not allowed until the late 1980s, and even then under a leasehold system that gives buyers 70 years of ownership.
meanings.example_cn: 居民房产的市场化直到上世纪80年代末期才得以开放，而租赁体系规定购买者也只有70年的产权。

meanings.meaning_en: leasehold property is property that you will own only for the period of time stated in a lease

meanings.meaning_cn: 现在的；流通的，通用的；最近的；草写的
meanings.meaning_en: Ideas and customs that are current are generally accepted and used by most people
meanings.example: Current thinking suggests that toxins only have a small part to play in the build-up of cellulite.
meanings.example_cn: 流行的观点认为毒素只对脂肪团形成起很小的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a continuous movement of water in a river, lake, or sea
a runaway person has left the place where they are supposed to be
meanings.example: The film was a runaway success .
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影一炮而红。

meanings.meaning_en: a biennial event happens once every two years
meanings.example: ...the biennial Commonwealth conference.
meanings.example_cn: ...每两年一次的英联邦会议。

meanings.meaning_en: Finance is also a noun
meanings.example: A United States delegation is in Japan seeking finance for a major scientific project.
meanings.example_cn: 1个美国代表团正在日本为一个重大科研项目寻求资助。

meanings.meaning_cn: 绝对的；透明的；峻峭的；纯粹的
meanings.meaning_en: luck, happiness etc with no other feeling or quality mixed with it
meanings.example: I’ll never forget the look of sheer joy on her face.
meanings.example_cn: 我永远也不会忘记她满脸喜悦的神情。

meanings.meaning_en: straight up or down in an almost vertical line
meanings.example: sheer hypocrisy
meanings.example_cn: 十足的虚伪

meanings.meaning_en: If you refer to the logistics of doing something complicated that involves a lot of people or equipment, you are referring to the skilful organization of it so that it can be done successfully and efficiently
meanings.example: The skills and logistics of getting such a big show on the road pose enormous practical problems.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的一个大型节目进行巡演在技术和后勤方面都会面临大量实际问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 织布机；若隐若现的景象
meanings.meaning_en: a frame or machine on which thread is woven into cloth
meanings.example: Vincent loomed over me, as pale and grey as a tombstone.
meanings.example_cn: 文森特赫然出现在我面前，脸色苍白阴沉得像块墓碑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可怕地出现；朦胧地出现；隐约可见
meanings.meaning_en: to appear as a large unclear shape, especially in a threatening way

meanings.meaning_cn: 使固定；集中于；扎牢；强加于
meanings.meaning_en: to attach something firmly to another object or surface
if a tree bears fruit, it produces fruit
meanings.example: As the plants grow and start to bear fruit they will need a lot of water.
meanings.example_cn: 随着植物的生长及开始结果，它们将需要大量的水分。

meanings.meaning_en: a large strong animal with thick fur, that eats flesh, fruit, and insects
not in danger of being harmed, lost, or stolen
meanings.example: She doesn’t feel safe in the house on her own.
meanings.example_cn: 她独自一人在家感到不安全。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong metal box or cupboard with special locks where you keep money and valuable things
meanings.example: Make sure you keep these documents safe .
meanings.example_cn: 你一定要妥善保管这些文件。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of work that a person or organization has to do
meanings.example: She’s struggling to cope with the heavy workload .
meanings.example_cn: 她在努力应付繁重的工作量。

meanings.meaning_en: to get the most points, votes etc in a game, race, or competition
meanings.example: Brazil were beaten 2–1.
meanings.example_cn: 巴西队以1比2告负。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拍子；敲击；有规律的一连串敲打
meanings.meaning_en: one of a series of regular movements or hitting actions
meanings.example: Labour easily beat the Conservatives in the last election.
meanings.example_cn: 工党在上一届选举中轻松击败保守党。

meanings.meaning_cn: 筋疲力尽的；疲惫不堪的
线的，线型的；直线的，线状的；长度的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of lines, or in the form of a straight line
meanings.example: a linear diagram
meanings.example_cn: 线形图

meanings.meaning_en: a sum of money that a person or organization owes
meanings.example: He had enough money to pay off his outstanding debts.
meanings.example_cn: 他有足够的钱偿还亏欠的债务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回扣，佣金；强烈反应；退回赃物
meanings.meaning_en: money that some­one pays secretly and dishonestly in return for someone’s help
meanings.example: ...alleged kickbacks and illegal party financing.
meanings.example_cn: ...涉嫌收取佣金和非法政党筹资。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经营者；操作员；话务员；行家
meanings.meaning_en: someone who operates a machine or piece of equipment
meanings.example: computers which can be used by untrained operators
meanings.example_cn: 未经训练的操作者也可使用的电脑

meanings.meaning_cn: 全体一致的；意见一致的；无异议的
meanings.meaning_en: a unanimous decision, vote, agreement etc is one in which all the people involved agree
meanings.example: It was decided by a unanimous vote that the school should close.
meanings.example_cn: 关闭学校是大家一致通过的决定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 独立的；单独的；无党派的；不受约束的
meanings.meaning_en: an independent organization is not owned or controlled by, or does not receive money from, another organization or the government
meanings.example: There are plans to split the corporation into a number of smaller independent companies.
meanings.example_cn: 有计划要把这家大企业分割成一些独立的小公司。

meanings.meaning_en: An independent is an independent politician
meanings.example: an independent charity
meanings.example_cn: 独立的慈善机构

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that makes someone unfriendly or unwilling to support you
meanings.example: The latest tax proposals will alienate many voters.
meanings.example_cn: 最新的纳税提案将失去远许多选民的支持。

meanings.meaning_cn: 日元（日本货币单位）；渴望
meanings.meaning_en: the standard unit of money in Japan: symbol ¥
meanings.example: The dollar fell by 24 percent against the yen (= decreased in value in relation to the yen ) between 1970 and 1973.
meanings.example_cn: 在1970年至1973年间，美元对日元的汇率下跌了24%。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of sound produced by a television, radio etc
meanings.example: the volume of trade
meanings.example_cn: 贸易量

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要产品；订书钉；主题；主食
meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of thin wire that is pushed into sheets of paper and bent over to hold them together
meanings.example: staples like flour and rice
meanings.example_cn: 面粉和大米等主食

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要的，大宗生产的；常用的；纺织纤维的
meanings.meaning_en: forming the greatest or most important part of something
achieving what you wanted, or having the effect or result you intended
meanings.example: The operation was successful.
meanings.example_cn: 手术成功了。

meanings.meaning_en: the shape or arrangement of the parts of something
meanings.example: Prices range from $119 to $199, depending on the particular configuration.
meanings.example_cn: 价格根据配置的不同从119美元到199美元不等。

meanings.meaning_en: a small change, improvement, or addition that is made to a law or document, or the process of doing this
meanings.example: constitutional amendments
meanings.example_cn: 宪法修正案

meanings.meaning_en: relating to money, taxes, debts etc that are owned and managed by the government
meanings.example: a fiscal crisis
meanings.example_cn: 财政危机

meanings.example: a fiscal matter
meanings.example_cn: 财政事务

meanings.meaning_cn: 融合，混合；合并，联合；[冶] 混汞法，汞齐化法
最小的；最少的（little的最高级）
meanings.meaning_en: You use the least to mean a smaller amount than anyone or anything else, or the smallest amount possible
meanings.example: I try to offend the least amount of people possible.
meanings.example_cn: 我尽可能少得罪人。

meanings.meaning_en: less than anything or anyone else
even if something better is not true or is not done
usual, typical, or expected
meanings.example: A normal working week is 40 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 一个正常的工作周是40小时。

meanings.meaning_en: the usual state, level, or amount
meanings.example: She was assessed in the normal way, and placed on the waiting list.
meanings.example_cn: 她接受了正常的评估后被列入等候名单。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to a foreign country
meanings.example: I’ve never lived abroad before.
meanings.example_cn: 我以前从未在国外生活过。

meanings.example: She often goes abroad on business.
meanings.example_cn: 她经常出国公干。

meanings.example: We never travelled abroad when we were kids.
meanings.example_cn: 我们小时候从来没有去国外旅行过。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially give someone something such as a prize or money to reward them for something they have done
meanings.example: Moodie has been awarded a golf scholarship at the University of Hawaii.
meanings.example_cn: 穆迪获授夏威夷大学高尔夫奖学金。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a prize or money given to someone to reward them for something they have done
without being affected or prevented by something
meanings.example: We went out in spite of the rain.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下着雨，我们还是出去了。

meanings.example: Kelly loved her husband in spite of the fact that he drank too much.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然丈夫酗酒，凯莉仍然爱着他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意识到的；知道的；有…方面知识的；懂世故的
meanings.meaning_en: if you are aware that a situation exists, you realize or know that it exists
meanings.example: Mr Braley has been made aware of the need for absolute secrecy.
meanings.example_cn: 布雷利先生被告知需要绝对保密。

meanings.example: As you are aware, a fee will be charged annually.
meanings.example_cn: 正如你所知道的那样，每年都要收取一笔费用。

meanings.meaning_en: used before someone’s name or title to begin a letter
meanings.example: Dear Sir or Madam, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的先生或女士，…

meanings.example: Dear Mrs. Wilson, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的威尔逊夫人，…

meanings.example: Dear Meg, ...
meanings.example_cn: 亲爱的梅格，…

meanings.meaning_en: You can call someone dear as a sign of affection
meanings.example: You're a lot like me, dear.
meanings.example_cn: 你和我太像了，亲爱的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 运输；运输系统；运输工具；流放
meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
meanings.example: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市需要改善公共交通。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长时间；[语] 长音节；（服装的）长尺寸；长裤
meanings.example: a long table
meanings.example_cn: 一张长桌子

meanings.meaning_cn: 长的；过长的；做多头的；长时间的；冗长的，长音
meanings.meaning_en: measuring a great length from one end to the other
meanings.example: the longest tunnel in the world
meanings.example_cn: 世界上最长的隧道

meanings.meaning_en: used to ask and talk about particular amounts of time
meanings.example: He stretched out hislong legs.
meanings.example_cn: 他伸开两条长腿。

meanings.meaning_en: for a long time
meanings.example: along lineof people
meanings.example_cn: 长长的一排队伍

meanings.meaning_cn: 安装；分期付款；部分；就职

meanings.meaning_en: a state in which all your weight is evenly spread so that you do not fall
meanings.example: I lost my balance and fell on my face.
meanings.example_cn: 我失去平衡，脸着地摔倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: if a government balances the budget, they make the amount of money that they spend equal to the amount of money available
a moral or legal duty to do something
meanings.example: Employers have an obligation to treat all employees equally.
meanings.example_cn: 雇主有责任对所有员工一视同仁。

meanings.meaning_en: if something conducts electricity or heat, it allows electricity or heat to travel along or through it
meanings.example: Aluminium, being a metal, readily conducts heat .
meanings.example_cn: 铝这种金属导热性能很好。

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone behaves, especially in public, in their job etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 镀金；小母猪；眩目的外表
meanings.meaning_en: a thin shiny material, such as gold or something similar, used to cover objects for decoration
meanings.example: gilt lettering
meanings.example_cn: 烫金字

meanings.meaning_en: covered with gilt

meanings.meaning_cn: 镀金（gild的过去式和过去分词）

meanings.meaning_en: to give playing cards to each of the players in a game
meanings.example: Whose turn is it to deal?
meanings.example_cn: 轮到谁发牌了？

meanings.meaning_en: treatment of a particular type that is given or received

meanings.meaning_cn: 秋天；成熟期；渐衰期，凋落期
meanings.meaning_en: the season between summer and winter, when leaves change colour and the weather becomes cooler
meanings.example: autumn mists
meanings.example_cn: 秋天的雾霭

meanings.meaning_cn: 女主人，女老板；女服务员；舞女；女房东
meanings.meaning_en: a woman at a party, meal etc who has invited all the guests and provides them with food, drink etc
meanings.example: The hostess introduced them.
meanings.example_cn: 女主人介绍了他们。

meanings.meaning_en: to show something that is usually covered or hidden
meanings.example: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.
meanings.example_cn: 他撩起T恤衫，露出横贯胸部的锯齿状伤疤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自由主义的；慷慨的；不拘泥的；宽大的
meanings.meaning_en: allowing people or organizations a lot of political or economic freedom

meanings.example_cn: 对两性关系比较开通的态度

meanings.example_cn: 这些价格控制违反了支持自由市场的自由主义者的所有金融原则。

meanings.meaning_cn: 俘获；夺得；捕捉，拍摄,录制

meanings.meaning_en: when you catch someone in order to make them a prisoner

meanings.example_cn: 40名被俘虏的法国士兵

meanings.meaning_en: the ability of a company, country, or a product to compete with others

meanings.example_cn: 新机器帮助公司提高了生产力，增强了竞争力。

meanings.meaning_en: very rarely or almost never

meanings.example_cn: 卡伦很少见他这么生气过。

meanings.meaning_cn: 巩固，加强；用水泥涂；接合

meanings.example: Nothing cements a friendship between countries so much as trade.
meanings.example_cn: 没有任何东西能比贸易更能巩固国家间的友谊了。

meanings.meaning_en: a grey powder made from  lime  and clay that becomes hard when it is mixed with water and allowed to dry, and that is used in building

meanings.meaning_en: completely
people who have died

meanings.meaning_cn: 掺水的；洒有水的，洒了水的；有波纹的；加虚股的（面值增加而实值未按比例增加）
meanings.example: He went out to water the plants.

meanings.meaning_cn: 浇水，供以水（water的过去式和过去分词）
meanings.meaning_en: If you water plants, you pour water over them in order to help them to grow
something that happens as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
meanings.example: I don’t suppose it is of any consequence now.
meanings.example_cn: 现在我觉得这事一点都无所谓了。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to behave in a calm controlled way even in a difficult situation

meanings.meaning_en: an illness that is not very serious

meanings.example_cn: 小恙

meanings.meaning_cn: 轻快的；有浮力的；上涨的

meanings.example_cn: 欣欣向荣的经济

meanings.meaning_en: relating to money or the management of money

meanings.example_cn: 财务往来

meanings.meaning_en: something that you get because you have done something good or helpful or have worked hard

meanings.example_cn: 学校有奖惩制度以鼓励良好行为。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone because they have done something good or helpful or have worked for it

meanings.meaning_cn: 很可能的；合适的；有希望的
meanings.meaning_en: suitable for a particular purpose

meanings.meaning_cn: 压力；强调；紧张；重要性；重读
meanings.meaning_en: continuous feelings of worry about your work or personal life, that prevent you from relaxing
meanings.example: Your headaches are due to stress.

meanings.meaning_cn: 强调；使紧张；加压力于；用重音读
meanings.meaning_en: to emphasize a statement, fact, or idea
meanings.example: Janet’s been under a lot of stress since her mother’s illness.
meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特自从母亲生病以来承受了很大的压力。

meanings.meaning_en: if something bursts, or if you burst it, it breaks open or apart suddenly and violently so that its contents come out
meanings.example: The pipes had burst and the house was under two feet of water.
meanings.example_cn: 水管爆裂，房子被水淹了两英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of something bursting or the place where it has burst
someone who owns or works in a shop that sells newspapers, magazines, sweets and cigarettes
official orders or laws stopping trade, communication etc with another country, as a way of forcing its leaders to make political changes
meanings.example: a resolution to impose sanctions (= start using sanctions ) on DPRK
meanings.example_cn: 对朝鲜实施制裁的决议

meanings.meaning_en: to officially accept or allow something

meanings.example_cn: 贸易制裁的威胁

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to keep and check financial accounts, calculate taxes etc

meanings.example_cn: 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

meanings.meaning_cn: 临时的，暂时的；中间的；间歇的
meanings.meaning_en: intended to be used or accepted for a short time only, until something or someone final can be made or found

meanings.example_cn: 中期报告

meanings.meaning_cn: 过渡时期，中间时期；暂定
meanings.meaning_en: in the period of time between two events

meanings.example_cn: 他收到暂时支付的一万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a long time without stopping

meanings.example_cn: 持续了五个星期的降雨

meanings.meaning_cn: 古典的；经典的；传统的；第一流的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a traditional style or set of ideas

meanings.example_cn: 经典相对论

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 极大，最大限度；最大量
meanings.meaning_en: the largest number or amount that is possible or is allowed
meanings.example: We might have a third child, but that’s the absolute maximum .
meanings.example_cn: 我们可能会要第三个孩子，但这绝对是极限了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最高的；最多的；最大极限的
meanings.meaning_en: the maximum amount, quantity, speed etc is the largest that is possible or allowed

meanings.meaning_cn: 租约；租期；租赁物；租赁权
meanings.meaning_en: a legal agreement which allows you to use a building, car etc for a period of time, in return for rent
meanings.example: The landlord refused to renew his lease.
meanings.example_cn: 房东拒绝和他续签租约。

meanings.meaning_en: to use a building, car etc under a lease

meanings.example_cn: 99年期的租约于1999年到期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同时代的人；同时期的东西
meanings.meaning_en: someone who lived or was in a particular place at the same time as someone else
meanings.example: Like most of my contemporaries, I grew up in a vastly different world.
meanings.example_cn: 像我同时代的大多数人一样，我在一个非常不同的世界里长大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 当代的；同时代的；属于同一时期的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the present time
a large sign used for advertising
meanings.example: Or put it on your busines card, billboard or a bumper sticker.
meanings.example_cn: 或者把它放在你的名片、布告板、或者缓冲器中。

meanings.example: I tell teams working on print ads to start by creating a billboard.
meanings.example_cn: 我告诉平面广告的工作团队，从制作一个广告牌开始。

meanings.meaning_cn: 建议；示意；微量，细微的迹象
meanings.meaning_en: an idea, plan, or possibility that someone mentions, or the act of mentioning it

meanings.example_cn: 任何建议都欢迎。

meanings.meaning_en: money added to someone’s wages, especially as a reward for good work

meanings.example_cn: 长期储户可获现金红利。

meanings.example: Traditionally cut blue jeans carry a whiff of the laborer about them, so denim on a leader suggests a willingness to roll up the sleeves and dig in.
meanings.example_cn: 传统剪裁的蓝色牛仔裤带有一种劳动者的气息，因此领导者穿着仔裤可以表达一种愿意卷起袖子大干一场的意思。

meanings.example: The idea behind diversification is to invest in a large number of assets so that a loss in any particular investment is minimized by gains in others.
meanings.example_cn: 多元化背后的想法是投资一个数额巨大的资产，这样任何特定投资的损失都被其他投资获得的收益最小化了。

meanings.meaning_cn: [金融] 有价证券；担保；抵押物（security的复数）；保证人
meanings.meaning_en: If something is security for a loan, you promise to give that thing to the person who lends you money, if you fail to pay the money back

meanings.example_cn: 中央银行将提供特别贷款,而各家银行将以土地作为抵押品。

meanings.meaning_en: to become very successful or very strong and healthy

meanings.example_cn: 在热带雨林蓬勃生长的植物

meanings.meaning_en: to give a situation, event etc a particular quality

meanings.example_cn: 银行正在重新评估其贷款标准。

meanings.example_cn: 停车限制将会严格执行。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可移动的；机动的；易变的；非固定的
meanings.meaning_en: not fixed in one position, and easy to move and use in different places

meanings.example_cn: 移动式空调器

to get things of the same type from different places and bring them together

meanings.example_cn: 她搜集了25年食谱，把它们编成一本烹饪书。

meanings.example_cn: 这家公司搜集有关消费者趋向的信息。

meanings.example: We’ve been out collecting signatures for our petition.

meanings.meaning_cn: （英）[金融] 公司债券；[税收] 退税证明书

to make someone feel very unhappy

meanings.example_cn: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone has poise, they are calm, dignified, and self-controlled

meanings.example_cn: 比她的长相更让他惊讶的是她的沉着镇定。

meanings.meaning_en: to put or hold something in a carefully balanced position, especially above something else
the system of charging taxes

meanings.meaning_cn: 由铁道运输；铺设铁路；以捏造不实之罪使入狱

meanings.meaning_en: a railway or the railway

meanings.meaning_cn: 车库；汽车修理厂；飞机库

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of land completely surrounded by water

concerned with making laws

meanings.example_cn: 新的议会将没有立法权。

meanings.example: new legislative measures to stem the flow of drugs into the US

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸引人的；有魅力的；引人注目的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is attractive is good looking, especially in a way that makes you sexually interested in them

meanings.example_cn: 妩媚动人的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: the combining of two or more things so that they work together effectively

meanings.example_cn: 种族融合的问题

meanings.meaning_en: a formal written agreement between two or more countries or governments

meanings.example_cn: 双方都同意签署该条约。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古鲁（指印度教等宗教的宗师或领袖）；领袖；专家

meanings.example: We find the defendant not guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 我们裁定被告无罪。

meanings.meaning_en: the person in a court of law who has been  accused  of doing something illegal
to taste food or drink in order to see what it is like
meanings.example: a chance to sample the local food
meanings.example_cn: 品尝当地食品的一个机会

meanings.meaning_en: a small part or amount of something that is examined in order to find out something about the whole

meanings.meaning_en: the money that you receive for the work that you do
meanings.example: an employee’s average weekly earnings
meanings.example_cn: 雇员的平均周薪

meanings.meaning_en: something that someone needs or asks for

meanings.example_cn: 难民的主要需求是食物和住所。

meanings.meaning_en: the business of selling and sending goods to other countries

meanings.example_cn: 小麦是该国的主要出口商品之一。

meanings.meaning_en: to sell goods to another country
to make someone feel unhappy because something they hoped for did not happen or was not as good as they expected
meanings.example: I hated to disappoint her.
meanings.example_cn: 我不愿意让她失望。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超速，加速；加速，迅速前行；兴隆
meanings.meaning_en: to be driving faster than the legal limit

meanings.example_cn: 昨天我在 A40 号干线公路上超速行驶被逮到。

meanings.meaning_cn: 速度，速率；迅速，快速；昌盛，繁荣
meanings.meaning_en: the rate at which something moves or travels

meanings.meaning_cn: 统一的；一致的；相同的；均衡的；始终如一的
meanings.meaning_en: being the same in all its parts or among all its members

meanings.example_cn: A 级鸡蛋必须大小相同。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of clothing worn by all the members of a group or organization such as the police, the army etc

meanings.example: He kept his gaze fixed on the car ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 他的目光一直盯着前面的那辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 向前地；领先地；在（某人或某事物的）前面；预先；在将来，为未来
meanings.meaning_en: a short distance in front of someone or something
meanings.example: We could see the lights of Las Vegas up ahead .
meanings.example_cn: 我们能看到前方拉斯维加斯的灯光。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring weight, equal to 28.35 grams. There are 16 ounces in a pound.
meanings.example: One ounce of almonds contains nearly half the recommended daily amount.
meanings.example_cn: 一盎司杏仁大约包含每日需求量的一半。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement about what you think is going to happen, or the act of making this statement
meanings.example: The data can be used to make useful economic predictions .
meanings.example_cn: 这些数据可用于进行有用的经济预测。

meanings.meaning_cn: 手段，影响力；杠杆作用；杠杆效率
meanings.meaning_en: influence that you can use to make people do what you want
meanings.example: diplomatic leverage by the US
meanings.example_cn: 美国的外交影响力

meanings.meaning_en: to spread or use resources(= money, skills, buildings etc that an organization has available ), ideas etc again in several different ways or in different parts of a company, system etc
to encourage or help an activity to begin or develop further
meanings.example: Her interest in art was stimulated by her father.
meanings.example_cn: 她对艺术的兴趣是她父亲激发的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially agrees to help someone else, or to be responsible for what they do
meanings.example: You cannot get a work visa without an American sponsor.
meanings.example_cn: 如果没有美国担保人就拿不到工作签证。

meanings.meaning_en: to give money to a sports event, theatre, institution etc, especially in exchange for the right to advertise

meanings.meaning_cn: 审判地；犯罪地点；发生地点；集合地点
meanings.example: The first thing to do is book a venue.
meanings.example_cn: 首先要做的是预订一个会场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 记忆，记忆力；内存，[计] 存储器；回忆
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ability to remember things, places, experiences etc
meanings.example: He has lots of happy memories of his stay in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 他对在日本逗留的那段时光有许多美好的回忆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 汇票；草稿；选派；（尤指房间、烟囱、炉子等供暖系统中的）（小股）气流
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing or a plan that is not yet in its finished form

meanings.example_cn: 他的新小说的草稿

meanings.meaning_en: to write a plan, letter, report etc that will need to be changed before it is in its finished form
meanings.example: I read the first draft and thought it was very good.
meanings.example_cn: 我读了第一稿，觉得非常好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 初步画出或（写出）的；（设计、草图、提纲或版本）正在起草中的，草拟的；以草稿形式的；草图的
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing that is not yet in its finished form
meanings.example: All parties eventually approved the final draft (= finished form ) of the peace treaty.
meanings.example_cn: 各方最后都同意了和平条约的终稿。

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of something that you no longer need or want
meanings.example: The company is planning to shed about a quarter of its workforce.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司正计划裁减约四分之一的人员。

meanings.meaning_en: a small building, often made of wood, used especially for storing things
meanings.example: The magazine is desperately trying to shed its old-fashioned image.
meanings.example_cn: 这份杂志急于摆脱其过时的形象。

meanings.meaning_cn: [会计] 拖欠；待完成的事；应付欠款
meanings.meaning_en: if someone is in arrears, or if their payments are in arrears, they are late in paying something that they should pay regularly, such as rent
meanings.example: Many people are in arrears with their rent.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人拖欠房租。

meanings.meaning_en: a special advantage that is given only to one person or group of people
meanings.example: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
meanings.example_cn: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat some people or things better than others

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 近似法；接近；[数] 近似值
meanings.meaning_en: a number, amount etc that is not exact, but is almost correct

meanings.example_cn: 那是一个挑选下任老板的大体近似方式。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to cooperate
meanings.example: He was doing his best to be cooperative.
meanings.example_cn: 他在尽全力配合。

meanings.meaning_en: a business or organization owned equally by all the people working there
meanings.example: a cooperative witness
meanings.example_cn: 肯配合的目击者

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement
meanings.example: She replied to a lonely hearts ad she spotted in the New York Times.
meanings.example_cn: 她回复了在《纽约时报》上看到的一则求友广告。

meanings.example: Accounting information is the evidence of economic decision between the nation, investors and debtee.
meanings.example_cn: 会计信息是国家、投资人、债权人和相关方经济决策的依据；

meanings.meaning_en: a method of doing something or dealing with a problem
meanings.example: He decided to adopt a different approach and teach the Bible through story-telling.
meanings.example_cn: 他决定采用一种不同的方法，通过讲故事来教授《圣经》。

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards or nearer to someone or something
meanings.example: This book takes an unorthodox approach to art criticism.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书采用的是非传统的艺术评论方法。

meanings.example: The award rendered by: the arbitrator (s) shall be final and binding upon both parties.
meanings.example_cn: 仲裁人所作的裁定应是决定性的，并对双方有约束力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 方式；习惯；种类；规矩；风俗
meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is done or happens
meanings.example: He felt some guilt over the manner of her death.
meanings.example_cn: 她以这种方式死去，他心里有些内疚。

meanings.meaning_en: to correct or make small changes to something that is written or spoken
meanings.example: The law was amended to include women.
meanings.example_cn: 该法律经修改把女性也包括在内。

meanings.example: The defendant later amended his evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 被告后来修改了证词。

meanings.meaning_en: an increase in amount, number, or size
meanings.example: measures to stimulate economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 刺激经济增长的措施

meanings.meaning_en: the act of paying someone to work for you
meanings.example: She was offered employment in the sales office.
meanings.example_cn: 她获聘在销售部工作。

meanings.example: The idea is that away from the frontline, soldiers can swop stories and wind down with those who understand their immediate problems.
meanings.example_cn: 这一理念就是让战士远离前线，使他们能交换各自情况，能与理解他们心情的人取得联系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神秘的；不可理解的；不能预测的；不可思议的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is inscrutable shows no emotion or reaction in the expression on their face so that it is impossible to know what they are feeling or thinking
meanings.example: He stood silent and inscrutable.
meanings.example_cn: 他静静地站着，让人难以捉摸。

meanings.meaning_en: Makeup consists of things such as lipstick, eye shadow, and powder which some women put on their faces to make themselves look more attractive or which actors use to change or improve their appearance
meanings.example: Normally she wore little makeup, but this evening was clearly an exception.
meanings.example_cn: 通常她很少化妆，可今晚显然是个例外。

meanings.meaning_en: the cases, bags etc that you carry when you are travelling
meanings.example: They searched his luggage for illegal drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他们搜查他的行李看是否藏有毒品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可以忍受的；足可支撑的；养得起的；可持续的
meanings.meaning_en: able to continue without causing damage to the environment
meanings.example: The government should do more to promote sustainable agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 政府应该做更多工作来推动可持续农业的发展。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遗产；传统；继承物；继承权
meanings.meaning_en: the traditional beliefs, values, customs etc of a family, country, or society
meanings.example: the importance of preserving the national heritage
meanings.example_cn: 保护民族遗产的重要性

meanings.meaning_cn: 市场的；可销售的；有销路的
meanings.meaning_en: marketable goods, skills etc can be sold easily because people want them
meanings.example: The program is designed to provide students with real, marketable skills.
meanings.example_cn: 本计划旨在让学生掌握符合市场需求的真正技能。

meanings.meaning_en: an inclusive price or cost includes everything
meanings.example: Not everyone shares his vision of an inclusive America.
meanings.example_cn: 不是所有人都同意他的观点，认为美国是个包容性很强的国家。

meanings.example: Rough seas today prevented specially equipped ships from skimming oil off the water's surface.
meanings.example_cn: 今天汹涌的海浪使特别装备的船只无法撇去浮在水面上的石油。

meanings.meaning_en: If you skim something from the surface of a liquid, you remove it

meanings.meaning_cn: 咨询；磋商；[临床] 会诊；讨论会
meanings.meaning_en: a discussion in which people who are affected by or involved in something can give their opinions
meanings.example: A follow-up consultation was arranged for two weeks’ time.
meanings.example_cn: 复诊安排在两周之后。

meanings.meaning_en: a rule, problem etc that prevents people from doing something, or limits what they can do
meanings.example: He advocated the removal of trade barriers.
meanings.example_cn: 他提倡消除贸易壁垒。

meanings.meaning_en: If you rework something such as an idea or a piece of writing, you reorganize it and make changes to it in order to improve it or bring it up to date
meanings.example: See if you can rework your schedule and come up with practical ways to reduce the number of hours you're on call.
meanings.example_cn: 看看你能否修改你的时间表，想出切实可行的方法来减少你待命的时间。

meanings.meaning_en: to show someone that something is wrong, and make it right
meanings.example: Correct my pronunciation if it’s wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我的发音错了，请给我纠正。

meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes
meanings.example: ‘She’s in Ireland now.’ ‘She was,’ Farrell corrected him.
meanings.example_cn: “她现在在爱尔兰。”“她之前在爱尔兰。”法雷尔纠正他道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 期货；未来，前途（future的复数形式）
meanings.meaning_en: The future is the period of time that will come after the present, or the things that will happen then
meanings.example: The spokesman said no decision on the proposal was likely in the immediate future.
meanings.example_cn: 该发言人称近期不太可能有有关该提案的决议。

meanings.meaning_en: a small round flat object on your shirt, coat etc that you pass through a hole to fasten it
meanings.example: small pearl buttons
meanings.example_cn: 小的珍珠纽扣

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten clothes with buttons, or to be fastened with buttons
meanings.example: A button was missing from his shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 他的衬衫上掉了一颗纽扣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 票；入场券，标签；（美）候选人名单；证明书；交通罚款单
meanings.meaning_en: a printed piece of paper which shows that you have paid to enter a cinema, travel on a bus, plane etc
meanings.example: How much does it say on the price ticket ?
meanings.example_cn: 价签上标明的价格是多少？

meanings.meaning_cn: 加标签于；指派；对…开出交通违规罚单
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a ticket for parking their car in the wrong place, driving too fast etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 宫殿似的；宏伟的；壮丽的
meanings.meaning_en: a palatial building etc is large and beautifully decorated
meanings.example: a palatial country residence
meanings.example_cn: 富丽堂皇的乡村住宅

meanings.meaning_cn: 商业的；营利的；靠广告收入的
meanings.meaning_en: related to business and the buying and selling of goods and services
meanings.example: Our top priorities must be profit and commercial growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须把利润和贸易增长作为我们的第一要务。

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement on television or radio

meanings.meaning_cn: 流浪；践踏，踩；脚步沉重地行走
meanings.meaning_en: to walk somewhere slowly and with heavy steps
meanings.example: He tramped the streets looking for work.
meanings.example_cn: 他在街上四处奔走，寻找工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流浪者；沉重的脚步声；徒步旅行
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has no home or job and moves from place to place, often asking for food or money
a type of aircraft with large metal blades on top which turn around very quickly to make it fly
meanings.example: You can helicopter to the island.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以乘坐直升机去那个岛。

meanings.example: The helicopter is staying over our heads.
meanings.example_cn: 那架直升机就在我们头顶的上方。

meanings.example: They were succoured from the fire by the rescue helicopter.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被援救的直升机从大火中解救了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: the greatest or least amount, number, speed etc that is allowed
meanings.example: a 55 mph speed limit
meanings.example_cn: 55英里的时速限制

meanings.meaning_en: to stop an amount or number from increasing beyond a particular point
a person, group, or organization that owes money
meanings.example: ...important improvements in the situation of debtor countries.
meanings.example_cn: …债务国境况的重大改善。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承诺，保证；委托；承担义务；献身
meanings.meaning_en: a promise to do something or to behave in a particular way
meanings.example: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ?
meanings.example_cn: 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

meanings.meaning_cn: 背书；认可；签署；赞同；在背面签名
meanings.meaning_en: to express formal support or approval for someone or something
meanings.example: I can endorse their opinion wholeheartedly.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以全心全意地支持他们的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: what actually happens or is true, not what is imagined or thought
meanings.example: the distinction between fantasy and reality
meanings.example_cn: 幻想和现实之间的区别

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of wood, plastic, card etc that you use for a particular purpose such as cutting things on, or for playing indoor games
meanings.example: Martha was chopping vegetables on a wooden board.
meanings.example_cn: 玛莎正在用一块木砧板切蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 上（飞机、车、船等）；用板盖上；给提供膳宿
meanings.meaning_en: to get on a bus, plane, train etc in order to travel somewhere
meanings.example: a chess board
meanings.example_cn: 棋盘

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful person, organization, group etc is able to control and influence events and other people’s actions
meanings.example: He was one of the most powerful men in Bohemia.
meanings.example_cn: 他是波希米亚最有权势的人物之一。

meanings.example: a very influential and powerful family
meanings.example_cn: 很有权势的家庭

meanings.meaning_cn: 沮丧；洼地；不景气；忧愁；低气压区
meanings.meaning_en: a long period during which there is very little business activity and a lot of people do not have jobs
meanings.example: the devastating effects of economic depression
meanings.example_cn: 经济萧条的灾难性影响

meanings.meaning_en: something made up of different parts or materials
meanings.example: Cuba is a composite of diverse traditions and people.
meanings.example_cn: 古巴是一个不同传统和民族的融合体。

meanings.meaning_en: made up of different parts or materials
to say that you will cause someone harm or trouble if they do not do what you want
meanings.example: Postal workers are threatening a strike if they don’t receive a pay increase.
meanings.example_cn: 邮政工人威胁如果不加薪，他们就要罢工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以较小尺寸设计；缩小尺寸；裁减人数
meanings.example: The airline has downsized its workforce by 30%.
meanings.example_cn: 这家航空公司裁员30%。

meanings.meaning_en: (esp of a political unit) a system or policy of economic self-sufficiency aimed at removing the need for imports
meanings.example: Were Indians “mindlessly aping” Western lifestyles more or less when India had its idiotic policy of autarky?
meanings.example_cn: 印度自给自足的的白痴政策是多少在“盲目模仿”西方的生活方式么？

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in activity or speed
meanings.example: There has been a sharp slowdown in economic growth.
meanings.example_cn: 在经济增长方面一直存在急剧的减速。

meanings.example: To balance the books, he raised some taxes, notably VAT, but three-quarters of the savings will come from spending cuts.
meanings.example_cn: 为了平衡账簿，他增加了部分税收，特别是增值税，但是四分之三的节余将来自削减开支。

meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly that someone is not guilty or responsible for something
meanings.example: A police investigation yesterday absolved the police of all blame in the incident.
meanings.example_cn: 警方昨天的调查为其开脱了在这件事故中所有的责任。

meanings.meaning_en: to wait until a later time to do something
meanings.example: Don’t delay – send off for the information now.
meanings.example_cn: 别犹豫——即刻去函索取信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 延期；耽搁；被耽搁或推迟的时间
meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something has to wait, or the length of the waiting time
meanings.example: He delayed his decision on whether to call an election.
meanings.example_cn: 在是否宣布举行选举一事上，他推迟作出决定。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose work needs physical strength, for example building work
meanings.example: a farm labourer
meanings.example_cn: 农场工人

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
meanings.example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
meanings.example_cn: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工厂，车间；植物；设备；庄稼
meanings.meaning_en: a living thing that has leaves and roots and grows in earth, especially one that is smaller than a tree
meanings.example: Don’t forget to water the plants.
meanings.example_cn: 别忘记给植物浇水。

meanings.meaning_en: to put plants or seeds in the ground to grow
a large area of a country or of the world, usually without exact limits
meanings.example: efforts to bring peace to the region
meanings.example_cn: 给这个地区带来和平的努力

meanings.meaning_en: to judge how good, useful, or successful something is
meanings.example: You should be able to evaluate your own work.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该能够评估自己的工作。

meanings.example: Her hair was thick, glossy and in tiptop condition.
meanings.example_cn: 她头发浓密、有光泽且发质一流。

meanings.meaning_en: You can use tiptop to indicate that something is extremely good
computer machinery and equipment, as opposed to the programs that make computers work
meanings.example: ...a shop from which an uncle had sold hardware and timber.
meanings.example_cn: …一家叔叔曾经在那里卖五金器具和木材的店铺。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time between two events, activities etc
meanings.example: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开房间，过了一会儿就带回来一条消息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发展；开发；发育；住宅小区（专指由同一开发商开发的）；[摄] 显影
meanings.meaning_en: the process of gradually becoming bigger, better, stronger, or more advanced
meanings.example: child development
meanings.example_cn: 儿童发育

meanings.meaning_en: if a person or business relocates, or if they are relocated, they move to a different place
meanings.example: If the company was to relocate, most employees would move.
meanings.example_cn: 如果公司要迁移，大多数员工得搬家。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of judging officially how an argument should be settled
meanings.example: The dispute is going to arbitration (=  someone is being asked to arbitrate  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这场争议将提请仲裁。

meanings.meaning_en: the room, building etc where you work
meanings.example: ...the difficulties facing women in the workplace.
meanings.example_cn: …妇女在工作场所中面临的困难。

meanings.meaning_en: moved to one side or away from you
meanings.example: He pushed his half-eaten salad aside and left.
meanings.example_cn: 他推开吃了一半的色拉走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 旁白；私语，悄悄话；离题的话
meanings.meaning_en: words spoken by an actor to the people watching a play, that the other characters in the play do not hear
meanings.example: He stepped aside to let Katherine go in first.
meanings.example_cn: 他站到一边让凯瑟琳先进去。

meanings.example: Mark drew me aside and explained the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 马克把我拉到一边给我解释这个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong feeling of excitement and pleasure, or the thing that makes you feel this
meanings.example: Winning first place must have been quite a thrill.
meanings.example_cn: 赢得第一名肯定让人非常激动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使…颤动；使…紧张；使…感到兴奋或激动
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel excited and happy
meanings.example: Even though I’ve been acting for years, I still get a thrill out of going on stage.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管我演了多年戏，走上舞台我仍然感到十分激动。

meanings.meaning_en: to find or provide a way of dealing with a problem
meanings.example: Charlie thinks money will solve all his problems.
meanings.example_cn: 查理认为钱能解决他所有的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把…做成流线型；使现代化；组织；使合理化；使简单化
meanings.meaning_en: to make something such as a business, organization etc work more simply and effectively
meanings.example: efforts to streamline the production process
meanings.example_cn: 简化生产过程的努力

meanings.meaning_en: a small change made to a machine, system, or calculation
meanings.example: a period of adjustment
meanings.example_cn: 一段调整期

meanings.meaning_en: to stop taking part in an activity, belonging to an organization etc, or to make someone do this
meanings.example: calls for Britain to withdraw from the European Union
meanings.example_cn: 要求英国退出欧盟的呼声

meanings.example: Deposit any random checks you get - like rebate, rewards or reimbursement checks - into this fund.
meanings.example_cn: 把你挣的随机钱——比如像回扣，鉴赏，或偿款等——存到这个基金里。

meanings.example: I placed an order for desktop pc memory which came with a $20 MIR [mail in rebate].
meanings.example_cn: 我订购了一个价值20美元的桌面个人电脑存储器，可以申请回扣的。

meanings.meaning_en: within a particular country
meanings.example: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对干涉其他国家内政不感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of all the things that are happening and all the conditions that exist at a particular time in a particular place
meanings.example: I explained the situation to everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 我向大家介绍了一下情况。

meanings.example: In the first half they realise their boss is exploiting them and begin to understand the theory of surplus value.
meanings.example_cn: 在前半部，工人们认识到他们的老板是在剥削他们，开始了解剩余价值理论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 称做…；定名为…；给…称号；使…有权利
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone the official right to do or have something
meanings.example: a documentary entitled ‘The Price of Perfection’
meanings.example_cn: 一部名为《完美的代价》的纪录片

meanings.meaning_en: happening or coming after something else
meanings.example: These skills were passed on to subsequent generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这些技能代代相传。

meanings.meaning_cn: 理想的；完美的；想象的；不切实际的
meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable that something could possibly be
meanings.example: advice on how to reach your ideal weight
meanings.example_cn: 如何达到理想体重的建议

meanings.meaning_en: a principle about what is morally right or a perfect standard that you hope to achieve
meanings.example: The scheme offers an ideal opportunity for youngsters to get training.
meanings.example_cn: 该计划为年轻人提供了获得培训的极好机会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的；含糊的；不明确的；暧昧的
meanings.meaning_en: unclear because someone does not give enough detailed information or does not say exactly what they mean
meanings.example: The governor gave only a vague outline of his tax plan.
meanings.example_cn: 州长只是含糊地大致说了一下他的税务计划。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结婚；婚姻生活；密切结合，合并
meanings.meaning_en: the relationship between two people who are married, or the state of being married
meanings.example: She has three daughters from a previous marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她前一次婚姻生了三个女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: the final result of a meeting, discussion, war etc – used especially when no one knows what it will be until it actually happens
meanings.example: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
meanings.example_cn: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

meanings.meaning_en: a work of art, a piece of writing or music etc that is of very high quality or that is the best that a particular artist, writer etc has produced
meanings.example: Mary Shelley was just 18 when she wrote the horror masterpiece ‘Frankenstein’.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽•雪莱创作《科学怪人》这部恐怖小说名作的时候年仅18岁。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the meaning of something clearer by giving examples
meanings.example: Let me give an example to illustrate the point.
meanings.example_cn: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

meanings.meaning_en: getting annoyed quickly or easily
meanings.example: Jo was tired, irritable, and depressed.
meanings.example_cn: 乔疲惫暴躁，而且情绪低落。

meanings.meaning_en: to send something somewhere using a particular route
meanings.example: Trains are taking a lot of freight that used to be routed via trucks.
meanings.example_cn: 火车正在运送过去由卡车运送的大批货物。

meanings.meaning_en: a way from one place to another

meanings.meaning_cn: 条款，项目；一则；一件商品（或物品）
meanings.meaning_en: a single thing, especially one thing in a list, group, or set of things
meanings.example: He opened the cardboard box and took out each item.
meanings.example_cn: 他打开纸板箱把里面的物品一一拿出来。

meanings.example: The store is having a sale on furniture and household items.
meanings.example_cn: 这家商店正在减价出售家具和家居用品。

meanings.example: luxury items such as exotic spices and perfumes
meanings.example_cn: 异国香料和香水之类的奢侈品

meanings.meaning_cn: 账户；解释；账目，账单；理由；描述
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement in which a bank keeps your money safe so that you can pay more in or take money out
meanings.example: My salary is paid into my bank account.
meanings.example_cn: 我的工资直接存入我的银行账户。

meanings.example: I’ve opened an account with Barclay’s Bank.
meanings.example_cn: 我在巴克莱银行开了一个账户。

meanings.meaning_en: to collect and save large amounts of food, money etc, especially when it is not necessary to do so
meanings.example: families who hoarded food during the strike
meanings.example_cn: 罢工期间囤积食品的家庭

meanings.meaning_en: a collection of things that someone hides somewhere, especially so they can use them later
at a time in the future or in the past, although you do not know exactly when
meanings.example: The sales figures won't be released until sometime next month.
meanings.example_cn: 销售数据要到下个月的某个时候才会公布。

meanings.meaning_en: former
A detective novel or story is one in which a detective tries to solve a crime
meanings.example: ...Arthur Conan Doyle's classic detective novel.
meanings.example_cn: …阿瑟·柯南·道尔的经典侦探小说。

meanings.meaning_en: a police officer whose job is to discover information about crimes and catch criminals

meanings.meaning_cn: 解散；解雇；开除；让离开；不予理会、不予考虑
meanings.meaning_en: to remove someone from their job
meanings.example: The government has dismissed criticisms that the country’s health policy is a mess.
meanings.example_cn: 有人认为国家医疗政策一塌糊涂，政府对这种批评持否认态度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生产；引起；创作；生育，繁殖
meanings.meaning_en: to cause a particular result or effect
meanings.example: New drugs are producing remarkable results .
meanings.example_cn: 新药正在产生显著的效果。

meanings.meaning_en: food or other things that have been grown or produced on a farm to be sold
meanings.example: a rise in sea level produced by climatic change
meanings.example_cn: 由气候变化引起的海平面升高

meanings.meaning_cn: 实现；认识到；了解；将某物卖得，把(证券等)变成现钱；变卖
meanings.meaning_en: to know and understand something, or suddenly begin to understand it
meanings.example: It took us a while to realize the extent of the tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们过了一段时间才意识到这场悲剧有多严重。

meanings.meaning_en: to make known something that was previously secret or unknown
meanings.example: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

meanings.example: a test that can reveal a teacher’s hidden skills
meanings.example_cn: 能够展现老师潜在技能的测试

meanings.meaning_en: A markup is an increase in the price of something, for example the difference between its cost and the price that it is sold for
meanings.example: We all know that most wine in restaurants is over-priced: a markup of 200 percent on cost is considered normal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都知道饭店中大部分葡萄酒标价过高：在成本价上涨200％被认为是正常的。

meanings.meaning_en: considered separately from other people or things in the same group
meanings.example: Each individual leaf on the tree is different.
meanings.example_cn: 树上每片叶子都不相同。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, considered separately from the rest of the group or society that they live in
meanings.example: the needs of the individual customer
meanings.example_cn: 每位顾客的需求

meanings.meaning_cn: 末尾，最后；上个；鞋楦（做鞋的模型）
meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing at the end, with no others after
meanings.example: I didn’t read the last chapter of the book.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有看这本书的最后一章。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最后的；最近的，最新的；仅剩的；最不可能…的
meanings.meaning_en: The last event, person, thing, or period of time is the most recent one
meanings.example: The next meeting will be held in the last week in June.
meanings.example_cn: 下次会议将于6月的最后一个星期举行。

meanings.meaning_en: If an event, situation, or problem lasts for a particular length of time, it continues to exist or happen for that length of time
meanings.example: Much has changed since my last visit.
meanings.example_cn: 自我上次来访后，变化很大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最后地；上次，最近；最后一点
meanings.meaning_en: most recently before now
meanings.example: I split up with my last boyfriend three years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 我和前任男友在3年前分手了。

meanings.meaning_en: on some occasions but not always
meanings.example: I sometimes have to work late.
meanings.example_cn: 我有时得工作到很晚。

meanings.meaning_cn: 识别；承认，认出；重视；赞誉；公认
meanings.meaning_en: the act of realizing and accepting that something is true or important
meanings.example: He has achieved recognition and respect as a scientist.
