meanings.example_cn: 作为科学家，他得到人们的赞赏和尊敬。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不令人满意的；不满足的；不符合要求的
meanings.meaning_en: not good enough or not acceptable
meanings.example: an unsatisfactory situation
meanings.example_cn: 让人不满意的状况

meanings.meaning_cn: 在…上铺地毯，把地毯铺在…上；斥责
meanings.meaning_en: to cover a floor with carpet
meanings.example: The building has been carpeted throughout.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼里上上下下都铺了地毯。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy woven material for covering floors or stairs, or a piece of this material
used to add new information to what you have just said, to give your opinion, or to start a new conversation
meanings.example: I’ve known Barbara for years. Since we were babies, actually.
meanings.example_cn: 我认识芭芭拉很多年了，实际上我们从小就认识。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有义务；有责任；可说明性

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of deceiving people in order to gain something such as money or goods
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["electoral fraud"]}
meanings.example_cn: 选举欺诈

meanings.meaning_cn: 清单；检查表；备忘录；目录册
meanings.meaning_en: a list that helps you by reminding you of the things you need to do or get for a particular job or activity
meanings.example: The guide contains a useful checklist of points to look for when buying a car.
meanings.example_cn: 手册里有一张很有用的清单，列出买车时要注意的一些事项。

meanings.meaning_cn: 定期地；有规律地；整齐地；匀称地
meanings.meaning_en: at the same time each day, week, month etc
meanings.example: We meet regularly, once a month.
meanings.example_cn: 我们定期见面，每月一次。

meanings.meaning_en: a toilet or the room a toilet is in
meanings.example: ...the ladies' lavatory.
meanings.example_cn: …女厕所。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something behind you, especially along the ground, or to be pulled in this way
meanings.example: A plane trailing a banner was circling overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 一架飞机拖着横幅标语在上空盘旋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小径；痕迹；尾部；踪迹；一串，一系列
meanings.meaning_en: a rough path across countryside or through a forest

meanings.meaning_cn: 值；价值；价格；重要性；确切涵义
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that something is worth
meanings.example: the nutritional value of cereal
meanings.example_cn: 谷类食物的营养价值

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is important

meanings.meaning_cn: 信用，信誉；[金融] 贷款；学分；信任；声望
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later
meanings.example: The store agreed to let him have credit.
meanings.example_cn: 商店同意他赊购。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相信，信任；把…归给，归功于；赞颂
meanings.meaning_en: to believe or admit that someone has a quality, or has done something good
meanings.example: What’s the credit limit on your Visa card?
meanings.example_cn: 你的维萨卡信用额度是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: a hard level surface or path at the side of a road for people to walk on
meanings.example: A small group of journalists waited on the pavement outside her house.
meanings.example_cn: 有一小群记者守候在她家外面的人行道上。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular quality in someone’s character
meanings.example: The study found that some alcoholics had clear personality traits showing up early in childhood.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究发现一些酗酒者早在孩童时就表现出明显的个性特征。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time it takes for something to happen or be completed
meanings.example: The timescale for completing the work would be fairly tight.
meanings.example_cn: 完成这项工作的时间很紧。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to have been caused by something
meanings.example: 10,000 deaths a year from chronic lung disease are attributable to smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 每年1万个慢性肺病患者的死亡可能是由于吸烟导致的。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look
meanings.example: He gave her a quick glance and smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 他迅速地瞥了她一眼，笑了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扫视，匆匆一看；反光；瞥闪，瞥见
meanings.meaning_en: to quickly look at someone or something
meanings.example: The brothers exchanged glances (= looked at each other quickly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 兄弟俩互相瞥了一眼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平的；单调的；不景气的；干脆的；平坦的；扁平的；浅的
meanings.meaning_en: smooth and level, without raised or hollow areas, and not sloping or curving
meanings.example: houses with flat roofs
meanings.example_cn: 平顶房

meanings.meaning_cn: （尤指贴着另一表面）平直地；断然地；水平地；直接地，完全地
meanings.meaning_en: in a position in which the surface of something is against another surface without curving or sloping
meanings.example: a perfectly flat sandy beach
meanings.example_cn: 十分平坦的沙滩

meanings.meaning_en: a place for people to live that consists of a set of rooms that are part of a larger building
meanings.example: The countryside near there is flat as a pancake (= very flat ) .
meanings.example_cn: 那儿附近的乡间地势非常平坦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使变平；[音乐]使（音调）下降，尤指降半音
meanings.example: Work on a clean, flat surface.
meanings.example_cn: 在干净、平整的台面上工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逐渐变平；[音乐]以降调唱（或奏）
液体的；清澈的；明亮的；易变的
meanings.meaning_en: in the form of a liquid instead of a gas or solid
meanings.example: Children take antibiotics in liquid form.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童服用液态抗生素。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is not a solid or a gas, for example water or milk
meanings.example: liquid soap
meanings.example_cn: 液体皂

meanings.meaning_cn: 重新洗牌；改组；重作安排
meanings.meaning_en: When a political leader reshuffles the ministers in a government, he or she changes their jobs so that some of the ministers change their responsibilities
meanings.example: The prime minister told reporters this morning that he plans to reshuffle his entire cabinet.
meanings.example_cn: 首相今晨告诉记者们他计划改组全体内阁。

meanings.meaning_en: when the jobs of people who work in an organization are changed around, especially in a government
continuing to exist for a long time or for all the time in the future
meanings.example: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
meanings.example_cn: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

meanings.meaning_en: a  perm 1
meanings.example: a permanent change in your eating habits
meanings.example_cn: 饮食习惯的永久改变

meanings.meaning_cn: 过多；过剩；[医] 多血症
meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of something, usually more than you need
meanings.example: a plethora of suggestions
meanings.example_cn: 一大堆建议

meanings.meaning_cn: 晚的；迟的；已故的；最近的
meanings.meaning_en: arriving, happening, or done after the time that was expected, agreed, or arranged
meanings.example: Sorry I’m late – I overslept.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，来晚了——我睡过头了。

meanings.meaning_en: after the usual time
meanings.example: The train was even later than usual.
meanings.example_cn: 火车到得甚至比平时还晚。

meanings.meaning_en: A challenger is someone who competes with you for a position or title that you already have, for example being a sports champion or a political leader
meanings.example: The strongest challenger, Texas Democrat Martin Frost, has withdrawn from the race.
meanings.example_cn: 最强劲的挑战者，德克萨斯州的民主党人马丁·弗罗斯特已经退出了竞选。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to advise people about laws, write formal agreements, or represent people in court
meanings.example: Prosecution and defence lawyers are expected to deliver closing arguments next week.
meanings.example_cn: 原告律师和被告律师下周将要作终结辩论。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in a price, amount, level etc
meanings.example: Prices are subject to fluctuation.
meanings.example_cn: 价格可能会有波动。

meanings.meaning_en: a small strong boat used for pulling or guiding ships into a port, up a river etc
meanings.example: ...a 76,000-ton barge pulled by five tug boats.
meanings.example_cn: …被5艘拖船拖拉着的一艘76000吨的驳船。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of an activity or person, and make sure that things are done in the correct way
meanings.example: Griffiths closely supervised the research.
meanings.example_cn: 格里菲思密切指导该项研究。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of no longer having something, or of having less of it than you used to have, or the process by which this happens
meanings.example: The company is closing down two of its factories, leading to 430 job losses .
meanings.example_cn: 公司要关闭其中的两家工厂，这将造成430人失业。

meanings.example: He tried to pass off a false Dagas on the auctioneer.
meanings.example_cn: 他试着把假的德加的画卖给拍卖人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of selling the things at an auction and who calls out how much money has already been offered for something
meanings.example: The most talkative is the least intelligent, and there is hardly a difference between an orator and an auctioneer.
meanings.example_cn: 话最多的人是最不聪明的人，在一个演说家和一个拍卖人之间，几乎没有分别。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something better, or to become better
meanings.example: a course for students wishing to improve their English
meanings.example_cn: 为想提高英语水平的学生开设的一门课

meanings.meaning_en: to put something with something else or with a group of other things
meanings.example: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
meanings.example_cn: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something
meanings.example: His performance compelled the audience’s attention .
meanings.example_cn: 他的表演吸引了观众的注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific instrument that makes extremely small things look larger
meanings.example: The slightest movement will defocus the microscope.
meanings.example_cn: 最轻微的运动都会使显微镜散焦。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of unhappiness because something is not as good as you expected, or has not happened in the way you hoped
meanings.example: He could see the disappointment in her eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 他看到了她眼中的失望。

meanings.meaning_en: to prove that something is true or real
meanings.example: The painting has been authenticated by experts.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画专家鉴定为真迹。

meanings.meaning_en: very strange or not sensible
meanings.example: The neighbours must think we’re crazy.
meanings.example_cn: 邻居一定会认为我们疯了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 矿物；（英）矿泉水；无机物；苏打水（常用复数表示）
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is formed naturally in the earth, such as coal, salt, stone, or gold. Minerals can be dug out of the ground and used
meanings.example: The area is very rich in minerals .
meanings.example_cn: 该地区矿产非常丰富。

meanings.example: a country with few mineral resources
meanings.example_cn: 矿产资源稀少的国家

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged
meanings.example: All the flats in the building had the same layout.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼里所有的公寓布局都是一样的。

meanings.meaning_en: discussion in order to reach an agreement about a sale, contract etc
meanings.example: The 4% pay raise was the result of some hard bargaining .
meanings.example_cn: 4%的加薪是经过一番艰苦谈判后才取得的结果。

meanings.meaning_en: When people bargain with each other, they discuss what each of them will do, pay, or receive
meanings.example: They prefer to bargain with individual clients, for cash.
meanings.example_cn: 他们更愿意同个人客户洽谈，做现金交易。

meanings.meaning_cn: 银行业；银行业务；银行家的职业；筑堤
meanings.meaning_en: the business of a bank
meanings.example: the international banking system
meanings.example_cn: 国际银行业体制

meanings.meaning_cn: 把钱存入银行；做银行家；在…边筑堤（bank的现在分词）
合作，协作；[劳经] 协力
meanings.meaning_en: when you work with someone to achieve something that you both want
meanings.example: the need to strengthen international co-operation
meanings.example_cn: 加强国际合作的需要

meanings.example: Which: Identify your obstacles and strategize to overcome them.
meanings.example_cn: 确定您的障碍所在，并制定战略来克服这些障碍。

meanings.example: Second, we will strategize on how to apply the emerging understanding so that a rapid scaling up may be possible.
meanings.example_cn: 其次，我们将会为关于如何利用这新兴的协议从而使快速的扩大成为可能制定战略。

meanings.meaning_en: written or spoken in two languages
meanings.example: a bilingual dictionary
meanings.example_cn: 双语词典

meanings.example: The report proposed bilingual education in schools.
meanings.example_cn: 报告建议在学校中实行双语教学。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
meanings.example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 议程；日常工作事项；日程表
meanings.meaning_en: a list of problems or subjects that a government, organization etc is planning to deal with
meanings.example: The Republicans have stuck to their conservative agenda.
meanings.example_cn: 共和党人坚持自己的保守议题。

meanings.meaning_en: a law passed by a parliament, council etc and formally written down
meanings.example: Protection for the consumer is laid down by statute (= established by law ) .
meanings.example_cn: 保障消费者权益已有法律明文规定。

meanings.meaning_en: your peers are the people who are the same age as you, or who have the same type of job, social class etc
meanings.example: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: to look very carefully at something, especially because you are having difficulty seeing it
meanings.example: Staff members are trained by their peers.
meanings.example_cn: 员工由同事培训。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange things or put them in their places
meanings.example: Chinese vases are disposed around the gallery.
meanings.example_cn: 中国花瓶摆放在展馆四周。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as useful land, or minerals such as oil or coal, that exists in a country and can be used to increase its wealth
meanings.example: Canada’s vast mineral resources
meanings.example_cn: 加拿大丰富的矿产资源

meanings.meaning_cn: 代理，中介；代理处，经销处
meanings.meaning_en: a business that provides a particular service for people or organizations
meanings.example: a UN agency responsible for helping refugees
meanings.example_cn: 负责为难民提供帮助的联合国机构

meanings.meaning_en: a set of names, numbers etc, usually written one below the other, for example so that you can remember or check them
meanings.example: We are making a list of the top ten men we would not want to be married to.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在列一个我们最不想嫁的10种男人的名单。

meanings.meaning_en: To list several things such as reasons or names means to write or say them one after another, usually in a particular order
meanings.example: The pupils were asked to list the sports they loved most and hated most.
meanings.example_cn: 学生们被要求列出他们最喜欢的和最讨厌的运动。

meanings.meaning_en: to break into pieces violently or noisily, or to make something do this by dropping, throwing, or hitting it
meanings.example: Vandals had smashed all the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 破坏分子打碎了所有的窗子。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard downward shot in tennis or similar games
meanings.example: Firemen had to smash the lock to get in.
meanings.example_cn: 消防员不得不砸锁而入。

meanings.meaning_cn: 了不起的；非常轰动的；出色的
meanings.example: Several cups fell to the floor and smashed to pieces .
meanings.example_cn: 有几个杯子掉到地上摔得粉碎。

meanings.meaning_cn: 截面；部分；部门；地区；章节
meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts that something such as an object or place is divided into
meanings.example: The plane’s tail section was found in a cornfield.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的尾部在玉米田里找到了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 被切割成片；被分成部分
meanings.meaning_en: If something is sectioned, it is divided into sections
meanings.example: the smoking section (= where you can smoke )
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟区

meanings.meaning_cn: 度过，消磨（时光）；花费；浪费；用尽
meanings.meaning_en: to use your money to pay for goods or services
meanings.example: I can’t afford to spend any more money this week.
meanings.example_cn: 这星期我没有能力花更多的钱了。

meanings.example: The repairs cost a lot, but it’s money well spent (= a sensible way of spending money ) .
meanings.example_cn: 修理费很高，但这是该花的钱。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to or relating to people, especially as opposed to machines or animals
meanings.example: There are many different cell types in the human body .
meanings.example_cn: 人体中有许多种不同的细胞类型。

meanings.meaning_en: a person
meanings.example: the power of the human mind
meanings.example_cn: 人脑的威力

meanings.meaning_cn: 浪费；使沉溺于；使迷路；遗失；错过
meanings.meaning_en: if you lose a relative or friend, they die – use this when you want to avoid saying the word ‘die’
meanings.example: One woman in Brooklyn lost a husband and two sons in the gang wars.
meanings.example_cn: 在黑帮争斗中，布鲁克林的一名妇女失去了丈夫和两个儿子。

meanings.example: Sadly, Anna lost the baby (= her baby died before it was born ) .
meanings.example_cn: 安娜不幸流产。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使受伤；损害；使疼痛；使痛心
meanings.meaning_en: to injure yourself or someone else
meanings.example: Was anyone hurt in the accident?
meanings.example_cn: 事故中有人受伤吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great unhappiness because someone, especially someone you trust, has treated you badly or unfairly
meanings.example: Put that thing down - you might hurt someone with it.
meanings.example_cn: 快把那东西放下，你会伤着别人的。

meanings.meaning_en: suffering pain or injury
a chance to do something or an occasion when it is easy for you to do something
meanings.example: There are fewer opportunities for new graduates this year.
meanings.example_cn: 今年新毕业的大学生就业机会较少。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to electricity
meanings.example: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.
meanings.example_cn: 大火是电力故障引起的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸收；吸引；承受；理解；使…全神贯注
meanings.meaning_en: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
meanings.example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal money from the place where you work
meanings.example: Two managers were charged with embezzling $400,000.
meanings.example_cn: 两名经理被控挪用了40万美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蓝色；[复数]（美国海、陆、空三军穿的）蓝色制服；蓝颜料；[the blue(s)][用作单数或复数]布鲁斯（歌曲）（一种伤感的美国黑人民歌
meanings.meaning_en: the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: She nearly always dresses in blue.
meanings.example_cn: 她几乎总是穿蓝色的衣服。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蓝色的；沮丧的，忧郁的；下流的
meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: the rich greens and blues of the tapestry
meanings.example_cn: 挂毯上浓艳的绿色和蓝色

meanings.meaning_cn: 把…染成蓝色；使成蓝色；给…用上蓝剂；用上蓝剂于

meanings.meaning_en: letters and packages that are sent somewhere using a plane, or the system of doing this
meanings.example: Send the letter by airmail.
meanings.example_cn: 这封信用航空邮寄。

meanings.example: Good ability to solve problem; good attitude for work and good energy for solidify synergic , stronger responsibility for work.
meanings.example_cn: 有处理解决较大工艺问题的能力，有良好的工作态度和团结协作的精神。工作责任心强。

meanings.meaning_cn: 敌对的，敌方的；怀敌意的
meanings.meaning_en: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
meanings.example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .
meanings.example_cn: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

meanings.example: Carr wouldn’t meet Feng’s stare, which was openly hostile .
meanings.example_cn: 卡尔不愿意面对冯公然敌视的目光。

meanings.meaning_en: to close or fasten something firmly by turning it
meanings.example: Tighten the screws firmly.
meanings.example_cn: 把螺丝拧紧。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is necessary is what you need to have or need to do
meanings.example: The booklet provides all the necessary information about the college.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子提供了关于那所学院的所有必需信息。

meanings.meaning_en: things such as food or basic clothes that you need in order to live
meanings.example: No further changes were considered necessary.
meanings.example_cn: 没有必要作出进一步改变。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a series of regular payments that you make until you have paid all the money you owe
meanings.example: the second instalment of a loan
meanings.example_cn: 一项贷款的第二期还款

meanings.meaning_cn: 下降，衰落；倒下；大幅度下降，暴跌
meanings.meaning_en: to fall or lean against something because you are not strong enough to stand
meanings.example: Sales slumped by 20% last year.
meanings.example_cn: 去年销售额骤减 20%。

meanings.meaning_en: Slump is also a noun
meanings.example: The council's land is now worth much less than originally hoped because of a slump in property prices.
meanings.example_cn: 由于地产价格的暴跌，委员会的土地目前大不如原来所希望的那么值钱了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 等级；等级评定；额定功率
meanings.meaning_en: a level on a scale that shows how good, important, popular etc someone or something is
meanings.example: By the end of the year the Prime Minister’s approval rating (= how many people agreed with his policies ) had fallen as low as 12 percent.
meanings.example_cn: 到年底时，首相的支持率跌到了12%的低点。

meanings.meaning_en: a building where people pay to stay and eat meals
meanings.example: I’ve booked the flights and the hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 我已订好机票和酒店。

meanings.example: We’ll be staying at the Hotel Ibis.
meanings.example_cn: 我们将住在宜必思酒店。

meanings.meaning_cn: [计] 局部；当地居民；本地新闻
meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in the place where you are or the place that you are talking about
meanings.example: We asked one of the locals to recommend a restaurant.
meanings.example_cn: 我们请一位当地人推荐一家餐馆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 当地的；局部的；地方性的；乡土的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the particular area you live in, or the area you are talking about
to perform in a play or film
meanings.example: I first started acting when I was 12 years old.
meanings.example_cn: 我12岁开始演戏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行为，行动；法令，法案；（戏剧，歌剧的）一幕，段；装腔作势
meanings.meaning_en: one thing that you do
meanings.example: The movie is very well acted.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片演得非常好。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being admired and respected for being important or for doing something important
meanings.example: He acquired kudos just by appearing on television.
meanings.example_cn: 他上电视后就出名了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流入；汇集；河流的汇集处
meanings.example: ...problems caused by the influx of refugees.
meanings.example_cn: …难民大量涌入所造成的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撤退，收回；提款；取消；退股
meanings.meaning_en: the act of moving an army, weapons etc away from the area where they were fighting
meanings.example: large-scale troop withdrawals
meanings.example_cn: 大规模撤军

meanings.meaning_en: able to move quickly and easily with light neat movements
meanings.example: nimble fingers
meanings.example_cn: 灵巧的手指

meanings.meaning_cn: 通勤者，经常乘公共车辆往返者；[交] 月季票乘客
meanings.meaning_en: someone who travels a long distance to work every day

meanings.meaning_cn: 可行的；能养活的；能生育的
meanings.meaning_en: a viable idea, plan, or method can work successfully
meanings.example: viable seeds
meanings.example_cn: 可存活的种子

meanings.meaning_cn: 可提神的人或物；补习课程；清凉饮料；增加报酬

meanings.meaning_en: a desire for food
meanings.example: Her husband always had a huge appetite.
meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫向来胃口极大。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who represent a company, organization etc
meanings.example: A trade delegation will visit Kuwait.
meanings.example_cn: 一个贸易代表团将访问科威特。

meanings.meaning_en: Finance is also a noun
meanings.example: A United States delegation is in Japan seeking finance for a major scientific project.
meanings.example_cn: 1个美国代表团正在日本为一个重大科研项目寻求资助。

meanings.meaning_cn: 筹措资金；财政管理；从事金融活动（finance的ing形式）
meanings.meaning_en: When someone finances something such as a project or a purchase, they provide the money that is needed to pay for them
meanings.example: The fund has been used largely to finance the construction of federal prisons.
meanings.example_cn: 该基金大部分已用于资助联邦监狱的建造。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who helps someone else in their work, especially by doing the less important jobs
meanings.example: a clerical assistant
meanings.example_cn: 文书助理

meanings.meaning_cn: 辅助的，助理的；有帮助的
meanings.meaning_en: Assistant is used in front of titles or jobs to indicate a slightly lower rank. For example, an assistant director is one rank lower than a director in an organization.
meanings.example: ...the assistant secretary of defence.
meanings.example_cn: …助理国防部长。

meanings.meaning_en: everything in the physical world that is not controlled by humans, such as wild plants and animals, earth and rocks, and the weather
meanings.example: We grew up in the countryside, surrounded by the beauties of nature.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在乡村长大，周围是美丽的大自然。

meanings.meaning_en: to be the umpire in a game or competition
meanings.example: He umpired baseball games.
meanings.example_cn: 他过去担任棒球比赛的裁判。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who makes sure that the players obey the rules in sports such as tennis, baseball, and cricket

meanings.meaning_cn: 资助；给与奖助金；向…行贿
meanings.meaning_en: if a government or organization subsidizes a company, activity etc, it pays part of its costs
meanings.example: Farming is heavily subsidized (= subsidized a lot ) by the government.
meanings.example_cn: 农业得到政府的大量补贴。

meanings.example: But if you lose your audience with technical explanations, you'll never get to what you want: a resolution so you can finalize your design.
meanings.example_cn: 但是如果您用技术性的解释使受众迷惑，则您永远得不到希望达到的目的：完成设计的解决办法。

meanings.meaning_en: to be more concerned with making money from something than about its quality - used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Christmas has become so commercialized.
meanings.example_cn: 圣诞节现已变得非常商业化了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 要人领情的；自视高人一等的；以恩人态度自居的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is patronizing talks to you in a way that shows they think you are less intelligent or important than them
meanings.example: a patronizing attitude
meanings.example_cn: 自命不凡的态度

meanings.meaning_cn: 光顾，惠顾；庇护，保护（patronize的现在分词）
meanings.example: a patronizing tone
meanings.example_cn: 高人一等的语气

meanings.meaning_cn: [计] 选项；选择权；买卖的特权
meanings.meaning_en: a choice you can make in a particular situation
meanings.example: There are a number of options available.
meanings.example_cn: 有多种选择。

meanings.meaning_cn: 松弛的；疏忽的；不流畅的
meanings.meaning_en: hanging loosely, or not pulled tight
meanings.example: Keep the rope slack until I tell you to pull it.
meanings.example_cn: 让绳子松着，直到我叫你拉紧。

meanings.meaning_en: to make less effort than usual, or to be lazy in your work
very small pieces of coal

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 挥发性的；不稳定的；爆炸性的；反复无常的
meanings.meaning_en: a volatile situation is likely to change suddenly and without warning
meanings.example: an increasingly volatile political situation
meanings.example_cn: 日益动荡的政治局势

meanings.example: the highly volatile stock and bond markets
meanings.example_cn: 相当不稳定的股票和债券市场

meanings.meaning_en: to compete against someone in order to gain something
meanings.example: Inevitably, fights break out between the members of contending groups.
meanings.example_cn: 争权夺利的几个团体之间不可避免地发生了打斗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行为；离去；工作情况；地面状况
meanings.meaning_en: the act of leaving a place
meanings.example: His going will be no great loss to the company.
meanings.example_cn: 他的离去对公司来说并不算多大的损失。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流行的；进行中的；现存的
meanings.meaning_en: The going rate or the going salary is the usual amount of money that you expect to pay or receive for something
meanings.example: That's about half the going price on world oil markets.
meanings.example_cn: 那大约是世界石油市场上现行价位的一半。

meanings.meaning_cn: 橡胶；橡皮；合成橡胶；按摩师
meanings.meaning_en: a substance used to make tyres, boots etc, which is made from the juice of a tropical tree or artificially
meanings.example: a rubber ball
meanings.example_cn: 橡皮球

meanings.meaning_en: a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing
meanings.example: The current trend is towards more part-time employment.
meanings.example_cn: 当前的趋势是雇用更多的兼职人员。

meanings.example: the general trend towards the centralization of political power
meanings.example_cn: 政治权力集中化的普遍趋势

meanings.meaning_cn: 国际组织；国际体育比赛；外国居留者；国际股票
meanings.meaning_en: an international sports game
meanings.example: the response of the international community
meanings.example_cn: 国际社会的反响

meanings.meaning_cn: 国际的；两国（或以上）国家的；超越国界的；国际关系的；世界的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving more than one nation
meanings.example: the UN and other international organizations
meanings.example_cn: 联合国和其他国际组织

meanings.example: Nothing like that has happened in Europe — yet. But it’s certainly within the realm of possibility, especially as the pain of austerity and internal devaluation drags on.
meanings.example_cn: 在欧洲还没有发生这样的事情，但肯定在可能性范畴之内，尤其是随着财政紧缩与内部贬值痛苦的持续，这种可能会增大。

meanings.example: We obtained a loan from the government.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得了一笔政府贷款。

meanings.example: If you ask him for a loan, he'll come through.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你向他贷款，他会满足你的要求的。

meanings.example: I need to acquaint myself with the new regulations.
meanings.example_cn: 我得熟悉一下新的规章制度。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find out the truth about something such as a crime, accident, or scientific problem
meanings.example: The state police are investigating the incident.
meanings.example_cn: 州警察正调查此事。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of a substance that is contained in something, especially food or drink
meanings.example: water with a low salt content
meanings.example_cn: 含盐量低的水

meanings.meaning_en: happy and satisfied
to do or have something that is not what you really wanted, but is still satisfactory
a smooth way of moving that looks natural, relaxed, and attractive
meanings.example: Lena moved with the grace of a dancer.
meanings.example_cn: 莉娜走路姿势有着舞者般的优美。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a place or an object look more attractive

meanings.meaning_cn: 纯的；纯粹的；纯洁的；清白的；纯理论的
meanings.meaning_en: a pure substance or material is not mixed with anything
meanings.example: rings made of pure gold
meanings.example_cn: 纯金制成的戒指

meanings.example: Our beef patties are 100% pure .
meanings.example_cn: 我们的牛肉饼是100%的纯牛肉。

meanings.meaning_en: bread that is shaped and baked in one piece and can be cut into slices
meanings.example: a loaf of bread
meanings.example_cn: 一条面包

meanings.meaning_cn: 游荡；游手好闲；虚度光阴
meanings.meaning_en: to spend time somewhere and not do very much
best, most important, or most successful
meanings.example: The army played a leading role in organizing the attempted coup.
meanings.example_cn: 军队在策划这场未遂政变的过程中起了最主要的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: the spacing between lines of photocomposed or digitized type
meanings.example: the leading industrial nations
meanings.example_cn: 主要的工业国

meanings.example: a leading heart specialist
meanings.example_cn: 最好的心脏病专家

meanings.meaning_cn: 简单地；仅仅；简直；朴素地；坦白地
meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize what you are saying
meanings.example: This work is simply not good enough.
meanings.example_cn: 这工作做得实在不够好。

meanings.meaning_en: a special name, sign, or word that is marked on a product to show that it is made by a particular company, that cannot be used by any other company
meanings.example: The striped T-shirt became the comedian’s trademark.
meanings.example_cn: 条纹T恤衫成了这位喜剧演员的标记。

meanings.meaning_en: dishonest, illegal, or immoral behaviour, especially from someone with power
meanings.example: officials charged with bribery and corruption
meanings.example_cn: 被指控受贿和贪污的官员

meanings.meaning_en: a state of disagreement or argument between people, groups, countries etc
meanings.example: the threat of industrial conflict in the coalfields
meanings.example_cn: 煤田发生劳资纠纷的风险

meanings.meaning_en: if two ideas, beliefs, opinions etc conflict, they cannot exist together or both be true
meanings.example: Marx points out the potential conflicts below the surface of society.
meanings.example_cn: 马克思指出了隐藏在社会表层之下的潜在矛盾。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保证，担保；（人寿）保险；确信；断言；厚脸皮，无耻
meanings.meaning_en: a promise that something will definitely happen or is definitely true, made especially to make someone less worried
meanings.example: Despite my repeated assurances, Rob still looked very nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管我再三保证，罗布看起来还是很紧张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 转换；变换；[金融] 兑换；改变信仰
meanings.meaning_en: when you change something from one form, purpose, or system to a different one
meanings.example: ...the conversion of disused rail lines into cycle routes.
meanings.example_cn: …把废弃的铁路改变成自行车道。

meanings.meaning_en: damage, injury, or trouble caused by someone’s actions or by an event
meanings.example: The scandal did his career a lot of harm.
meanings.example_cn: 丑闻对他的职业生涯造成很大损害。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something
meanings.example: Our children deserve protection from harm.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的儿童理应得到保护免受伤害。

meanings.meaning_cn: [语][计] 句子，命题；宣判，判决
meanings.meaning_en: a group of words that usually contains a subject and a verb, and expresses a complete idea. Sentences written in English begin with a capital letter and usually end with a  full stop  or a  question mark
meanings.example: His voice dropped at the end of the sentence.
meanings.example_cn: 到句子结尾处，他压低了嗓音。

meanings.meaning_en: if a judge sentences someone who is guilty of a crime, they give them a punishment
almost not
meanings.example: My parents divorced when I was six, and I hardly knew my father.
meanings.example_cn: 我六岁时父母离婚，我对父亲几乎一无所知。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular day of the month or year, especially shown by a number
meanings.example: The date on the letter was 30th August 1962.
meanings.example_cn: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过时；注明日期；始于（某一历史时期）
meanings.meaning_en: if clothing, art etc dates, it begins to look old-fashioned
meanings.example: What’s today’s date?
meanings.example_cn: 今天几号？

meanings.example: The water sports centre will provide you with snorkelling gear and a floatation vest if you would like one.
meanings.example_cn: 在水上运动中心将为你提供的浮浅齿轮和浮选背心，如果你想的话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 春天；弹簧；泉水；活力；跳跃
meanings.meaning_en: the season between winter and summer when leaves and flowers appear
meanings.example: spring flowers
meanings.example_cn: 春花

meanings.meaning_en: Running is the activity of moving fast on foot, especially as a sport
meanings.example: We chose to do cross-country running.
meanings.example_cn: 我们选择进行越野赛跑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 连续的；流动的；跑着的；运转着的
meanings.meaning_en: a machine that is in running order is working correctly
to make someone feel annoyed or impatient, especially by doing something many times or for a long period of time
meanings.example: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
meanings.example_cn: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 继续；续集；延长；附加部分；扩建物
meanings.meaning_en: something that continues or follows something else that has happened before, without a stop or change
meanings.example: It's the coalition forces who are to blame for the continuation of the war.
meanings.example_cn: 是联军应对战争的持续负责。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging or relating to one particular person, rather than to other people or to people in general
meanings.example: My personal view is that we shouldn’t offer him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 我个人认为我们不该给他这份工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 人事消息栏；人称代名词
meanings.example: Style and colour are a matter of personal taste .
meanings.example_cn: 款式和颜色是个人爱好问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 方程式，等式；相等；[化学] 反应式
meanings.meaning_en: a statement in mathematics that shows that two amounts or totals are equal
meanings.example: In the equation 2x + 1 = 7, what is x?
meanings.example_cn: 在方程式2x+1=7中，x的值为多少？

meanings.meaning_cn: 不可改变的；不能取消的；不能挽回的
meanings.meaning_en: an irrevocable decision, action etc cannot be changed or stopped
meanings.example: Think about the situation carefully before you take an irrevocable step.
meanings.example_cn: 在你踏出不能回头的一步之前要三思。

meanings.meaning_cn: 年级；等级；成绩；级别；阶段
meanings.meaning_en: a particular level of quality that a product, material etc has
meanings.example: The best grades of tea are expensive.
meanings.example_cn: 最上等的茶叶价格很贵。

meanings.meaning_en: to say what level of a quality something has, or what standard it is
meanings.example: industrial grade diamonds
meanings.example_cn: 工业等级钻石

meanings.meaning_en: to answer someone by saying or writing something
meanings.example: I asked Clive where he was going, but he didn’t reply.
meanings.example_cn: 我问克莱夫到哪儿去，但他没有回答。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is said, written, or done as a way of replying
meanings.example: Sorry it took me so long to reply.
meanings.example_cn: 抱歉，我过了这么久才回复。

meanings.meaning_cn: 负面，缺点；下降趋势；底侧
meanings.example: Digital cell phones offer more security, but the downside is that they have less power.
meanings.example_cn: 数字手机安全性更好，但其劣势在于电力不足。

meanings.meaning_en: a large structure with steps leading to the top of a long sloping surface which children can slide down
meanings.example: a slide show
meanings.example_cn: 幻灯片放映

meanings.meaning_cn: 滑动；滑落；不知不觉陷入
meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly over a surface while continuing to touch it, or to make something move in this way
to run very fast for a short distance
meanings.example: Sergeant Horne sprinted to the car.
meanings.example_cn: 霍恩中士冲向那辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: a short race in which the runners, riders, swimmers etc move very fast over a short distance
the official right to have or do something, or the amount that you have a right to receive
meanings.example: They lose their entitlement to welfare when they start work.
meanings.example_cn: 他们开始工作时就丧失了享受福利的权利。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being able to do something
meanings.example: The test measures your mathematical ability.
meanings.example_cn: 这种测试考查的是数学能力。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a heavy metal blade on the end of a long handle, used to cut down trees or split pieces of wood
meanings.example: The edge of this axe has turned.
meanings.example_cn: 这把斧子卷了刃了。

meanings.example: He had just hit her over the head with the blunt end of an axe, fracturing her skull in three places.
meanings.example_cn: 就在刚刚，他用斧子另一端猛敲了妮基的头一下，将她的颅骨敲断裂成了三块。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have or take the initiative, you are in a position to control a situation and decide what to do next
meanings.example: Why don’t you take the initiative and ask him out?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么你不主动约他出去呢？

meanings.example: Politicians need to seize the initiative from the terrorists.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家需要对恐怖分子主动出击。

meanings.meaning_en: the exact opposite of what has just been mentioned
meanings.example: I owe you nothing. If anything, the reverse is true (= you owe me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我不欠你什么。 如果说欠的话，是你欠我才对。

meanings.meaning_en: if a vehicle or its driver reverses, they go backwards
the back of something
To facilitate an action or process, especially one that you would like to happen, means to make it easier or more likely to happen
meanings.example: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism.
meanings.example_cn: 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

meanings.meaning_cn: 从事于套利或套汇之人

meanings.meaning_en: to go beyond the usual limits of something
meanings.example: The desire for peace transcended political differences.
meanings.example_cn: 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

meanings.meaning_en: A previous event or thing is one that happened or existed before the one that you are talking about
meanings.example: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 付款，支付；报酬，报答；偿还；惩罚，报应
meanings.meaning_en: the act of paying for something
meanings.example: Payment can be made by cheque or credit card.
meanings.example_cn: 可以用支票或信用卡付款。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指)同院病人；同狱犯人；同被(收容所)收容者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is being kept in a prison
meanings.example: ...education for prison inmates.
meanings.example_cn: …对囚犯们的教育。

meanings.meaning_cn: 解决，处理；[会计] 结算；沉降；殖民
meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement or decision that ends an argument, a court case, or a fight, or the action of making an agreement
meanings.example: Union leaders and company bosses will meet tomorrow in an attempt to reach a settlement .
meanings.example_cn: 工会领导人和公司老板将于明天举行会议以期达成协议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 态度不明朗的；不承担义务的；无明确意义的
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe someone as noncommittal when they deliberately do not express their opinion or intentions clearly
meanings.example: Mr. Hall is non-committal about the number of jobs that the development corporation has created.
meanings.example_cn: 霍尔先生对开发公司已创造的岗位数量含糊其词。

meanings.meaning_en: When you pare something, or pare part of it off or away, you cut off its skin or its outer layer
meanings.example: Pare the brown skin from the meat with a very sharp knife.
meanings.example_cn: 用一把非常锋利的刀削掉肉上褐色的皮。

meanings.example: He took out a slab of cheese, pared off a slice and ate it hastily.
meanings.example_cn: 他拿出厚厚的一块奶酪，切下一片急匆匆地吃了。

meanings.meaning_en: the careful choice of a particular person or thing from a group of similar people or things
meanings.example: The judges have made their final selection.
meanings.example_cn: 评委已经作出最后的评选。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合理的，公道的；通情达理的
meanings.meaning_en: fair and sensible
meanings.example: a reasonable request
meanings.example_cn: 合情合理的要求

meanings.meaning_cn: 使用，采用；雇用；使忙于，使从事于
meanings.meaning_en: to pay someone to work for you
meanings.example: The factory employs over 2,000 people.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂雇用了2,000多名员工。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which two people or two groups feel about each other and behave towards each other
meanings.example: He’s never had a sexual relationship before.
meanings.example_cn: 他以前从未与人有过性关系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 领域；牧场；旷野；战场；运动场
meanings.meaning_en: a subject that people study or an area of activity that they are involved in as part of their work
meanings.example: Peter’s an expert in his field .
meanings.example_cn: 彼得是他那个行业里的专家。

meanings.meaning_en: the team that is fielding in a game of  cricket  or baseball is the one that is throwing and catching the ball, rather than the one hitting it
meanings.example: He’s the best-known American outside the field of (= not connected with ) politics.
meanings.example_cn: 他是政治领域之外最出名的美国人。

meanings.meaning_en: You use field to describe work or study that is done in a real, natural environment rather than in a theoretical way or in controlled conditions
meanings.example: I also conducted a field study among the boys about their attitude to relationships.
meanings.example_cn: 我也在男生中进行了一项有关他们对人际关系态度的实地调查。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取代，代替；替换，更换；归还，偿还；把…放回原处
meanings.meaning_en: to start doing something instead of another person, or start being used instead of another thing
meanings.example: I’m replacing Sue on the team.
meanings.example_cn: 我将接替队里的休。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开始（调查）；制定；创立；提起（诉讼）
meanings.meaning_en: to introduce or start a system, rule, legal process etc
meanings.example: We had no choice but to institute court proceedings against the airline.
meanings.example_cn: 我们别无选择，只能对航空公司提起诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization that has a particular purpose such as scientific or educational work, or the building where this organization is based

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗心的；无忧无虑的；淡漠的
meanings.meaning_en: not paying enough attention to what you are doing, so that you make mistakes, damage things etc
meanings.example: It was careless of him to leave the door unlocked.
meanings.example_cn: 他忘了锁门，真是粗心大意。

meanings.example: a careless mistake
meanings.example_cn: 粗心造成的错误

meanings.meaning_en: Expense is the money that something costs you or that you need to spend in order to do something
meanings.example: He's bought a big TV at vast expense so that everyone can see properly.
meanings.example_cn: 他花了很多钱买了台大电视，这样人人都可以看清楚了。

meanings.meaning_en: the regular way in which something happens, develops, or is done
meanings.example: Weather patterns have changed in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 气候模式近年已经发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: to be designed or made in a way that is copied from something else
meanings.example: A general pattern began to emerge .
meanings.example_cn: 一个总体模式开始显现。

meanings.meaning_en: something extracted or capable of being extracted

meanings.meaning_cn: 提取的；可萃取的；精萃的
meanings.meaning_en: tending or serving to extract
a large room where you can look at things that are for sale, such as cars or electrical goods
meanings.example: a car showroom
meanings.example_cn: 汽车展厅

meanings.meaning_cn: 存货，存货清单；详细目录；财产清册
meanings.meaning_en: a list of all the things in a place
meanings.example: ...one inventory of twelve sails for each yacht.
meanings.example_cn: …为每艘游艇配备12张帆的存货。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you use to fight with or attack someone with, such as a knife, bomb, or gun
meanings.example: They all had sticks which they planned to use as weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 他们都持有棍棒，打算当武器用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文件, 证明文件, 史实, 文件编制
meanings.meaning_en: official documents, reports etc that are used to prove that something is true or correct
meanings.example: Applicants must provide supporting documentation .
meanings.example_cn: 申请人必须提供证明文件。

meanings.example: He was almost stifled by the fumes.
meanings.example_cn: 他差点被烟熏得窒息了。

meanings.meaning_cn: （马等的）后膝关节；（马等的）[动] 后膝关节病
敏锐的，敏捷的；渴望的；强烈的；热心的；锐利的
meanings.meaning_en: wanting to do something or wanting something to happen very much
meanings.example: a keen photographer
meanings.example_cn: 一个摄影迷

meanings.meaning_en: to give support to an opinion, idea, or feeling, and make it stronger
meanings.example: The film reinforces the idea that women should be pretty and dumb.
meanings.example_cn: 这部影片强化了这个观点——女人要漂亮，而且要笨一些。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意外之财；被风吹落的果子；意外的收获
meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you get unexpectedly
meanings.example: his £2 million windfall in the lottery
meanings.example_cn: 他彩票中奖得来的200万英镑意外之财

meanings.meaning_cn: 自由化；自由主义化；放宽限制
部分；角色；零件；一些；片段
meanings.meaning_en: a piece or feature of something such as an object, area, event, or period of time
meanings.example: For part of the day, you will be outside doing practical work.
meanings.example_cn: 你们每天将有一部分时间在户外实际操作。

meanings.meaning_en: to move the two sides of something apart, or to move apart, making a space in the middle
payment of only a part of something, not all of it

meanings.meaning_cn: 基础设施；公共建设；下部构造
meanings.meaning_en: the basic systems and structures that a country or organization needs in order to work properly, for example roads, railways, banks etc
meanings.example: Some countries lack a suitable economic infrastructure.
meanings.example_cn: 一些国家缺乏适当的经济基础设施。

meanings.meaning_cn: 确认；确定；证实；批准；使巩固
meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is definitely true, especially by providing more proof
meanings.example: New evidence has confirmed the first witness’s story.
meanings.example_cn: 新的证据证实了第一个证人的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of admiring someone or what they do, especially because of their personal qualities, knowledge, or skills
meanings.example: The boys showed a complete lack of respect for authority.
meanings.example_cn: 这些男孩子根本无视权威。

meanings.meaning_en: to admire someone because they have high standards and good qualities such as fairness and honesty
to provide something or allow something to happen
meanings.example: The room affords a beautiful view over the city.
meanings.example_cn: 这房间可以俯瞰城市美景。

meanings.example: The new law will afford protection to employees.
meanings.example_cn: 新法律将为雇员提供保障。

meanings.meaning_en: sleeping
meanings.example: Quiet! The baby’s asleep.
meanings.example_cn: 安静！ 宝宝在睡觉。

meanings.meaning_en: If you kick someone or something, you hit them forcefully with your foot
meanings.example: He kicked the door hard.
meanings.example_cn: 他用力踢门。

meanings.meaning_en: Kick is also a noun
meanings.example: He threw me to the ground and started to kick.
meanings.example_cn: 他把我摔在地上开始踢我。

meanings.meaning_cn: 手提的，便携式的；轻便的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be carried or moved easily
meanings.example: a portable radio
meanings.example_cn: 便携式收音机

meanings.meaning_cn: 过道，门厅，走廊；会堂；食堂；学生宿舍；大厅，前厅；娱乐中心，会所
meanings.meaning_en: the area just inside the door of a house or other building, that leads to other rooms
meanings.example: a huge tiled entrance hall
meanings.example_cn: 铺着地砖的大门厅

meanings.meaning_cn: 出席；上（大学等）；照料；招待；陪伴
meanings.meaning_en: to go to an event such as a meeting or a class
meanings.example: Only 12 people attended the meeting.
meanings.example_cn: 只有12个人出席了会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone or make it available to them, because they need it or want it
meanings.example: Tea and biscuits will be provided.
meanings.example_cn: 有茶水和饼干供应。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly or about 50% (1/2) of an amount, time, distance, number etc
meanings.example: Only half the guests had arrived by seven o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 7点钟前只来了一半客人。

meanings.meaning_en: partly, but not completely
meanings.example: If you look at our members, at least half are women.
meanings.example_cn: 看看我们的会员，至少有一半是女性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一半的；不完全的；半途的
meanings.meaning_en: Half is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...a half measure of fresh lemon juice.
meanings.example_cn: …半量杯的新鲜柠檬汁。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide that something that was officially planned will not happen
meanings.example: Our flight was cancelled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的航班取消了。

meanings.example: I’m afraid I’ll have to cancel our meeting tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕我得取消我们明天的会议。

meanings.meaning_en: a complete game of golf
meanings.example: I played a round of golf on Sunday morning.
meanings.example_cn: 星期天早上我打了一场高尔夫球。

meanings.meaning_cn: 圆的；完全的；大概的；肥胖的
meanings.meaning_en: shaped like a circle

meanings.meaning_cn: 在周围；迂回地；朝反方向；挨个
meanings.meaning_en: surrounding or on all sides of something or someone
someone who does someone else’s job for a limited period of time, especially in a sports team or school
meanings.example: Germany brought on a substitute at half time.
meanings.example_cn: 德国队在比赛半场时换上一名替补队员。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something new or diffe-rent instead of something else
meanings.example: substitute goalkeeper
meanings.example_cn: 替补守门员

meanings.meaning_en: in or to a place, but you do not say or know exactly where
meanings.example: My wallet must be around here somewhere.
meanings.example_cn: 我的钱包肯定是在这里的什么地方。

meanings.example: We could meet for dinner at Giorgio’s or somewhere (= or a similar place ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们可以在乔治家或别的什么地方一起吃饭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合格的，合适的；符合条件的；有资格当选的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is eligible for something is able or allowed to do it, for example because they are the right age
meanings.example: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合格者；适任者；有资格者

meanings.meaning_en: a plant such as wheat, rice, or fruit that is grown by farmers and used as food
meanings.example: The main crops were oats and barley.
meanings.example_cn: 主要作物是燕麦和大麦。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut someone’s hair short
meanings.example: crops grown for market
meanings.example_cn: 为供应市场而种植的作物

meanings.meaning_en: Breakage is the act of breaking something
meanings.example: Brushing wet hair can cause stretching and breakage.
meanings.example_cn: 梳刷湿的头发会导致拉抻和破损。

meanings.meaning_cn: 总计，合计；相当于；共计；产生…结果
meanings.meaning_en: If something amounts to a particular total, all the parts of it add up to that total
meanings.example: Consumer spending on sports-related items amounted to $9.75 billion.
meanings.example_cn: 消费者在体育相关用品上的消费总共达到了97.5亿美元。

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity of something such as time, money, or a substance
a written set of questions which you give to a large number of people in order to collect information
meanings.example: Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
meanings.example_cn: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

meanings.meaning_en: not liking changes or new ideas
meanings.example: a very conservative attitude to education
meanings.example_cn: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports or is a member of the Conservative Party in Britain
meanings.example: conservative views
meanings.example_cn: 保守的观点

meanings.meaning_en: a short book that gives information or instructions about something
meanings.example: the Fiction Writer’s Handbook
meanings.example_cn: 《小说写作手册》

meanings.meaning_en: if a company, business etc expands, or if someone expands it, they open new shops, factories etc
meanings.example: The computer industry has expanded greatly over the last decade.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机行业在过去十年间大大地发展起来。

meanings.meaning_en: sweet food served after the main part of a meal
meanings.example: She had homemade ice cream for dessert.
meanings.example_cn: 她吃了些自制冰淇淋当餐后甜点。

meanings.meaning_en: if a building, wall etc collapses, it falls down suddenly, usually because it is weak or damaged
meanings.example: Uncle Ted’s chair collapsed under his weight.
meanings.example_cn: 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden failure in the way something works, so that it cannot continue
meanings.example: The roof had collapsed long ago.
meanings.example_cn: 屋顶早就塌了。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a plan, piece of writing etc to someone in authority for them to consider or approve
meanings.example: In desperation, Mrs. Jones submitted to an operation on her right knee to relieve the pain.
meanings.example_cn: 绝望中，琼斯夫人不得已接受了一次她右膝的手术以减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 资本化；资本总额；用大写
meanings.meaning_en: the act of capitalizing

meanings.meaning_cn: 维护，维修；保持；生活费用
meanings.meaning_en: the repairs, painting etc that are necessary to keep something in good condition
meanings.example: the cost of repairs and maintenance
meanings.example_cn: 维修保养费

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from one side of something to the other
meanings.example: a covered terrace extending the full width of the house
meanings.example_cn: 和房子同宽的有顶露台

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to do something, especially when this involves a lot of hard work or determination
meanings.example: please make an effort to be polite.
meanings.example_cn: 请尽量礼貌些。

meanings.meaning_en: a country, considered especially in relation to its people and its social or economic structure
meanings.example: the President’s radio broadcast to the nation
meanings.example_cn: 总统对全国的广播讲话

meanings.example: an international conglomerate
meanings.example_cn: 国际大型联合企业

meanings.meaning_cn: [岩] 砾岩；企业集团；聚合物
meanings.meaning_en: a large business organization consisting of several different companies that have joined together
ideas, advice, money, or effort that you put into a job or activity in order to help it succeed
meanings.example: If the input data specified it, the file will close and the process terminates.
meanings.example_cn: 如果输入数据指定，该文件就会关闭，数据处理终止。

meanings.meaning_cn: [自][电子] 输入；将…输入电脑
meanings.meaning_en: If you input information into a computer, you feed it in, for example, by typing it on a keyboard
meanings.example: The computer acts as a word processor where the text of a speech can be input at any time.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机起着文字处理器的作用，一篇讲话的文本可随时输入。

meanings.meaning_en: the comparative form of an adjective or adverb shows an increase in size, quality, degree etc when it is considered in relation to something else. For example, ‘bigger’ is the comparative form of ‘big’, and ‘more slowly’ is the comparative form of ‘slowly’.
meanings.example: After a lifetime of poverty, his last few years were spent in comparable comfort.
meanings.example_cn: 他穷了一辈子，最后几年还算过得比较舒适。

meanings.meaning_en: the form of an adjective or adverb that shows an increase in size, degree etc when something is considered in relation to something else. For example, ‘bigger’ is the comparative of ‘big’, and ‘more slowly’ is the comparative of ‘slowly’

meanings.meaning_cn: 相称的；同量的；同样大小的
meanings.meaning_en: matching something in size, quality, or length of time
meanings.example: Employees are paid salaries commensurate with those of teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 发给雇员的薪水与发给教师的薪水相当。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到期的；预期的；应付的；应得的
meanings.meaning_en: expected to happen or arrive at a particular time
meanings.example: Any money due you will be sent by cheque through the post.
meanings.example_cn: 应该支付给你的款项将会以支票邮寄给你。

meanings.meaning_en: directly to the north, south, east, or west
the activity of going to shops and buying things
meanings.example: Late-night shopping is becoming very popular.
meanings.example_cn: 深夜购物越来越普遍了。

meanings.example: I went on a shopping spree (= went shopping and bought a lot of things ) at the weekend and spent far too much money.
meanings.example_cn: 我周末大买特买了一番，花了好多钱。

meanings.meaning_en: saying how something should or must be done, or what should be done
meanings.example: prescriptive teaching methods
meanings.example_cn: 规定的教学方法

meanings.meaning_en: the style of someone’s writing
meanings.example: I recognised her handwriting on the envelope.
meanings.example_cn: 我认出了信封上她的笔迹。

meanings.example: My handwriting has never been very neat.
meanings.example_cn: 我的字从来都写得不够工整。

meanings.meaning_en: A person's or organization's solvency is their ability to pay their debts
meanings.example: ...unsound investments that could threaten the company's solvency.
meanings.example_cn: …可能威胁到公司偿债能力的不良投资。

meanings.meaning_en: a fact or event that makes you try harder to do something
meanings.example: The crowd’s reaction only acted as a spur.
meanings.example_cn: 人群的反应不过起了刺激作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an improvement or change happen faster
the process of keeping something in good condition
meanings.example: Poorer people find it hard to pay for their pet’s upkeep.
meanings.example_cn: 经济不宽裕的人难以负担养宠物的开销。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承认；答谢；报偿；告知已收到
meanings.meaning_en: to admit or accept that something is true or that a situation exists
meanings.example: The family acknowledge the need for change.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重量，重力；负担；砝码；重要性
meanings.meaning_en: how heavy something is when you measure it
meanings.example: The average weight of a baby at birth is just over seven pounds.
meanings.example_cn: 婴儿的平均出生体重是七磅多一点。

meanings.meaning_en: If you weight something, you make it heavier by adding something to it, for example, in order to stop it from moving easily
meanings.example: It can be sewn into curtain hems to weight the curtain and so allow it to hang better.
meanings.example_cn: 可以把它缝在窗帘的摺边里以增加窗帘的重量，使之更有下垂感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工资单；在册职工人数；工资名单
meanings.meaning_en: The people on the payroll of a company or an organization are the people who work for it and are paid by it
meanings.example: They had 87,000 employees on the payroll.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有87000人在在职人员工薪名册上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 废除；撤销；废止；放弃；否定
meanings.meaning_en: if a government repeals a law, it officially ends that law
meanings.example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

meanings.meaning_en: Repeal is also a noun
meanings.example: Next year will be the 60th anniversary of the repeal of Prohibition.
meanings.example_cn: 明年将是禁酒令废止的60周年。

meanings.meaning_en: happening, coming, or done quickly or when you do not expect it
meanings.example: a sudden change in the weather
meanings.example_cn: 天气的突然变化

meanings.example: Life is cruel, she thought, with a sudden rush of anger.
meanings.example_cn: 生活真残酷，她想，心头突然涌上一股怒气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 知觉；[生理] 感觉；看法；洞察力；获取
meanings.meaning_en: Your perception of something is the way that you think about it or the impression you have of it
meanings.example: He is interested in how our perceptions of death affect the way we live.
meanings.example_cn: 他对我们的死亡观如何影响我们的生活方式感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone doing something that they did not want you to know they were doing
meanings.example: He was caught red-handed (= as he was doing something wrong ) taking money from the cash register.
meanings.example_cn: 他从现金出纳机偷钱时被当场抓住。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of ground, especially when used for farming or building
meanings.example: They own a lot of land.
meanings.example_cn: 他们拥有许多土地。

meanings.meaning_en: If you land in an unpleasant situation or place or if something lands you in it, something causes you to be in it
meanings.example: He bought a piece of land.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一块地。

meanings.meaning_en: to translate spoken words from one language into another
meanings.example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们西班牙语说得很好，答应替我翻译。

meanings.meaning_en: believing that good things will happen in the future
meanings.example: Andrew took a more optimistic view.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁抱有更为乐观的想法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 悬挂，垂下；装饰；绞死；使悬而未决
meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone by dropping them with a rope around their neck, or to die in this way, especially as a punishment for a serious crime
meanings.example: If he is found guilty, he will almost certainly hang.
meanings.example_cn: 如果被判有罪，他几乎肯定会被处以绞刑。

meanings.example: I withheld payment until they had completed the work.
meanings.example_cn: 我扣着钱，直到他们完工。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is collectable is likely to be bought and kept as part of a group of similar things, especially because it might increase in value
meanings.example: They often come up for sale, but this more intimate and later artwork is quite rare and very collectable.
meanings.example_cn: 希特勒的画作常被拍卖，但这张卡片显得更为亲切，并且非常罕见，收藏价值很高。

meanings.example: Among other things, the collector examines the class loader data structures to determine which classes are live -- that is, are not garbage collectable.
meanings.example_cn: 在众多的事情当中，收集器检查类装入器的数据结构，来判断哪个类是活动的 —— 也就是说，不应当被当作垃圾收集的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阻止；排除；取消抵押品赎回权
meanings.meaning_en: if a bank forecloses, it takes away someone’s property because they have failed to pay back the money that they borrowed from the bank to buy it
meanings.example: The bank foreclosed on the mortgage for his previous home.
meanings.example_cn: 银行取消了他先前住房的抵押赎回权。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious magazine produced for professional people or those with a particular interest
meanings.example: the British Medical Journal
meanings.example_cn: 《英国医学杂志》

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists or cannot be used or repaired
meanings.example: companies that are polluting and destroying the environment
meanings.example_cn: 污染和破坏环境的公司

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body at the end of your arm, including your fingers and thumb, that you use to hold things
meanings.example: Steve gripped the steering wheel tightly with both hands.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫双手紧握方向盘。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone else with your hand
meanings.example: In her hand was a tattered old photograph.
meanings.example_cn: 她手中拿着的是一张破旧的老照片。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something reaches a particular point in their development or in a process or competition, they get to that point
meanings.example: Chelsea could reach the final of the European Cup.
meanings.example_cn: 切尔西队会进入欧洲杯决赛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 范围；延伸；河段；横风行驶
meanings.meaning_en: the limit of someone’s power or ability to do something
a forthcoming event, meeting etc is one that has been planned to happen soon
meanings.example: the forthcoming elections
meanings.example_cn: 即将到来的选举

meanings.example: Keep an eye on the noticeboards for forthcoming events .
meanings.example_cn: 请注意布告牌上的活动预告。

meanings.meaning_en: to close something, or to become closed
meanings.example: Shut the window, Ellen!
meanings.example_cn: 埃伦，把窗关上！

meanings.example: I heard his bedroom door shut.
meanings.example_cn: 我听到他的卧室门关上了。

meanings.meaning_en: not open
meanings.example: She lay down on her bed and shut her eyes .
meanings.example_cn: 她在床上躺下，闭上眼睛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 否定，否认；拒绝给予；拒绝…的要求
meanings.meaning_en: to say that something is not true, or that you do not believe something
meanings.example: The government denied the existence of poverty among 16- and 17-year-olds.
meanings.example_cn: 政府否认十六七岁的青少年当中存在贫困问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 兼容的；能共处的；可并立的
meanings.meaning_en: if two pieces of computer equipment are compatible, they can be used together, especially when they are made by different companies
meanings.example: The new software is IBM compatible (= can be used with IBM computers ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这个新软件与IBM的计算机兼容。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指令，命令；指示；教导；用法说明
meanings.meaning_en: the written information that tells you how to do or use something
meanings.example: Press ‘Enter’ and follow the on-screen instructions.
meanings.example_cn: 按回车键，然后按照电脑屏幕上的指示来操作。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of sending people or things to a particular place
meanings.example: the dispatch of warships to the region
meanings.example_cn: 派遣军舰到该地区

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone or something somewhere for a particular purpose
to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen
meanings.example: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions.
meanings.example_cn: 政府许诺要实施新的制度来控制金融贷款机构。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool, especially one used for outdoor physical work

meanings.meaning_cn: 反应；影响；反抗；起反作用
meanings.meaning_en: to behave in a particular way or show a particular emotion because of something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: He reacted angrily to the suggestion that he had lied.
meanings.example_cn: 说他撒谎，他非常生气。

meanings.meaning_en: to write an earlier date on a document or cheque than when it was actually written
meanings.example: The contract that was signed on Thursday morning was backdated to March 11.
meanings.example_cn: 星期四上午所签的合同从3月11日起生效。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for information or advice from someone because it is their job to know something
meanings.example: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.
meanings.example_cn: 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分；一分的硬币；森特（等于半音程的百分之一）
meanings.meaning_en: 1/100th of the standard unit of money in some countries. For example, there are 100 cents in one dollar or in one  euro  : symbol ¢.
meanings.example: A cup of rice which cost thirty cents a few weeks ago is now being sold for up to one dollar.
meanings.example_cn: 几周前价值30美分的1杯米如今卖到了1美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a situation or the effects of something less unpleasant, harmful, or serious
meanings.example: Measures need to be taken to mitigate the environmental effects of burning more coal.
meanings.example_cn: 需要采取措施来减轻燃煤增加对环境造成的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide or split into different parts, or to make something do this
meanings.example: This will keep your dressing from separating.
meanings.example_cn: 这样可以防止调味汁分层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 单独的；分开的；不同的；各自的；
meanings.meaning_en: different
meanings.example: First, separate the eggs (= divide the white part from the yellow part ) .
meanings.example_cn: 第一步，把蛋清和蛋黄分开。

meanings.example: All these recipes exemplify my cooking: healthy, delicious and quick.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些食谱例证了我的饭菜：健康、美味、快捷。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns shares in a company or business
meanings.example: Shareholders have been told to expect an even lower result next year.
meanings.example_cn: 股东们被告知明年的业绩还会更差。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow path or road with a rough uneven surface, especially one made by people or animals frequently moving through the same place
meanings.example: The road leading to the farm was little more than a dirt track .
meanings.example_cn: 只有一条烂泥小路通往农场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 追踪；通过；循路而行；用纤拉
meanings.meaning_en: to search for a person or animal by following the marks they leave behind them on the ground, their smell etc
meanings.example: The track led through dense forest.
meanings.example_cn: 小径穿过茂密的森林。

meanings.meaning_en: a company or person that provides a service
meanings.example: an Internet service provider
meanings.example_cn: 因特网服务供应商

meanings.meaning_cn: 跛足的；僵痛的；不完全的；无说服力的；差劲的，蹩脚的
meanings.meaning_en: a lame excuse or explanation is weak and difficult to believe
meanings.example: a lame attempt to deflect criticism
meanings.example_cn: 转移批评的一个无力的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person or animal unable to walk properly
Agricultural means involving or relating to agriculture
meanings.example: Farmers struggling for survival strip the forests for agricultural land.
meanings.example_cn: 为生存而挣扎的农民们把森林伐光来作农业用地。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摄氏的；[仪] 摄氏温度的；百分度的
meanings.meaning_en: Centigrade is a scale for measuring temperature, in which water freezes at 0 degrees and boils at 100 degrees. It is represented by the symbol °C.
meanings.example: ...daytime temperatures of up to forty degrees centigrade.
meanings.example_cn: …高达40摄氏度的日间气温。

meanings.meaning_cn: 困境；进退两难；两刀论法
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which it is very difficult to decide what to do, because all the choices seem equally good or equally bad
meanings.example: a moral dilemma
meanings.example_cn: 道德上进退两难的窘境

meanings.meaning_cn: 成熟的；充分考虑的；到期的；成年人的
meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child or young person, who is mature behaves in a sensible and reasonable way, as you would expect an adult to behave
meanings.example: Laura is very mature for her age .
meanings.example_cn: 相对她的年龄来说劳拉是很成熟的。

meanings.meaning_en: to become fully grown or developed
meanings.example: We’re mature enough to disagree on this issue but still respect each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都很成熟，尽管我们对此事意见不同，但还是彼此尊重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无所不能的；全能的；有无限权力的
meanings.meaning_en: able to do everything
meanings.example: Doug lived in the shadow of his seemingly omnipotent father.
meanings.example_cn: 道格生活在他那看似无所不能的父亲的阴影里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 某一；必然的；确信；无疑的；有把握的
meanings.meaning_en: confident and sure, without any doubts
meanings.example: I felt certain that I’d passed the test.
meanings.example_cn: 我感觉自己肯定通过这次测验了。

meanings.meaning_en: particular people or things in a group

meanings.meaning_cn: 成功，成就；胜利；大获成功的人或事物
meanings.meaning_en: when you achieve what you want or intend
meanings.example: The experiment was a big success.
meanings.example_cn: 实验非常成功。

meanings.meaning_en: if workers in a factory, hospital etc work shifts, they work for a particular period of time during the day or night, and are then replaced by others, so that there are always people working
meanings.example: I work shifts.
meanings.example_cn: 我轮班工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a situation, discussion etc by giving special attention to one idea or subject instead of to a previous one
meanings.example: A shift system has been introduced.
meanings.example_cn: 实行了轮班工作制。

meanings.meaning_cn: 农村，乡下；乡下的全体居民
meanings.meaning_en: land that is outside cities and towns
meanings.example: The house had lovely views over open countryside .
meanings.example_cn: 这房子望出去是开阔的乡村美景。

meanings.meaning_en: going out from a place or point, and moving forwards or outwards
meanings.example: The house was still burning, pouring forth thick black smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 房子仍在燃烧，冒出浓浓的黑烟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 检查；调查； 检测；考试
meanings.meaning_en: to look at something carefully and thoroughly because you want to find out more about it
meanings.example: A team of divers was sent down to examine the wreck.
meanings.example_cn: 一组潜水员被送到水下检查沉船。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可固定的；可确定的；可装置的

meanings.meaning_en: if two players, teams etc tie or are tied in a game or competition, they finish it with an equal number of points
meanings.example: He tied the ends of the plastic bag together.
meanings.example_cn: 他把塑料袋的两头系在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 领带；平局；鞋带；领结；不分胜负
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow piece of cloth tied in a knot around the neck, worn by men
a reason that you give to explain careless or offensive behaviour
meanings.example: I’m tired of listening to his excuses.
meanings.example_cn: 我听厌了他的种种理由。

meanings.meaning_en: to forgive someone for doing something that is not seriously wrong, such as being rude or careless
someone you know, but who is not a close friend
meanings.example: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna.
meanings.example_cn: 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: to demand that something should happen
meanings.example: Stay for supper – I insist!
meanings.example_cn: 留下来吃晚餐——一定的！

meanings.meaning_cn: 收件人，收信人；[计] 被访地址
meanings.meaning_en: the person a letter, package etc is addressed to
meanings.example: Who is the addressee?
meanings.example_cn: 收件人是谁？

meanings.meaning_cn: 工艺的，科技的；技术上的；专门的
meanings.meaning_en: connected with knowledge of how machines work
meanings.example: Our staff will be available to give you technical support .
meanings.example_cn: 有我们的员工向你提供技术支持。

meanings.meaning_cn: 危险的；冒险的；（作品等）有伤风化的
meanings.meaning_en: involving a risk that something bad will happen
meanings.example: Doctors say it’s too risky to try and operate.
meanings.example_cn: 医生说动手术风险太大。

meanings.meaning_en: to block a road, passage etc
meanings.example: A small aircraft was obstructing the runway.
meanings.example_cn: 一架小型飞机堵住了跑道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 科目；课程；过程；进程；道路；路线，航向；一道菜
meanings.meaning_en: a period of time or process during which something happens
to think that something will happen because it seems likely or has been planned
meanings.example: He will be hard to beat. I fully expect (= am completely sure about ) that and I’m ready.
meanings.example_cn: 他很难击败。我确信这一点，不过我准备好了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells a particular product, especially an expensive one
meanings.example: ...an antique dealer.
meanings.example_cn: …一位古董商。

meanings.meaning_en: shaped like a circle
meanings.example: a circular table
meanings.example_cn: 圆桌

meanings.meaning_en: a place where planes take off and land, with buildings for passengers to wait in
meanings.example: The plane landed at Heathrow Airport.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机降落在希思罗机场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 苗条的；修长的；微小的；差的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is slim is attractively thin
meanings.example: a slim young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材苗条的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: to make yourself thinner by eating less, taking a lot of exercise etc
meanings.example: a slim waist
meanings.example_cn: 纤腰

meanings.meaning_cn: (Slim)人名；(阿拉伯)萨利姆；(英、西)斯利姆
空虚的；空的；空缺的；空闲的；茫然的
meanings.meaning_en: a vacant seat, building, room or piece of land is empty and available for someone to use
meanings.example: Only a few apartments were still vacant.
meanings.example_cn: 只有几套公寓仍然空着。

meanings.example: There was only a vacant lot (= empty unused area of land in a city ) where her house used to be.
meanings.example_cn: 她以前房子所在的地方只剩下一块空地了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使潮湿；使阻尼；使沮丧，抑制
meanings.meaning_en: to dampen something
meanings.example: Damp had stained the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 墙上留下了潮湿的痕迹。

meanings.meaning_en: water in walls or in the air that causes things to be slightly wet
slightly wet, often in an unpleasant way
something difficult or worrying that you are responsible for
meanings.example: His family responsibilities had started to become a burden.
meanings.example_cn: 家庭责任已开始成为他的负担。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone burdens you with something that is likely to worry you, for example, a problem or a difficult decision, they tell you about it
meanings.example: We decided not to burden him with the news.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定不拿这个消息去烦他。

meanings.meaning_en: happening at the beginning
meanings.example: an initial investment of £5,000
meanings.example_cn: 5,000英镑的初始投资

meanings.meaning_en: to write your initials on a document to make it official or to show that you agree with something
meanings.example: The initial response has been encouraging.
meanings.example_cn: 最初的反应情况很乐观。

meanings.meaning_en: the first letter of someone’s first name
if you undergo a change, an unpleasant experience etc, it happens to you or is done to you
meanings.example: The country has undergone massive changes recently.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家最近经历了巨大的变化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 边缘；利润，余裕；页边的空白
meanings.meaning_en: the empty space at the side of a page
meanings.example: Someone had scribbled a note in the margin .
meanings.example_cn: 有人在页边写了条批注。

meanings.example: Use double spacing and wide margins to leave room for comments.
meanings.example_cn: 采用双倍行距和宽阔的页边空白，以便留出地方写评注。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摇晃的；不可靠的；不坚定的
meanings.meaning_en: weak and unsteady because of old age, illness, or shock
meanings.example: a shaky voice
meanings.example_cn: 颤抖的声音

meanings.meaning_cn: 未付款的；[税收] 未缴纳的；无报酬的
meanings.meaning_en: an unpaid bill or debt has not been paid
meanings.example: unpaid work
meanings.example_cn: 无报酬的工作

meanings.meaning_cn: [计] 处理器；处理程序；加工者
meanings.meaning_en: the central part of a computer that deals with the commands and information it is given
meanings.example: US tuna processors
meanings.example_cn: 美国的金枪鱼加工厂商

meanings.meaning_en: Periodical events or situations happen occasionally, at fairly regular intervals
meanings.example: She made periodical visits to her dentist.
meanings.example_cn: 她定期去看牙医。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine, especially one about a serious or technical subject

meanings.meaning_cn: [仪] 投影仪；放映机；探照灯；设计者
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes a film or picture appear on a screen or flat surface
meanings.example: ...a slide projector.
meanings.example_cn: …幻灯机。

meanings.meaning_en: a  plus sign
meanings.example: Daytime temperatures barely reached plus 5˚.
meanings.example_cn: 白天的气温仅零上5度。

meanings.meaning_en: more than zero – used especially when talking about temperatures
used to show that one number or amount is added to another
a tool you use for picking up and eating food, with a handle and three or four points
meanings.example: Put the knives and forks on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 把刀叉摆放在桌子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to put food into your mouth or onto a plate using a fork

meanings.meaning_cn: 形式，形状；形态，外形；方式；表格
meanings.meaning_en: the way something is or appears to be
meanings.example: We oppose racism in all its forms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们反对各种形式的种族主义。

meanings.meaning_cn: 构成，组成；排列，组织；产生，塑造
meanings.meaning_en: to establish an organization, committee, government etc
meanings.example: Vitamin C can be taken in capsule or tablet form .
meanings.example_cn: 补充维生素C可以服用胶囊，也可以服用片剂。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone realize something important or dangerous
meanings.example: The school immediately alerted the police .
meanings.example_cn: 学校立即报了警。

meanings.meaning_en: giving all your attention to what is happening, being said etc
a warning to be ready for possible danger
a thin book giving information or advertising something
meanings.example: a holiday brochure
meanings.example_cn: 度假手册

meanings.meaning_cn: 实验的；根据实验的；试验性的
meanings.meaning_en: used for, relating to, or resulting from experiments
meanings.example: experimental animals
meanings.example_cn: 用于实验的动物

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同意；不一致；争执；不适宜
meanings.meaning_en: to have or express a different opinion from someone else
meanings.example: Barr strongly disagreed with Kronfeld’s statement.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尔强烈反对克龙费尔德的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: something you buy cheaply or for less than its usual price
meanings.example: There are no bargains in the clothes shops at the moment.
meanings.example_cn: 这阵子服装店里没有什么便宜货。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讨价还价；议价；(谈价钱后)卖
meanings.meaning_en: to discuss the conditions of a sale, agreement etc, for example to try and get a lower price
meanings.example: It’s an attractive little home, and I think it’s a bargain .
meanings.example_cn: 这是一个漂亮的小居所，我觉得是合算的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make plans or arrangements for something that will happen in the future
meanings.example: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.
meanings.example_cn: 原告想要有更多的时间来准备诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: if a plane nosedives, it drops suddenly and steeply with its front end pointing towards the ground
meanings.example: The value of other shares nosedived by $2.6 billion.
meanings.example_cn: 其他股票市值暴跌了26亿美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: （价格等的）急降，暴跌；（飞机的）俯冲；（名声）低落；（情况）突然变坏
meanings.meaning_en: a sudden very large fall in the price, value, or condition of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 野心勃勃的；有雄心的；热望的；炫耀的
meanings.meaning_en: determined to be successful, rich, powerful etc
meanings.example: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.
meanings.example_cn: 艾尔弗雷德雄心勃勃，一心想着发财。

meanings.meaning_cn: [自] 调节器；调停者；（保险等）理算员
meanings.meaning_en: An adjuster is a device that allows you to alter a piece of equipment's position or setting
meanings.example: ...a seat belt adjuster.
meanings.example_cn: …一个座椅安全带调节器。

meanings.meaning_en: to write information down or store it in a computer or on film so that it can be looked at in the future
meanings.example: Her husband made her record every penny she spent.
meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫要她把花的每分钱都记下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 档案，履历；唱片；最高纪录
meanings.meaning_en: information about something that is written down or stored on computer, film etc so that it can be looked at in the future
meanings.example: The coroner recorded a verdict of accidental death.
meanings.example_cn: 验尸官作出了意外死亡的结论。

meanings.meaning_en: You use record to say that something is higher, lower, better, or worse than has ever been achieved before
