meanings.example: Profits were at record levels.
meanings.example_cn: 利润水平是创纪录的。

meanings.meaning_en: to get something that you want, especially through your own effort, skill, or work
meanings.example: Evans was trying to obtain a false passport and other documents.
meanings.example_cn: 埃文斯当时正试图获取假护照和其他文件。

meanings.meaning_en: a political system in which all businesses, farms etc are owned by the government
meanings.example: Toohey is the exception: he is the one character in Rand's work who fully comprehends the difference between good and evil, between individualism and collectivism, and consciously chooses evil.
meanings.example_cn: 图希是个例外：他是兰德作品里一个彻底理解善与恶的区别，个人主义与集体主义的区别，并刻意选择为恶的角色。

meanings.meaning_en: too much or too little in relation to something else
meanings.example: the disproportionate amount of money being spent on defence
meanings.example_cn: 比例失衡的国防开支

meanings.meaning_en: a round flat piece of rubber used for stopping the water flowing out of a bath or  sink
meanings.example: the bath plug
meanings.example_cn: 浴缸塞子

meanings.meaning_cn: 塞住；用插头将与电源接通
meanings.meaning_en: to fill or block a small hole
to give something such as an area of land or a right to a country or person, especially when you are forced to
meanings.example: Only a short campaign took place in Puerto Rico, but after the war Spain ceded the island to America.
meanings.example_cn: 波多黎各岛仅经历了一场短暂的战斗，但大战后西班牙把该岛割让给了美国。

meanings.meaning_cn: 储备，储存；自然保护区；预备队；缄默；[金融] 储备金
meanings.meaning_en: a supply of something kept to be used if it is needed
meanings.example: $10 million in cash reserves
meanings.example_cn: 1,000万美元的现金储备

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc to be kept for you to use at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: oil reserves
meanings.example_cn: 石油储备

meanings.meaning_en: to increase or improve something and make it more successful
meanings.example: The new resort area has boosted tourism.
meanings.example_cn: 新的度假区促进了旅游业的发展。

meanings.meaning_en: something that gives someone more confidence, or that helps something increase, improve, or become successful
the particular taste of a food or drink
meanings.example: Which flavour do you want - chocolate or vanilla?
meanings.example_cn: 你要哪种味道的，巧克力还是香草？

meanings.meaning_en: to give something a particular taste or more taste

meanings.meaning_cn: 交叉，十字；十字架，十字形物
meanings.meaning_en: an upright post of wood with another crossing it near the top, that people in the past were fastened to with nails and left to die on as a punishment
meanings.example: The by-pass crosses Wilton Lane shortly after a roundabout.
meanings.example_cn: 这条旁道绕过环岛后不久就和威尔顿巷相交。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more roads, lines, etc cross, or if one crosses another, they go across each other

meanings.meaning_cn: 交叉的，相反的；乖戾的；生气的
meanings.meaning_en: angry or annoyed

meanings.meaning_cn: 反应，感应；反动，复古；反作用
meanings.meaning_en: something that you feel or do because of something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: What was Jeff’s reaction when you told him about the job?
meanings.example_cn: 你告诉杰夫这个工作时，他是什么反应？

meanings.meaning_en: the money that is available to an organization or person, or a plan of how it will be spent
meanings.example: We had a really tight budget .
meanings.example_cn: 我们的预算很紧。

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully plan and control how much money you spend and what you will buy with it
very low in price – often used in advertisements
when you work together with another person or group to achieve something, especially in science or art
meanings.example: The company is building the centre in collaboration with the Institute of Offshore Engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司正与海洋工程学院合建这座中心。

meanings.meaning_en: friendly behaviour towards visitors
meanings.example: Thanks for your hospitality over the past few weeks.
meanings.example_cn: 感谢你几周来的热情款待。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发射（导弹、火箭等）；发起，发动；使…下水
meanings.meaning_en: to start something, usually something big or important
meanings.example: The organization has launched a campaign to raise $150,000.
meanings.example_cn: 为了筹集15万美元，该组织发起了一场募捐活动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发射；发行，投放市场；下水；汽艇
meanings.meaning_en: when a new product, book etc is made available or made known
meanings.example: The Canadian police plan to launch an investigation into the deal.
meanings.example_cn: 加拿大警方计划对这宗交易进行调查。

meanings.meaning_en: An infringement is an action or situation that interferes with your rights and the freedom you are entitled to
meanings.example: ...infringement of privacy.
meanings.example_cn: …对隐私的侵犯。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the quality or standard of something rather than the quantity
meanings.example: There are qualitative differences in the way children of different ages and adults think.
meanings.example_cn: 不同年龄的儿童和成人在思维方式上有着质的差异。

meanings.meaning_en: for use by one person or group, not for everyone
meanings.example: Morris has a private jet.
meanings.example_cn: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

meanings.meaning_en: a soldier of the lowest rank
meanings.example: He made some notes for his private use.
meanings.example_cn: 他记了些笔记供自己所用。

meanings.meaning_en: The expiry of something such as a contract, deadline, or visa is the time that it comes to an end or stops being valid
meanings.example: The United Mine Workers are not on strike today, despite the expiry of their contract at midnight.
meanings.example_cn: 联合矿业工会今天没有罢工，尽管他们的合同于午夜期满。

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of something that has been changed so that it is slightly different
meanings.example: the human version of mad cow disease
meanings.example_cn: 疯牛病的人类变体

meanings.meaning_cn: 身份；同一性，一致；特性；恒等式
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s identity is their name or who they are
meanings.example: The identity of the killer is still unknown.
meanings.example_cn: 凶手的身份仍未查明。

meanings.meaning_cn: 典型的；特有的；象征性的
meanings.meaning_en: having the usual features or qualities of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: typical British weather
meanings.example_cn: 典型的英国天气

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸引，占用；使参加；雇佣；使订婚；预定
meanings.meaning_en: to be doing or to become involved in an activity
meanings.example: She engaged the clutch and the car moved.
meanings.example_cn: 她踩下离合器，汽车便开动了。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone officially to do something, especially if you are a military leader, a king etc
meanings.example: He commands the 4th Battalion.
meanings.example_cn: 他指挥第四营。

meanings.meaning_en: the control of a group of people or a situation

meanings.meaning_cn: 作战；参加竞选；参加活动
meanings.meaning_en: to lead or take part in a series of actions intended to achieve a particular social or political result
meanings.example: Jones ran a good campaign.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯的活动搞得很成功。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of actions intended to achieve a particular result relating to politics or business, or a social improvement
meanings.example: Police have launched a campaign to crack down on drug dealers.
meanings.example_cn: 警方发起了一场严厉打击毒贩的运动。

meanings.meaning_en: Downtown is also an adverb
meanings.example: By day he worked downtown for American Standard.
meanings.example_cn: 白天，他在市中心为美国标准公司工作。

meanings.meaning_en: Downtown places are in or toward the centre of a large town or city, where the stores and places of business are
meanings.example: ...an office in downtown Chicago.
meanings.example_cn: …芝加哥市中心的一间办公室。

meanings.meaning_en: Downtown is also a noun
meanings.example: ...in a large vacant area of the downtown.
meanings.example_cn: …在市中心的一大块空地上。

meanings.meaning_en: to think of, plan, and organize a large, important, and difficult operation
meanings.example: The project was masterminded by Morris, then aged 29.
meanings.example_cn: 这个项目由时年29岁的莫里斯策划。

meanings.example: Ridley, as commerce secretary, masterminded the privatisation.
meanings.example_cn: 时任商务部长的里德利策划推行了私有化。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something by buying it or being given it
meanings.example: Manning hoped to acquire valuable works of art as cheaply as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 曼宁希望以尽可能低的价格买到有价值的艺术品。

meanings.meaning_en: if a period of time when someone has a particular position of authority expires, it ends
meanings.example: The chairman’s term of office has already expired.
meanings.example_cn: 主席任期已满。

meanings.meaning_en: a small design that is the official sign of a company or organization
meanings.example: ...the famous MGM logo of the roaring lion.
meanings.example_cn: …米高梅公司著名的怒吼狂狮标志。

meanings.meaning_cn: 演讲者；扬声器；说话者；说某种语言的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes a formal speech to a group of people
meanings.example: The keynote speaker (= main or most important speaker ) was Robert Venturi, the architect.
meanings.example_cn: 主要发言人是建筑师罗伯特·文图里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 投合，迎合；满足需要；提供饮食及服务
meanings.meaning_en: to provide and serve food and drinks at a party, meeting etc, usually as a business
meanings.example: We cater to an exclusive clientele.
meanings.example_cn: 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

meanings.meaning_cn: 请回复 Répondez s'il vous plaît（法语）
觉醒，意识到；醒来；被唤起
meanings.meaning_en: to wake up, or to make someone wake up
meanings.example: It was midday when she awoke.
meanings.example_cn: 她醒来时已是中午。

meanings.meaning_en: not sleeping
meanings.example: We awoke to a day of brilliant sunshine.
meanings.example_cn: 我们醒来时阳光明媚。

meanings.meaning_en: serious study of a subject, in order to discover new facts or test new ideas
meanings.example: Gould was helped in his researches by local naturalists.
meanings.example_cn: 古尔德在研究过程中得到了当地博物学家的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: to study a subject in detail, especially in order to discover new facts or test new ideas
to give a judgment or opinion
meanings.example: The scheme was pronounced a failure.
meanings.example_cn: 该方案宣告失败。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有价值的；贵重的；可估价的
meanings.meaning_en: worth a lot of money
meanings.example: a valuable painting
meanings.example_cn: 一幅名贵的画

meanings.example: Their most valuable belongings were locked in a safe in the bedroom.
meanings.example_cn: 他们最值钱的财物锁在卧室保险箱里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 要点；得分；标点；[机] 尖端
meanings.meaning_en: a single fact, idea, or opinion that is part of an argument or discussion
meanings.example: That’s a very interesting point.
meanings.example_cn: 那个观点很有趣。

meanings.meaning_en: to show something to someone by holding up one of your fingers or a thin object towards it
meanings.example: She made some extremely good points.
meanings.example_cn: 她提出了一些很不错的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people or animals scatter, or if something scatters them, they move quickly in different directions
meanings.example: The sound of gunfire made the crowd scatter in all directions.
meanings.example_cn: 枪声使人群四散奔逃。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a great effort to achieve something
meanings.example: He strives hard to keep himself very fit.
meanings.example_cn: 他努力使自己保持非常的健康。

meanings.meaning_en: mutual feelings such as respect, trust, or hatred are feelings that two or more people have for each other
meanings.example: I didn’t like Dev, and the feeling seemed to be mutual.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢德夫，他好像也不喜欢我。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使依附；贴上；系上；使依恋
meanings.meaning_en: If you attach something to an object, you join it or fasten it to the object
meanings.example: We attach labels to things before we file them away.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在把东西归档前先给它们贴上标签。

meanings.meaning_cn: 设计；想出；发明；图谋；遗赠给
meanings.meaning_en: to plan or invent a new way of doing something
meanings.example: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
meanings.example_cn: 她想出一种加快办公室之间通信联络的方法。

meanings.example: a proprietary brand of insecticide
meanings.example_cn: 专利品牌杀虫剂

meanings.meaning_cn: 所有的；专利的；私人拥有的
meanings.meaning_en: a proprietary product is one that is sold under a  trade name
meanings.example: proprietary software products
meanings.example_cn: 专利软件产品

meanings.meaning_en: the speed at which something happens or is done
meanings.example: He quickened his pace , longing to be home.
meanings.example_cn: 他加快步伐，盼望着早点回到家中。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk first in one direction and then in another many times, especially because you are nervous
to deliberately avoid doing something you should do, because you are lazy
meanings.example: He was fired for shirking.
meanings.example_cn: 他因偷懒被解雇了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the purpose of something
meanings.example: The two departments have slight functional differences.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个部门功能稍有不同。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of trying to do something even when it is difficult
meanings.example: his dogged determination (= very strong determination ) to succeed
meanings.example_cn: 他想要成功的坚定决心

meanings.meaning_cn: 神政；神权政体；神治国（复数theocracies）
meanings.meaning_en: a social system or state controlled by religious leaders
to explain to someone how to do something, by doing it yourself or using actions to help them learn
meanings.example: The man grinned, showing bad teeth.
meanings.example_cn: 那男人咧着嘴笑，露出一口坏牙。

meanings.meaning_en: a performance for the public, especially one that includes singing, dancing, or jokes

meanings.meaning_cn: 活着的；活泼的；有生气的
meanings.meaning_en: still living and not dead
meanings.example: It was a bad accident – they’re lucky to be alive.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一宗严重事故——他们能活着实属幸运。

meanings.meaning_en: the effect or influence that an event, situation etc has on someone or something
meanings.example: The force of the impact knocked the breath out of her.
meanings.example_cn: 撞击力使她喘不过气来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挤入，压紧；撞击；对…产生影响
meanings.meaning_en: to have an important or noticeable effect on someone or something

meanings.meaning_cn: 活动停止期间；临时解雇；操作停止；失业期
meanings.meaning_en: When there are layoffs in a company, people become unemployed because there is no more work for them in the company
meanings.example: It will close more than 200 stores nationwide resulting in the layoffs of an estimated 2,000 employees.
meanings.example_cn: 在全国范围内将关闭二百多家商店，造成约两千人失业。

meanings.meaning_en: Supervisory means involved in supervising people, activities, or places
meanings.example: Most supervisory boards meet only twice a year.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数监理会一年只开两次会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 减少；下降；缩小；还原反应
meanings.meaning_en: a decrease in the size, price, or amount of something, or the act of decreasing something
meanings.example: strategies for noise reduction
meanings.example_cn: 减少噪音的对策

meanings.meaning_en: to fix something that is damaged, broken, split, or not working properly
meanings.example: Dad was up the ladder, repairing the roof.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在梯子上修补屋顶。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to fix a thing that is damaged, broken, or not working
meanings.example: Where can I get my shoes repaired ?
meanings.example_cn: 哪儿能修补鞋子？

meanings.meaning_cn: 企业资源计划（Enterprise Resource Planning）；有效辐射功率（effective radiated power）

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is impressionable is easily influenced, especially because they are young
meanings.example: The kids are at an impressionable age.
meanings.example_cn: 这些儿童正处于易受影响的年龄。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神经的；紧张不安的；强健有力的
meanings.meaning_en: worried or frightened about something, and unable to relax
meanings.example: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

meanings.example: an education system that perpetuates the divisions in our society
meanings.example_cn: 使我们的社会持续分化的一种教育制度

meanings.meaning_en: careful thought and attention, especially before making an official or important decision
meanings.example: proposals put forward for consideration
meanings.example_cn: 提请考虑的建议

meanings.meaning_cn: 忠实的，忠诚的；如实的；准确可靠的
meanings.meaning_en: remaining loyal to a particular person, belief, political party etc and continuing to support them
meanings.example: a faithful friend
meanings.example_cn: 忠诚的朋友

meanings.example: years of faithful service to the company
meanings.example_cn: 为公司多年忠诚的服务

meanings.meaning_en: to not have something that you need, or not have enough of it
meanings.example: Alex’s real problem is that he lacks confidence.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历克斯的真正问题是缺乏信心。

meanings.meaning_en: when there is not enough of something, or none of it

meanings.meaning_cn: 估计到达时间（Estimated Time of Arrival）；欧洲教师协会（European Teachers Association）；教育电视协会（Educational Television Association）
可任意处理的；可自由使用的；用完即可丢弃的
meanings.meaning_en: intended to be used once or for a short time and then thrown away
meanings.example: disposable nappies
meanings.example_cn: 一次性尿布

meanings.meaning_en: to do something better than someone else or be more successful
meanings.example: We outstripped all our competitors in sales last year.
meanings.example_cn: 去年我们的销售额超过了所有竞争对手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 市场；行情；股票市场；市面；集市；销路；商店
meanings.meaning_en: a particular country or area where a company sells its goods or where a particular type of goods is sold
meanings.example: Our main overseas market is Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的主要海外市场是日本。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a product available in shops
to fail to pay money that you owe at the right time
meanings.example: The credit card business is down, and more borrowers are defaulting on loans.
meanings.example_cn: 信用卡生意正在走下坡路，更多的借贷人不履行还贷责任。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违约；缺席；缺乏；系统默认值
meanings.meaning_en: failure to pay money that you owe at the right time
the quality of being important
meanings.example: He was full of his own importance (= he behaved in an annoying way which showed that he thought he was very important ).
meanings.example_cn: 他自以为很了不起。

meanings.example: Beer is a beverage of the remotest time.
meanings.example_cn: 啤酒是一种最古老的饮料。

meanings.meaning_cn: 包含；控制；容纳；牵制（敌军）
meanings.meaning_en: if something such as a bag, box, or place contains something, that thing is inside it
meanings.example: The thieves stole a purse containing bank-notes.
meanings.example_cn: 小偷们偷到了一个里面有钞票的钱包。

meanings.meaning_en: to express something in words
meanings.example: Urge your child to verbalize his feelings.
meanings.example_cn: 鼓励你的孩子用言语表达自己的情感。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave towards someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: It was difficult to treat patients because of a shortage of medicine.
meanings.example_cn: 由于缺少药物，很难给病人治病。

meanings.meaning_en: something special that you give someone or do for them because you know they will enjoy it

meanings.meaning_cn: 持票人；[建] 承木；[机] 托架；送信人；搬运工人
meanings.meaning_en: The bearer of something such as a message is the person who brings it to you
meanings.example: I hate to be the bearer of bad news.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌当坏消息的捎信人。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept, believe in, or agree with something
meanings.example: Sarah rejected her brother’s offer of help.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉拒绝了她弟弟的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: a product that has been rejected because there is something wrong with it
meanings.example: Dexter flatly rejected (= completely rejected ) calls for his resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 德克斯特断然拒绝让他辞职的要求。

meanings.meaning_en: likely or able to be changed in the future
meanings.example: a provisional government
meanings.example_cn: 临时政府

meanings.example: We accept provisional bookings by phone.
meanings.example_cn: 我们接受电话临时预约。

meanings.meaning_en: used with past participles to form perfect tenses
meanings.example: Our guests have arrived.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的客人到了。

meanings.meaning_en: used with past participles to form perfect tenses
meanings.example: Has anyone phoned?
meanings.example_cn: 有人打过电话来吗？

meanings.example: We’ve been spending too much money.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已经花掉太多钱了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特殊的，特定的；明确的；详细的；[药] 具有特效的
meanings.meaning_en: a specific thing, person, or group is one particular thing, person, or group
meanings.example: games suitable for specific age groups
meanings.example_cn: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: particular details
meanings.example: a specific example of alcohol’s effect on the body
meanings.example_cn: 酒精对身体影响的具体例子

meanings.meaning_cn: 方向；指导；趋势；用法说明

meanings.meaning_en: a formal statement saying that something is true, especially one a  witness  makes in a court of law
meanings.example: Barker’s testimony is crucial to the prosecution’s case.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克的证词对控方的指控起到了关键作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超过，超额；过度，过量；无节制
meanings.meaning_en: a larger amount of something than is allowed or needed
meanings.example: After you apply the oil, wait 20 minutes before wiping off any excess.
meanings.example_cn: 涂上油以后，等20分钟再擦掉多余部分。

meanings.meaning_en: additional and not needed because there is already enough of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 承担，保证；从事；同意；试图
meanings.meaning_en: to accept that you are responsible for a piece of work, and start to do it
meanings.example: He undertook to pay the money back in six months.
meanings.example_cn: 他保证在六个月之内还钱。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid thing that you can hold, touch, or see but that is not alive
meanings.example: an everyday object such as a spoon
meanings.example_cn: 调羹之类的日常用品

meanings.meaning_en: to state a fact or opinion as a reason for opposing or disapproving of something
meanings.example: a small metal object
meanings.example_cn: 一个小金属物件

meanings.meaning_en: not honest, and so deceiving or cheating people
meanings.example: dishonest traders
meanings.example_cn: 奸商

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone have or use something that belongs to you
meanings.example: As a kid he’d never share his toys.
meanings.example_cn: 他小时候从不肯与人分享他的玩具。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the equal parts into which the  ownership  of a company is divided
Parameters are factors or limits that affect the way something can be done or made
meanings.example: ...some of the parameters that determine the taste of a wine.
meanings.example_cn: …一些决定葡萄酒味道的参数。

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令；顺序；规则；[贸易] 定单
meanings.meaning_en: the way that things or events are arranged in relation to each other, so that one thing is first, another thing is second etc
meanings.example: There seemed to be no logical order to the sections.
meanings.example_cn: 这几部分似乎没有逻辑顺序。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that they must do something, especially using your official power or authority
an interactive computer program, television system etc allows you to communicate directly with it, and does things in reaction to your actions
meanings.example: interactive computer systems
meanings.example_cn: 交互式电脑系统

meanings.meaning_en: to get back an amount of money you have lost or spent
meanings.example: The movie will have to be a huge hit to recoup its cost.
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影必须大获成功才能收回成本。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of people who stay, work, or live in a room or building at the same time
meanings.example: Hotels in Tokyo enjoy over 90% occupancy.
meanings.example_cn: 东京的宾馆入住率高达90%以上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 群众,一伙;一堆,许多,大众
meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people who have gathered together to do something, for example to watch something or protest about something
meanings.example: A vast crowd gathered in the main square.
meanings.example_cn: 主广场上聚集了一大群人。

meanings.meaning_en: if people crowd somewhere, they gather together in large numbers, filling a particular place
meanings.example: She mingled with the crowd of guests, exchanging greetings.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿梭在宾客中间和他们打招呼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 替罪羊，替人顶罪者；替身
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is blamed for something bad that happens, even if it is not their fault
meanings.example: I don't think I deserve to be made the scapegoat for a couple of bad results.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为我不该为出现的一些不良后果充当替罪羊。

meanings.meaning_en: To scapegoat someone means to blame them publicly for something bad that has happened, even though it was not their fault
meanings.example: ...a climate where ethnic minorities are continually scapegoated for the lack of jobs and housing problems.
meanings.example_cn: …一种屡屡把缺少工作职位和住房问题归罪于少数族裔的风气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 利益相关者；赌金保管者
meanings.meaning_en: someone chosen to hold the money that is risked by people on a race, competition etc and to give all of it to the winner
meanings.example: ...the Delaware River Port Authority, a major stakeholder in Penn's Landing.
meanings.example_cn: …特拉华河港务局，佩恩码头的一个大股东。

meanings.example: So we have the current argument over how much of the derivative market will be exempt from regulation.
meanings.example_cn: 所以我们就看到了当前有关衍生产品市场到底有多大份额可以得到规则的豁免的辩论。

meanings.example: All the new rules do is exempt the user from legal liability - something Apple does not appear to be pursuing anyway.
meanings.example_cn: 新法规做到的仅仅是免除了用户的法律责任 - 看起来苹果本来也不打算追究这种责任。

meanings.example: So empirical approaches to literature, the simple observation of data from which one can generalize -they exempt these from the general charge against literary theory.
meanings.example_cn: 文学的经验主义研究方法，对我们所概括的事物的简单数据观察,对文学理论的普遍控诉中,他们免除了这些。

meanings.meaning_cn: 必备的，必不可少的；需要的
meanings.meaning_en: needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: He lacks the requisite qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他缺少必要的资历。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is needed for a particular purpose
a mistake
meanings.example: an error message
meanings.example_cn: 出错信息

meanings.meaning_cn: 急剧的；锋利的；强烈的；敏捷的；刺耳的
meanings.meaning_en: having a very thin edge or point that can cut things easily
meanings.example: Make sure you use a good sharp knife.
meanings.example_cn: 你一定要用锋利的好刀。

meanings.meaning_en: Sharp is also an adverb
meanings.example: Its teeth are razor sharp (= very sharp ) .
meanings.example_cn: 它的牙齿非常锋利。

meanings.example: Do not cross the bridge but turn sharp left to go down on to the towpath.
meanings.example_cn: 不要过桥，而是向左急转下到纤道上去。

meanings.meaning_en: to decrease in value or price
meanings.example: New cars depreciate in value quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 新车掉价很快。

meanings.meaning_en: very important and needing to be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: He was in urgent need of medical attention.
meanings.example_cn: 他急需治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: to deal with one thing first, because it is the most important
meanings.example: The public wants to see the fight against crime prioritized.
meanings.example_cn: 公众希望能把打击犯罪放在第一位。

meanings.meaning_en: a planned series of actions for achieving something
meanings.example: the government’s long-term economic strategy
meanings.example_cn: 政府的长期经济策略

meanings.meaning_en: money that you have to pay in addition to the basic price of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 追加罚款；使…装载过多；使…负担过重

meanings.meaning_en: the additional effectiveness when two or more companies or people combine and work together
meanings.example: Of course, there's quite obviously a lot of synergy between the two companies.
meanings.example_cn: 当然，这两家公司之间显然有许多的协同作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a formal event, organization, ceremony etc
meanings.example: I shall be pleased to preside at your meetings.
meanings.example_cn: 我很高兴主持你们的会议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用树篱笆围住；避免作正面答复
meanings.meaning_en: to avoid giving a direct answer to a question
meanings.example: You’re hedging again - have you got the money or haven’t you?
meanings.example_cn: 你又在闪烁其词了，你究竟有没有钱？

meanings.meaning_cn: 对冲，套期保值；树篱；障碍
meanings.meaning_en: a row of small bushes or trees growing close together, usually dividing one field or garden from another
meanings.example: ‘That depends on my partner,’ she hedged.
meanings.example_cn: “那取决于我的合伙人。”她避重就轻地答道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大量的；巨大的，厚重的；魁伟的
meanings.meaning_en: very large, solid, and heavy
meanings.example: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
meanings.example_cn: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the health or state of someone’s mind
meanings.example: The centre provides help for people suffering from mental illness .
meanings.example_cn: 该中心对精神病患者提供帮助。

meanings.example: Stress has an effect on both your physical and mental health .
meanings.example_cn: 压力对身体健康和心理健康都有影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid obtained from  petroleum  that is used to supply power to the engine of cars and other vehicles
meanings.example: unleaded petrol
meanings.example_cn: 无铅汽油

meanings.meaning_en: a threatening quality, feeling, or way of behaving
meanings.example: There was menace in his voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他的语气里带着威胁。

meanings.meaning_en: to threaten

meanings.meaning_cn: 信托的；受信托的；基于信用的
meanings.meaning_en: Fiduciary is used to talk about things which relate to a trust, or to the people who are in charge of a trust
meanings.example: They have a case against their directors for breach of fiduciary duty.
meanings.example_cn: 他们对董事们违反信托责任提出诉讼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 计量器；标准尺寸；容量规格
meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for measuring the size or amount of something
meanings.example: Retail sales are a gauge of consumer spending.
meanings.example_cn: 零售额是衡量消费支出的一个标准。

meanings.meaning_en: to measure or calculate something by using a particular instrument or method
a detailed instruction about how a car, building, piece of equipment etc should be made
meanings.example: The bolts met all the engineering specifications .
meanings.example_cn: 这些螺栓符合所有的工程设计规格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保证；担保；保证人；保证书；抵押品
meanings.meaning_en: a formal written promise to repair or replace a product if it breaks within a specific period of time
meanings.example: They offer a two-year guarantee on all their electrical goods.
meanings.example_cn: 他们所有的电器产品都有两年的保修期。

meanings.meaning_en: to promise that you will pay back money that someone else has borrowed, if they do not pay it back themselves
meanings.example: a money-back guarantee
meanings.example_cn: 退货保证

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which you give something to someone and get another thing in return
meanings.example: a fair swap
meanings.example_cn: 公平交换

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone and get something in return
meanings.example: We can do a swap if you like.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你愿意我们可以交换。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 负的；消极的；否定的；阴性的
meanings.meaning_en: considering only the bad qualities of a situation, person etc and not the good ones
meanings.example: students with a negative attitude to school
meanings.example_cn: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

meanings.meaning_en: an image on a photographic film that shows dark areas as light and light areas as dark, from which the final picture is printed
meanings.example: They have a uniformly negative image of the police.
meanings.example_cn: 他们都对警察印象不好。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept a proposal or request
meanings.example: Jean rarely sounded so negative about her mother.
meanings.example_cn: 琼很少这么说她母亲不好。

meanings.meaning_en: The clientele of a place or organization are its customers or clients
meanings.example: This pub had a mixed clientele.
meanings.example_cn: 这家酒吧有混杂的顾客群。

meanings.meaning_en: to become impossible to see any longer
meanings.example: At this point the path seemed to disappear altogether (= disappear completely ) .
meanings.example_cn: 小路到这里好像完全消失了。
